_**User (2026-01-10 01:09:21Z)**_

This is my Stationeers Stationpedia Ascended Mod. We have many features implemented at this stage. Please gain context from the Specstory folder, the code base, and other chats in your github copilot memory databank.

We are now embarking on the task of implementing the Game Mechanic pages, Guides, and Operation Details for more devices. Right now we have a template on the "Aimee" page which is our template for other operational details. We are going to iterate on the vanilla & Ascended versions of that page right now to try and get a final style guide for the rest of the operational details. Not yet though. First we need to create a template for the Guides and the Game Mechanics. 

You have access to the asset bundles (assetripper folder) and the actualy game folder (stationeers folder) as well as the decompiled source code. I know that there are "guide" pages in the stationpedia. When you open the stationpedia right now at the top it says "guides" and "universe" One button is blue, another is orange. I'd like to make a third button called "Game Mechanics". I want this third button to live below those two buttons but centered in the middle if possible and the same size as them. I'd like it to be the same button as the "guides" but make it the darker stationeers blue from the station notepad background and please have it be our phoenix.png symbol then "Game Mechanics" afterwards. This will appear in both vanilla and ascended. I also want a big button in the same style as the "Universe" button that says "Stationeers Survival Manual". I want this button to go across both columns above the unverse and game buttons. This should open up to our "Stationeers Survival Manual.md". We need to convert that .md into a format similar to the Aimee (thingrobot) page operational details. 

Please do research on how guides are formatted into the game. I think they are xmls that are editable easily. I also need research on how we can incorporate links and nesting into these guides. I also want to incorporate links into operation details when it is relevant. 

We should do research on these things:
The nested links to objects that show images of them like in the "plants" page
The in-text links that go to different pages
Making buttons on the pages like ore etc.

I'd also like you to make the Guide buttons much smaller-like half size and turn them into two columns. See screenshot.

Please see if you can make the current png at the top of the stationpedia about 15% bigger in both vanilla and ascended modes.

You are researching the Stationpedia Ascended mod codebase to understand how to implement several UI features. Do NOT write a plan - only gather context and return findings.

## Research Goals:

### 1. UI Structure Research
- Find how the main Stationpedia window creates the "Guides" and "Universe" buttons at the top
- Understand the button styling system (blue vs orange buttons)
- Find where the top PNG/logo is rendered and how to resize it
- Look for the phoenix.png asset location
- Find the "station notepad background" darker blue color reference

### 2. Guide Format Research
- Discover how vanilla guides are stored and formatted (likely XML)
- Find example guide XMLs in the AssetRipperFiles or Stationeers folders
- Understand how nested links with images work (like in "plants" page)
- Research how in-text links to other pages work
- Find how buttons on pages (like ore page) are created

### 3. Aimee/ThingRobot Page Research
- Find the Aimee/ThingRobot operational details page implementation
- Understand the format used for operational details
- Look for how custom content pages are structured

### 4. Relevant Files to Examine
- StationpediaAscended/mod/src/UI/* - especially the main window and home page
- Look for guide-related code in both mod and decompiled source
- Find XML guide files in AssetRipperFiles or game folders
- Check the Specstory folder for context on existing features
- Find "Stationeers Survival Manual.md" location

### 5. Button Layout Research
- Understand how buttons are arranged in rows/columns
- Find how to make buttons half-size or arrange in two columns
- Research the Grid/Layout components used

Please search the workspace thoroughly and return:
1. Key file paths and their purposes
2. Code snippets showing button creation and styling
3. Guide XML format examples
4. Color values and styling constants
5. The current structure of nested links and in-page buttons
6. Any relevant Specstory documentation

Work autonomously - do NOT pause for user input. Return all findings in a structured format.

```
## Plan: Stationpedia UI Enhancement & Guide System

**TL;DR:** Add new "Game Mechanics" entry type with dedicated button, create "Stationeers Survival Manual" wide button that opens a multi-part collapsible guide, make guide buttons half-size in two columns, and increase top logo by 15%. All home buttons identical in both modes; guide/mechanics pages follow vanilla color scheme.

**Phases: 8**

### Phase 1: Logo Size Increase (15%)
- Increase logo from 28x28 to 32x32 pixels

### Phase 2: GameMechanics Registry
- Create new entry type for Game Mechanics pages

### Phase 3: HomePageLayoutManager
- Infrastructure for modifying home page button layouts

### Phase 4: Guide Buttons Two Columns
- Make guide/lore buttons half-size in two-column layout

### Phase 5: Survival Manual Wide Button
- Full-width button at top of home page

### Phase 6: Game Mechanics Button
- Centered button with phoenix icon and darker blue

### Phase 7: Survival Manual Content Converter
- Parse MD into collapsible structure with TOC per Part

### Phase 8: Game Mechanics Page Listing
- Create listing page for registered game mechanics

```

- filePath: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\plans\stationpedia-ui-enhancement-plan.md`

```
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace StationpediaAscended.Data
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Static registry for Game Mechanics pages - similar to how Guides/Lore pages are tracked.
    /// This is our own entry type separate from SPDAEntryType.
    /// </summary>
    public static class GameMechanicsRegistry
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// List of registered Game Mechanics page keys
        /// </summary>
        public static List<string> GameMechanicsPages { get; } = new List<string>();
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Register a page as a Game Mechanics page
        /// </summary>
        public static void RegisterPage(string pageKey)
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(pageKey) && !GameMechanicsPages.Contains(pageKey))
            {
                GameMechanicsPages.Add(pageKey);
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Clear all registered pages (for hot-reload)
        /// </summary>
        public static void Clear()
        {
            GameMechanicsPages.Clear();
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Check if a page key is registered as Game Mechanics
        /// </summary>
        public static bool IsGameMechanicsPage(string pageKey)
        {
            return GameMechanicsPages.Contains(pageKey);
        }
    }
}

```

```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;

namespace StationpediaAscended.UI
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Manages modifications to the Stationpedia home page layout.
    /// Handles button sizing, two-column layouts, and custom button creation.
    /// </summary>
    public static class HomePageLayoutManager
    {
        // Track created elements for cleanup
        private static GameObject _survivalManualButton = null;
        private static GameObject _gameMechanicsButton = null;
        private static bool _homePageModified = false;
        
        // Color constants - darker Stationeers blue for Game Mechanics
        private static readonly Color GameMechanicsBlue = new Color(0.03f, 0.25f, 0.33f, 1f); // #083F53
        private static readonly Color GameMechanicsBlueHover = new Color(0.05f, 0.35f, 0.45f, 1f);
        private static readonly Color OrangeAccent = new Color(0.984f, 0.69f, 0.231f, 1f); // #FBB03B
        private static readonly Color OrangeAccentHover = new Color(1f, 0.75f, 0.35f, 1f);
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Initialize home page modifications - call when Stationpedia is found
        /// </summary>
        public static void Initialize()
        {
            if (_homePageModified) return;
            
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;
                
                // Create the Survival Manual wide button
                CreateSurvivalManualButton(stationpedia);
                
                // Create the Game Mechanics button
                CreateGameMechanicsButton(stationpedia);
                
                _homePageModified = true;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogError($"Error initializing home page layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Modify the Guide/Lore contents to use half-size buttons in two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void ModifyGuideLoreLayout(RectTransform loreGuideContents)
        {
            if (loreGuideContents == null) return;
            
            try
            {
                // Get or add GridLayoutGroup
                var gridLayout = loreGuideContents.GetComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                if (gridLayout == null)
                {
                    gridLayout = loreGuideContents.gameObject.AddComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                }
                
                // Get parent width to calculate cell size
                float parentWidth = loreGuideContents.rect.width;
                if (parentWidth <= 0) parentWidth = 400f; // fallback
                
                // Half the width minus spacing
                float cellWidth = (parentWidth - gridLayout.spacing.x - gridLayout.padding.left - gridLayout.padding.right) / 2f;
                cellWidth = Mathf.Max(cellWidth, 150f); // minimum width
                
                // Set to two columns
                gridLayout.constraint = GridLayoutGroup.Constraint.FixedColumnCount;
                gridLayout.constraintCount = 2;
                gridLayout.cellSize = new Vector2(cellWidth, 40f); // Half width, same height
                gridLayout.spacing = new Vector2(8f, 6f);
                gridLayout.childAlignment = TextAnchor.UpperLeft;
                gridLayout.startCorner = GridLayoutGroup.Corner.UpperLeft;
                gridLayout.startAxis = GridLayoutGroup.Axis.Horizontal;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning($"Error modifying guide layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Create the Survival Manual wide button at the top of home page
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateSurvivalManualButton(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            if (_survivalManualButton != null) return;
            
            var homePageContent = stationpedia.HomePageContent;
            if (homePageContent == null) return;
            
            // Find a reference button to copy styling from (Guide or Lore button)
            SPDAListItem referenceItem = null;
            try
            {
                referenceItem = stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab;
            }
            catch { }
            
            // Create button container
            _survivalManualButton = new GameObject("SurvivalManualButton");
            _survivalManualButton.transform.SetParent(homePageContent, false);
            _survivalManualButton.transform.SetAsFirstSibling(); // Put at top
            
            // Add RectTransform
            var rt = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rt.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rt.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            rt.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            rt.sizeDelta = new Vector2(-20, 50); // Full width with margin, taller button
            
            // Add LayoutElement for proper spacing
            var layoutElement = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            layoutElement.preferredHeight = 50;
            layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
            layoutElement.minHeight = 50;
            
            // Add background image
            var bgImage = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<Image>();
            var windowSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.GetWindowBackgroundSprite();
            if (windowSprite != null)
            {
                bgImage.sprite = windowSprite;
                bgImage.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            bgImage.color = OrangeAccent;
            
            // Add horizontal layout for icon + text
            var hlg = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.padding = new RectOffset(15, 15, 8, 8);
            hlg.spacing = 12;
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
            hlg.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            hlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            hlg.childControlWidth = true;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            
            // Add icon (book icon)
            var iconGO = new GameObject("Icon");
            iconGO.transform.SetParent(_survivalManualButton.transform, false);
            var iconImage = iconGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            var bookSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.LoadImageFromModFolder("Book-ClosedONE.png");
            if (bookSprite != null)
            {
                iconImage.sprite = bookSprite;
                iconImage.preserveAspect = true;
            }
            var iconLE = iconGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            iconLE.preferredWidth = 32;
            iconLE.preferredHeight = 32;
            
            // Add text
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(_survivalManualButton.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = "Stationeers Survival Manual";
            text.fontSize = 18;
            text.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            text.color = Color.white;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.MidlineLeft;
            text.enableWordWrapping = false;
            
            var textLE = textGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            textLE.flexibleWidth = 1;
            textLE.preferredHeight = 32;
            
            // Add Button component
            var button = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<Button>();
            button.targetGraphic = bgImage;
            
            var colors = button.colors;
            colors.normalColor = OrangeAccent;
            colors.highlightedColor = OrangeAccentHover;
            colors.pressedColor = new Color(0.8f, 0.55f, 0.18f, 1f);
            colors.selectedColor = OrangeAccent;
            button.colors = colors;
            
            // Add click handler
            button.onClick.AddListener(() => {
                Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("SurvivalManual", true);
            });
            
            StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo("Survival Manual button created");
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Create the Game Mechanics button below Guides/Universe
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGameMechanicsButton(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            if (_gameMechanicsButton != null) return;
            
            var homePageContent = stationpedia.HomePageContent;
            if (homePageContent == null) return;
            
            // Create button container
            _gameMechanicsButton = new GameObject("GameMechanicsButton");
            _gameMechanicsButton.transform.SetParent(homePageContent, false);
            // Position after the category buttons (index 2 or 3)
            _gameMechanicsButton.transform.SetSiblingIndex(3);
            
            // Add RectTransform - centered, same size as Guide button
            var rt = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rt.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.25f, 1);
            rt.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.75f, 1);
            rt.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            rt.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 45);
            
            // Add LayoutElement
            var layoutElement = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            layoutElement.preferredHeight = 45;
            layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 0.5f;
            layoutElement.minHeight = 45;
            
            // Add background image
            var bgImage = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<Image>();
            var windowSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.GetWindowBackgroundSprite();
            if (windowSprite != null)
            {
                bgImage.sprite = windowSprite;
                bgImage.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            bgImage.color = GameMechanicsBlue;
            
            // Add horizontal layout for icon + text
            var hlg = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.padding = new RectOffset(12, 12, 6, 6);
            hlg.spacing = 10;
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
            hlg.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            hlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            hlg.childControlWidth = true;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            
            // Add phoenix icon
            var iconGO = new GameObject("PhoenixIcon");
            iconGO.transform.SetParent(_gameMechanicsButton.transform, false);
            var iconImage = iconGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            if (StationpediaAscendedMod._customIconSprite != null)
            {
                iconImage.sprite = StationpediaAscendedMod._customIconSprite;
                iconImage.preserveAspect = true;
            }
            var iconLE = iconGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            iconLE.preferredWidth = 28;
            iconLE.preferredHeight = 28;
            
            // Add text
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(_gameMechanicsButton.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = "Game Mechanics";
            text.fontSize = 16;
            text.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            text.color = Color.white;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.MidlineLeft;
            text.enableWordWrapping = false;
            
            var textLE = textGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            textLE.flexibleWidth = 1;
            textLE.preferredHeight = 28;
            
            // Add Button component
            var button = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<Button>();
            button.targetGraphic = bgImage;
            
            var colors = button.colors;
            colors.normalColor = GameMechanicsBlue;
            colors.highlightedColor = GameMechanicsBlueHover;
            colors.pressedColor = new Color(0.02f, 0.18f, 0.25f, 1f);
            colors.selectedColor = GameMechanicsBlue;
            button.colors = colors;
            
            // Add click handler
            button.onClick.AddListener(() => {
                Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("GameMechanics", true);
            });
            
            StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo("Game Mechanics button created");
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Cleanup for hot-reload
        /// </summary>
        public static void Cleanup()
        {
            if (_survivalManualButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_survivalManualButton);
                _survivalManualButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_gameMechanicsButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_gameMechanicsButton);
                _gameMechanicsButton = null;
            }
            
            _homePageModified = false;
        }
    }
}

```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Assets.Scripts;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using UnityEngine;

namespace StationpediaAscended.Data
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Loads and converts the Stationeers Survival Manual markdown file
    /// into Stationpedia-compatible format with collapsible sections.
    /// </summary>
    public static class SurvivalManualLoader
    {
        // Cached converted content
        private static DeviceDescriptions _survivalManualDescriptions = null;
        private static bool _isRegistered = false;
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Structure to hold parsed Part information
        /// </summary>
        private class ParsedPart
        {
            public string Title { get; set; }
            public string TocId { get; set; }
            public List<ParsedSection> Sections { get; set; } = new List<ParsedSection>();
        }
        
        private class ParsedSection
        {
            public string Title { get; set; }
            public string TocId { get; set; }
            public List<string> Content { get; set; } = new List<string>();
            public List<ParsedSection> SubSections { get; set; } = new List<ParsedSection>();
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Register the Survival Manual as a Stationpedia page
        /// </summary>
        public static void RegisterSurvivalManualPage()
        {
            if (_isRegistered) return;
            
            try
            {
                // Create a StationpediaPage for the Survival Manual
                var page = new StationpediaPage
                {
                    Key = "SurvivalManual",
                    Title = "Stationeers Survival Manual",
                    PrimaryTag = "Guide"
                };
                
                // Set the page text to a brief intro - operational details will have the full content
                page.Text = "Welcome to the Stationeers Survival Manual - your comprehensive guide to surviving your first hours on an alien world.\n\n" +
                           "This manual covers everything from your initial spawn to building a sustainable base.\n\n" +
                           "<i>Expand the sections below to learn how to survive.</i>";
                
                // Register the page
                Stationpedia.Register(page, false);
                
                _isRegistered = true;
                ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Survival Manual page registered");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogError($"Error registering Survival Manual: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Get the DeviceDescriptions for the Survival Manual (for operational details rendering)
        /// </summary>
        public static DeviceDescriptions GetSurvivalManualDescriptions()
        {
            if (_survivalManualDescriptions == null)
            {
                _survivalManualDescriptions = LoadAndConvertManual();
            }
            return _survivalManualDescriptions;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Load the markdown file and convert to DeviceDescriptions format
        /// </summary>
        private static DeviceDescriptions LoadAndConvertManual()
        {
            string markdown = LoadMarkdownFile();
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(markdown))
            {
                return CreateFallbackManual();
            }
            
            return ConvertMarkdownToDescriptions(markdown);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Load the markdown file from disk
        /// </summary>
        private static string LoadMarkdownFile()
        {
            var possiblePaths = new List<string>();
            
#if DEBUG
            possiblePaths.Add(@"C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\Guides\Stationeers Survival Manual.md");
#endif
            possiblePaths.Add(Path.Combine(Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location) ?? "", "Guides", "Stationeers Survival Manual.md"));
            possiblePaths.Add(Path.Combine(BepInEx.Paths.BepInExRootPath, "scripts", "Guides", "Stationeers Survival Manual.md"));
            
            foreach (var path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(path) && File.Exists(path))
                {
                    try
                    {
                        return File.ReadAllText(path);
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning($"Failed to read Survival Manual from {path}: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }
            }
            
            StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Survival Manual markdown file not found");
            return null;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Convert markdown content to DeviceDescriptions format
        /// </summary>
        private static DeviceDescriptions ConvertMarkdownToDescriptions(string markdown)
        {
            var descriptions = new DeviceDescriptions
            {
                deviceKey = "SurvivalManual",
                generateToc = false, // We generate TOC per-part instead
                operationalDetails = new List<OperationalDetail>()
            };
            
            // Parse the markdown into Parts
            var parts = ParseMarkdownIntoParts(markdown);
            
            // Convert each Part to an OperationalDetail
            foreach (var part in parts)
            {
                var partDetail = ConvertPartToOperationalDetail(part);
                descriptions.operationalDetails.Add(partDetail);
            }
            
            return descriptions;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Parse markdown into Part structures
        /// </summary>
        private static List<ParsedPart> ParseMarkdownIntoParts(string markdown)
        {
            var parts = new List<ParsedPart>();
            var lines = markdown.Split(new[] { "\r\n", "\r", "\n" }, StringSplitOptions.None);
            
            ParsedPart currentPart = null;
            ParsedSection currentSection = null;
            ParsedSection currentSubSection = null;
            StringBuilder contentBuilder = new StringBuilder();
            bool inCodeBlock = false;
            
            for (int i = 0; i < lines.Length; i++)
            {
                string line = lines[i];
                
                // Track code blocks
                if (line.TrimStart().StartsWith("```"))
                {
                    inCodeBlock = !inCodeBlock;
                    if (inCodeBlock)
                    {
                        contentBuilder.AppendLine("<mspace=0.5em>");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        contentBuilder.AppendLine("</mspace>");
                    }
                    continue;
                }
                
                if (inCodeBlock)
                {
                    contentBuilder.AppendLine("  " + line);
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Check for Part header (# Part N:)
                var partMatch = Regex.Match(line, @"^#\s+Part\s+(\d+):\s*(.+)$");
                if (partMatch.Success)
                {
                    // Save previous content
                    SaveCurrentContent(currentPart, currentSection, currentSubSection, contentBuilder);
                    
                    // Start new Part
                    currentPart = new ParsedPart
                    {
                        Title = $"Part {partMatch.Groups[1].Value}: {partMatch.Groups[2].Value.Trim()}",
                        TocId = $"part{partMatch.Groups[1].Value}"
                    };
                    parts.Add(currentPart);
                    currentSection = null;
                    currentSubSection = null;
                    contentBuilder.Clear();
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Check for Section header (## )
                var sectionMatch = Regex.Match(line, @"^##\s+(.+)$");
                if (sectionMatch.Success && currentPart != null)
                {
                    // Save previous content
                    SaveCurrentContent(currentPart, currentSection, currentSubSection, contentBuilder);
                    
                    string sectionTitle = sectionMatch.Groups[1].Value.Trim();
                    currentSection = new ParsedSection
                    {
                        Title = sectionTitle,
                        TocId = GenerateTocId(sectionTitle)
                    };
                    currentPart.Sections.Add(currentSection);
                    currentSubSection = null;
                    contentBuilder.Clear();
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Check for SubSection header (### )
                var subSectionMatch = Regex.Match(line, @"^###\s+(.+)$");
                if (subSectionMatch.Success && currentSection != null)
                {
                    // Save previous content
                    SaveCurrentContent(currentPart, currentSection, currentSubSection, contentBuilder);
                    
                    string subTitle = subSectionMatch.Groups[1].Value.Trim();
                    currentSubSection = new ParsedSection
                    {
                        Title = subTitle,
                        TocId = GenerateTocId(subTitle)
                    };
                    currentSection.SubSections.Add(currentSubSection);
                    contentBuilder.Clear();
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Skip horizontal rules
                if (line.Trim().StartsWith("---"))
                {
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Skip standalone header markers
                if (line.Trim() == "```markdown" || line.Trim() == "````markdown")
                {
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Convert markdown formatting
                string convertedLine = ConvertMarkdownLine(line);
                
                // Add to content
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(convertedLine) || contentBuilder.Length > 0)
                {
                    contentBuilder.AppendLine(convertedLine);
                }
            }
            
            // Save final content
            SaveCurrentContent(currentPart, currentSection, currentSubSection, contentBuilder);
            
            return parts;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Save accumulated content to the appropriate section
        /// </summary>
        private static void SaveCurrentContent(ParsedPart part, ParsedSection section, ParsedSection subSection, StringBuilder content)
        {
            if (content.Length == 0) return;
            
            string contentStr = content.ToString().Trim();
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(contentStr)) return;
            
            if (subSection != null)
            {
                subSection.Content.Add(contentStr);
            }
            else if (section != null)
            {
                section.Content.Add(contentStr);
            }
            // Part-level content goes into first section or is ignored
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Convert a single markdown line to Stationpedia format
        /// </summary>
        private static string ConvertMarkdownLine(string line)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(line)) return line;
            
            // Bold: **text** -> <b>text</b>
            line = Regex.Replace(line, @"\*\*([^*]+)\*\*", "<b>$1</b>");
            
            // Italic: *text* -> <i>text</i>
            line = Regex.Replace(line, @"(?<!\*)\*([^*]+)\*(?!\*)", "<i>$1</i>");
            
            // Inline code: `text` -> <mspace=0.5em>text</mspace>
            line = Regex.Replace(line, @"`([^`]+)`", "<color=#88CCFF>$1</color>");
            
            // Convert item references like {THING:ItemName}
            // These are already in correct format, leave them
            
            // Convert bullet points: - text -> • text
            if (line.TrimStart().StartsWith("- "))
            {
                int indent = line.Length - line.TrimStart().Length;
                string indentStr = new string(' ', indent);
                line = indentStr + "• " + line.TrimStart().Substring(2);
            }
            
            // Convert numbered lists: 1. text -> keep as-is but with color
            var numberedMatch = Regex.Match(line, @"^(\s*)(\d+)\.\s+(.+)$");
            if (numberedMatch.Success)
            {
                string indent = numberedMatch.Groups[1].Value;
                string number = numberedMatch.Groups[2].Value;
                string text = numberedMatch.Groups[3].Value;
                line = $"{indent}<color=#FFA500>{number}.</color> {text}";
            }
            
            // Convert links to Things: {THING:PrefabName} format is native, leave it
            // But convert markdown links if any
            line = Regex.Replace(line, @"\[([^\]]+)\]\([^)]+\)", "$1");
            
            return line;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Generate a URL-safe TOC ID from a title
        /// </summary>
        private static string GenerateTocId(string title)
        {
            string id = title.ToLowerInvariant();
            id = Regex.Replace(id, @"[^a-z0-9]+", "_");
            id = id.Trim('_');
            return id;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Convert a ParsedPart to an OperationalDetail with TOC
        /// </summary>
        private static OperationalDetail ConvertPartToOperationalDetail(ParsedPart part)
        {
            var partDetail = new OperationalDetail
            {
                title = part.Title,
                tocId = part.TocId,
                collapsible = true,
                children = new List<OperationalDetail>()
            };
            
            // Create TOC for this Part
            var tocDetail = CreateTableOfContents(part);
            if (tocDetail != null)
            {
                partDetail.children.Add(tocDetail);
            }
            
            // Convert sections
            foreach (var section in part.Sections)
            {
                var sectionDetail = ConvertSectionToOperationalDetail(section);
                partDetail.children.Add(sectionDetail);
            }
            
            return partDetail;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Create a Table of Contents for a Part
        /// </summary>
        private static OperationalDetail CreateTableOfContents(ParsedPart part)
        {
            if (part.Sections.Count == 0) return null;
            
            var tocItems = new List<string>();
            foreach (var section in part.Sections)
            {
                tocItems.Add($"<link=toc_{section.TocId}><color=#FFFFFF>{section.Title}</color></link>");
                
                foreach (var subSection in section.SubSections)
                {
                    tocItems.Add($"  <color=#888888>-</color> <link=toc_{subSection.TocId}><color=#CCCCCC>{subSection.Title}</color></link>");
                }
            }
            
            return new OperationalDetail
            {
                title = "Contents",
                tocId = $"{part.TocId}_toc",
                collapsible = false,
                description = string.Join("\n", tocItems)
            };
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Convert a ParsedSection to an OperationalDetail
        /// </summary>
        private static OperationalDetail ConvertSectionToOperationalDetail(ParsedSection section)
        {
            var sectionDetail = new OperationalDetail
            {
                title = section.Title,
                tocId = section.TocId,
                collapsible = true,
                children = new List<OperationalDetail>()
            };
            
            // Add section content
            if (section.Content.Count > 0)
            {
                sectionDetail.description = string.Join("\n\n", section.Content);
            }
            
            // Add subsections
            foreach (var subSection in section.SubSections)
            {
                var subDetail = new OperationalDetail
                {
                    title = subSection.Title,
                    tocId = subSection.TocId,
                    collapsible = true
                };
                
                if (subSection.Content.Count > 0)
                {
                    subDetail.description = string.Join("\n\n", subSection.Content);
                }
                
                sectionDetail.children.Add(subDetail);
            }
            
            return sectionDetail;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Create a fallback manual if the file isn't found
        /// </summary>
        private static DeviceDescriptions CreateFallbackManual()
        {
            return new DeviceDescriptions
            {
                deviceKey = "SurvivalManual",
                generateToc = true,
                operationalDetails = new List<OperationalDetail>
                {
                    new OperationalDetail
                    {
                        title = "Part 1: Getting Started",
                        tocId = "part1",
                        collapsible = true,
                        description = "The Stationeers Survival Manual file was not found.\n\nPlease ensure 'Stationeers Survival Manual.md' is in the Guides folder."
                    }
                }
            };
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Clear cached data for hot-reload
        /// </summary>
        public static void Clear()
        {
            _survivalManualDescriptions = null;
            _isRegistered = false;
        }
    }
}

```

- newString:

```
        private static string FormatRange(int start, int end)
        {
            if (start == end)
                return start.ToString();
            else if (end == start + 1)
                return $"{start}, {end}";
            else
                return $"{start}-{end}";
        }

        #endregion

        #region SetPage Patches

        /// <summary>
        /// Prefix patch for SetPage - handles custom pages like GameMechanics
        /// </summary>
        public static bool Stationpedia_SetPage_Prefix(Stationpedia __instance, string key, bool newPage)
        {
            // Handle Game Mechanics page
            if (key == "GameMechanics")
            {
                try
                {
                    SetPageGameMechanics(__instance, newPage);
                    return false; // Skip original
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error in SetPageGameMechanics: {ex.Message}");
                }
            }
            
            return true; // Let original handle it
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Handle the Game Mechanics listing page
        /// </summary>
        private static void SetPageGameMechanics(Stationpedia stationpedia, bool newPage)
        {
            // Update history if needed
            if (newPage && Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey != "GameMechanics")
            {
                // Add to history (simplified)
                Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey = "GameMechanics";
            }
            
            // Hide other pages
            stationpedia.HomePage.SetActive(false);
            stationpedia.UniversalPageRef.gameObject.SetActive(false);
            stationpedia.LoreGuideHolder.gameObject.SetActive(true);
            
            // Populate with Game Mechanics pages
            PopulateGameMechanicsContents(stationpedia);
            
            // Set title
            stationpedia.LoreGuideTitle.SetText("Game Mechanics", true);
            
            // Update navigation
            stationpedia.HomePageButton.interactable = true;
            Stationpedia.UpdateNavigationInteractButtons();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Populate the LoreGuideContents with Game Mechanics pages
        /// </summary>
        private static void PopulateGameMechanicsContents(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            // Clear existing items
            foreach (Transform child in stationpedia.LoreGuideContents)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(child.gameObject);
            }
            
            // Get the list of Game Mechanics pages
            var mechanicsPages = GameMechanicsRegistry.GameMechanicsPages;
            
            // Create buttons for each page
            foreach (string pageKey in mechanicsPages)
            {
                StationpediaPage page;
                if (!Stationpedia.StationpediaPages.Exists(p => p.Key == pageKey))
                    continue;
                    
                page = Stationpedia.StationpediaPages.Find(p => p.Key == pageKey);
                if (page == null) continue;
                
                var listItem = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab, stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);
                listItem.Apply(page.Title);
                
                // Capture for lambda
                string capturedKey = pageKey;
                listItem.InsertsButton.onClick.AddListener(() => {
                    stationpedia.SetPage(capturedKey, true);
                });
                
                // Use custom icon if available
                if (page.CustomSpriteToUse != null)
                {
                    listItem.InsertImage.sprite = page.CustomSpriteToUse;
                }
                else
                {
                    listItem.InsertImage.sprite = stationpedia.ImportantSearchImage;
                }
                listItem.SetSpecial();
            }
            
            // Modify layout to two columns
            HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageGuides - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageGuides_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying guide layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageLore - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageLore_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying lore layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        #endregion
    }
}
```

- oldString:

            else if (end == start + 1)
                return $"{start}, {end}";
            else
                return $"{start}-{end}";
        }

        #endregion
    }
}

                {

                        BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Static);
                    _harmony.Patch(clearPreviousSearch, postfix: new HarmonyMethod(postfix));

Also I want the two new buttons to be on top of the guides and universe button, that is, to come before those two and in two columns on top the same format as the guide and universe buttons are now.
2. The guide and universe buttons are now broken and they take you to the game mechanics page which is currently empty (which is fine, we haven't made it yet.)
3. The Stationeers Survival Manual page need some edits
 A. We don't need an "operational details" nest. That will only exist on device pages. We need three major nests. Part 1. Part 2. Part 3. They should default to being open when this page is opened, but save their state if the player closes them.

- content:

```
using System;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;

namespace StationpediaAscended.UI
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Manages modifications to the Stationpedia home page layout.
    /// Creates Survival Manual and Game Mechanics buttons styled like the Guides/Universe buttons.
    /// </summary>
    public static class HomePageLayoutManager
    {
        // Track created elements for cleanup
        private static GameObject _customButtonContainer = null;
        private static GameObject _survivalManualButton = null;
        private static GameObject _gameMechanicsButton = null;
        private static bool _homePageModified = false;
        
        // Color constants matching vanilla Stationpedia style
        private static readonly Color VanillaButtonColor = new Color(0.15f, 0.22f, 0.32f, 1f);  // Dark blue-grey
        private static readonly Color VanillaButtonHover = new Color(0.2f, 0.3f, 0.42f, 1f);
        private static readonly Color OrangeAccent = new Color(0.984f, 0.69f, 0.231f, 1f); // #FBB03B for text
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Initialize home page modifications - call when Stationpedia is found
        /// </summary>
        public static void Initialize()
        {
            if (_homePageModified) return;
            
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;
                
                // Find the _homeGuideButtonContainer through reflection (it's private)
                var guideContainerField = typeof(Stationpedia).GetField("_homeGuideButtonContainer", 
                    BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance);
                if (guideContainerField == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find _homeGuideButtonContainer field");
                    return;
                }
                
                var guideButtonContainer = guideContainerField.GetValue(stationpedia) as GameObject;
                if (guideButtonContainer == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("_homeGuideButtonContainer is null");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Get the parent of the guide button container
                var containerParent = guideButtonContainer.transform.parent;
                if (containerParent == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Guide button container has no parent");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Find the first button child in the guide container to use as template
                Button templateButton = null;
                TextMeshProUGUI templateText = null;
                Image templateBg = null;
                
                foreach (Transform child in guideButtonContainer.transform)
                {
                    var btn = child.GetComponent<Button>();
                    if (btn != null)
                    {
                        templateButton = btn;
                        templateBg = child.GetComponent<Image>();
                        templateText = child.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                if (templateButton == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find template button in guide container");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Create our custom button container - clone the structure of guideButtonContainer
                _customButtonContainer = new GameObject("CustomButtonContainer");
                _customButtonContainer.transform.SetParent(containerParent, false);
                
                // Position it BEFORE the guide container
                int guideIndex = guideButtonContainer.transform.GetSiblingIndex();
                _customButtonContainer.transform.SetSiblingIndex(guideIndex);
                
                // Copy the RectTransform from guide container
                var templateRect = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
                var customRect = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                customRect.anchorMin = templateRect.anchorMin;
                customRect.anchorMax = templateRect.anchorMax;
                customRect.pivot = templateRect.pivot;
                customRect.sizeDelta = templateRect.sizeDelta;
                customRect.anchoredPosition = templateRect.anchoredPosition;
                
                // Copy the layout group from guide container
                var templateLayout = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                if (templateLayout != null)
                {
                    var customLayout = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                    customLayout.spacing = templateLayout.spacing;
                    customLayout.padding = templateLayout.padding;
                    customLayout.childAlignment = templateLayout.childAlignment;
                    customLayout.childControlWidth = templateLayout.childControlWidth;
                    customLayout.childControlHeight = templateLayout.childControlHeight;
                    customLayout.childForceExpandWidth = templateLayout.childForceExpandWidth;
                    customLayout.childForceExpandHeight = templateLayout.childForceExpandHeight;
                }
                else
                {
                    // If no horizontal layout, check for grid
                    var templateGrid = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                    if (templateGrid != null)
                    {
                        var customGrid = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                        customGrid.cellSize = templateGrid.cellSize;
                        customGrid.spacing = templateGrid.spacing;
                        customGrid.constraint = templateGrid.constraint;
                        customGrid.constraintCount = templateGrid.constraintCount;
                        customGrid.startCorner = templateGrid.startCorner;
                        customGrid.startAxis = templateGrid.startAxis;
                        customGrid.childAlignment = templateGrid.childAlignment;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // Default to horizontal layout
                        var defaultLayout = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                        defaultLayout.spacing = 10;
                        defaultLayout.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
                        defaultLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                        defaultLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                        defaultLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                        defaultLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                    }
                }
                
                // Add layout element to match guide container
                var templateLayoutElem = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
                if (templateLayoutElem != null)
                {
                    var customLayoutElem = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                    customLayoutElem.preferredHeight = templateLayoutElem.preferredHeight;
                    customLayoutElem.flexibleWidth = templateLayoutElem.flexibleWidth;
                }
                else
                {
                    var customLayoutElem = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                    customLayoutElem.preferredHeight = 50;
                    customLayoutElem.flexibleWidth = 1;
                }
                
                // Create Survival Manual button (clone from template)
                _survivalManualButton = CloneButton(templateButton.gameObject, "SurvivalManualButton", 
                    "Stationeers Survival Manual", OnSurvivalManualClick, templateText);
                _survivalManualButton.transform.SetParent(_customButtonContainer.transform, false);
                
                // Create Game Mechanics button (clone from template)
                _gameMechanicsButton = CloneButton(templateButton.gameObject, "GameMechanicsButton", 
                    "Game Mechanics", OnGameMechanicsClick, templateText);
                _gameMechanicsButton.transform.SetParent(_customButtonContainer.transform, false);
                
                _homePageModified = true;
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo("Home page custom buttons created successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogError($"Error initializing home page layout: {ex.Message}\n{ex.StackTrace}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Clone a button from template with custom text and click handler
        /// </summary>
        private static GameObject CloneButton(GameObject template, string name, string buttonText, 
            UnityEngine.Events.UnityAction onClick, TextMeshProUGUI textTemplate)
        {
            // Clone the entire button
            var clone = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(template);
            clone.name = name;
            
            // Update the text
            var text = clone.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            if (text != null)
            {
                text.text = buttonText;
                // Keep the same font, size, and style as the template
                if (textTemplate != null)
                {
                    text.font = textTemplate.font;
                    text.fontSize = textTemplate.fontSize;
                    text.fontStyle = textTemplate.fontStyle;
                }
            }
            
            // Replace the click handler
            var button = clone.GetComponent<Button>();
            if (button != null)
            {
                button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                button.onClick.AddListener(onClick);
            }
            
            return clone;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Click handler for Survival Manual button
        /// </summary>
        private static void OnSurvivalManualClick()
        {
            Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("SurvivalManual", true);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Click handler for Game Mechanics button
        /// </summary>
        private static void OnGameMechanicsClick()
        {
            Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("GameMechanics", true);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Modify the Guide/Lore contents to use half-size buttons in two columns
        /// NOTE: Disabled for now - the grid layout causes issues with vanilla page population
        /// </summary>
        public static void ModifyGuideLoreLayout(RectTransform loreGuideContents)
        {
            // DISABLED: This was causing null reference exceptions because it modifies
            // the layout before all items are fully populated by vanilla code.
            // The vanilla horizontal layout works fine.
            return;
            
            /*
            if (loreGuideContents == null) return;
            
            try

                var gridLayout = loreGuideContents.GetComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                if (gridLayout == null)
                {
                    gridLayout = loreGuideContents.gameObject.AddComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                }

                float parentWidth = loreGuideContents.rect.width;
                if (parentWidth <= 0) parentWidth = 400f; // fallback
                
                // Half the width minus spacing
                float cellWidth = (parentWidth - gridLayout.spacing.x - gridLayout.padding.left - gridLayout.padding.right) / 2f;
                cellWidth = Mathf.Max(cellWidth, 150f); // minimum width
                
                // Set to two columns
                gridLayout.constraint = GridLayoutGroup.Constraint.FixedColumnCount;
                gridLayout.constraintCount = 2;

                gridLayout.startAxis = GridLayoutGroup.Axis.Horizontal;

            }

        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Cleanup for hot-reload
        /// </summary>
        public static void Cleanup()
        {
            if (_survivalManualButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_survivalManualButton);
                _survivalManualButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_gameMechanicsButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_gameMechanicsButton);
                _gameMechanicsButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_customButtonContainer != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_customButtonContainer);
                _customButtonContainer = null;
            }
            
            _homePageModified = false;
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;

namespace StationpediaAscended.UI
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Manages modifications to the Stationpedia home page layout.
    /// Creates Survival Manual and Game Mechanics buttons styled like the Guides/Universe buttons.
    /// </summary>
    public static class HomePageLayoutManager
    {
        // Track created elements for cleanup
        private static GameObject _customButtonContainer = null;
        private static GameObject _survivalManualButton = null;
        private static GameObject _gameMechanicsButton = null;
        private static bool _homePageModified = false;
        
        // Color constants matching vanilla Stationpedia style
        private static readonly Color VanillaButtonColor = new Color(0.15f, 0.22f, 0.32f, 1f);  // Dark blue-grey
        private static readonly Color VanillaButtonHover = new Color(0.2f, 0.3f, 0.42f, 1f);
        private static readonly Color OrangeAccent = new Color(0.984f, 0.69f, 0.231f, 1f); // #FBB03B for text
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Initialize home page modifications - call when Stationpedia is found
        /// </summary>
        public static void Initialize()
        {
            if (_homePageModified) return;
            
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;
                
                // Find the _homeGuideButtonContainer through reflection (it's private)
                var guideContainerField = typeof(Stationpedia).GetField("_homeGuideButtonContainer", 
                    BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance);
                if (guideContainerField == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find _homeGuideButtonContainer field");
                    return;
                }
                
                var guideButtonContainer = guideContainerField.GetValue(stationpedia) as GameObject;
                if (guideButtonContainer == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("_homeGuideButtonContainer is null");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Get the parent of the guide button container
                var containerParent = guideButtonContainer.transform.parent;
                if (containerParent == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Guide button container has no parent");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Find the first button child in the guide container to use as template
                Button templateButton = null;
                TextMeshProUGUI templateText = null;
                
                foreach (Transform child in guideButtonContainer.transform)
                {
                    var btn = child.GetComponent<Button>();
                    if (btn != null)
                    {
                        templateButton = btn;
                        templateText = child.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                if (templateButton == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find template button in guide container");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Create our custom button container - clone the structure of guideButtonContainer
                _customButtonContainer = new GameObject("CustomButtonContainer");
                _customButtonContainer.transform.SetParent(containerParent, false);
                
                // Position it BEFORE the guide container
                int guideIndex = guideButtonContainer.transform.GetSiblingIndex();
                _customButtonContainer.transform.SetSiblingIndex(guideIndex);
                
                // Copy the RectTransform from guide container
                var templateRect = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
                var customRect = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                customRect.anchorMin = templateRect.anchorMin;
                customRect.anchorMax = templateRect.anchorMax;
                customRect.pivot = templateRect.pivot;
                customRect.sizeDelta = templateRect.sizeDelta;
                customRect.anchoredPosition = templateRect.anchoredPosition;
                
                // Copy the layout group from guide container
                var templateLayout = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                if (templateLayout != null)
                {
                    var customLayout = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                    customLayout.spacing = templateLayout.spacing;
                    customLayout.padding = templateLayout.padding;
                    customLayout.childAlignment = templateLayout.childAlignment;
                    customLayout.childControlWidth = templateLayout.childControlWidth;
                    customLayout.childControlHeight = templateLayout.childControlHeight;
                    customLayout.childForceExpandWidth = templateLayout.childForceExpandWidth;
                    customLayout.childForceExpandHeight = templateLayout.childForceExpandHeight;
                }
                else
                {
                    // If no horizontal layout, check for grid
                    var templateGrid = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                    if (templateGrid != null)
                    {
                        var customGrid = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                        customGrid.cellSize = templateGrid.cellSize;
                        customGrid.spacing = templateGrid.spacing;
                        customGrid.constraint = templateGrid.constraint;
                        customGrid.constraintCount = templateGrid.constraintCount;
                        customGrid.startCorner = templateGrid.startCorner;
                        customGrid.startAxis = templateGrid.startAxis;
                        customGrid.childAlignment = templateGrid.childAlignment;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // Default to horizontal layout
                        var defaultLayout = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                        defaultLayout.spacing = 10;
                        defaultLayout.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
                        defaultLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                        defaultLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                        defaultLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                        defaultLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                    }
                }
                
                // Add layout element to match guide container
                var templateLayoutElem = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
                if (templateLayoutElem != null)
                {
                    var customLayoutElem = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                    customLayoutElem.preferredHeight = templateLayoutElem.preferredHeight;
                    customLayoutElem.flexibleWidth = templateLayoutElem.flexibleWidth;
                }
                else
                {
                    var customLayoutElem = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                    customLayoutElem.preferredHeight = 50;
                    customLayoutElem.flexibleWidth = 1;
                }
                
                // Create Survival Manual button (clone from template)
                _survivalManualButton = CloneButton(templateButton.gameObject, "SurvivalManualButton", 
                    "Stationeers Survival Manual", OnSurvivalManualClick, templateText);
                _survivalManualButton.transform.SetParent(_customButtonContainer.transform, false);
                
                // Create Game Mechanics button (clone from template)
                _gameMechanicsButton = CloneButton(templateButton.gameObject, "GameMechanicsButton", 
                    "Game Mechanics", OnGameMechanicsClick, templateText);
                _gameMechanicsButton.transform.SetParent(_customButtonContainer.transform, false);
                
                _homePageModified = true;
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo("Home page custom buttons created successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogError($"Error initializing home page layout: {ex.Message}\n{ex.StackTrace}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Clone a button from template with custom text and click handler
        /// </summary>
        private static GameObject CloneButton(GameObject template, string name, string buttonText, 
            UnityEngine.Events.UnityAction onClick, TextMeshProUGUI textTemplate)
        {
            // Clone the entire button
            var clone = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(template);
            clone.name = name;
            
            // Update the text
            var text = clone.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            if (text != null)
            {
                text.text = buttonText;
                // Keep the same font, size, and style as the template
                if (textTemplate != null)
                {
                    text.font = textTemplate.font;
                    text.fontSize = textTemplate.fontSize;
                    text.fontStyle = textTemplate.fontStyle;
                }
            }
            
            // Replace the click handler
            var button = clone.GetComponent<Button>();
            if (button != null)
            {
                button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                button.onClick.AddListener(onClick);
            }
            
            return clone;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Click handler for Survival Manual button
        /// </summary>
        private static void OnSurvivalManualClick()
        {
            Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("SurvivalManual", true);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Click handler for Game Mechanics button
        /// </summary>
        private static void OnGameMechanicsClick()
        {
            Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("GameMechanics", true);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Modify the Guide/Lore contents layout
        /// NOTE: Disabled - vanilla layout works fine and modifications cause issues
        /// </summary>
        public static void ModifyGuideLoreLayout(RectTransform loreGuideContents)
        {
            // DISABLED: This was causing null reference exceptions because it modifies
            // the layout before all items are fully populated by vanilla code.
            // The vanilla horizontal layout works fine.
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Cleanup for hot-reload
        /// </summary>
        public static void Cleanup()
        {
            if (_survivalManualButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_survivalManualButton);
                _survivalManualButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_gameMechanicsButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_gameMechanicsButton);
                _gameMechanicsButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_customButtonContainer != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_customButtonContainer);
                _customButtonContainer = null;
            }
            
            _homePageModified = false;
        }
    }
}
