```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;

namespace StationpediaAscended.UI
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Manages modifications to the Stationpedia home page layout.
    /// Handles button sizing, two-column layouts, and custom button creation.
    /// </summary>
    public static class HomePageLayoutManager
    {
        // Track created elements for cleanup
        private static GameObject _survivalManualButton = null;
        private static GameObject _gameMechanicsButton = null;
        private static bool _homePageModified = false;
        
        // Color constants - darker Stationeers blue for Game Mechanics
        private static readonly Color GameMechanicsBlue = new Color(0.03f, 0.25f, 0.33f, 1f); // #083F53
        private static readonly Color GameMechanicsBlueHover = new Color(0.05f, 0.35f, 0.45f, 1f);
        private static readonly Color OrangeAccent = new Color(0.984f, 0.69f, 0.231f, 1f); // #FBB03B
        private static readonly Color OrangeAccentHover = new Color(1f, 0.75f, 0.35f, 1f);
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Initialize home page modifications - call when Stationpedia is found
        /// </summary>
        public static void Initialize()
        {
            if (_homePageModified) return;
            
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;
                
                // Create the Survival Manual wide button
                CreateSurvivalManualButton(stationpedia);
                
                // Create the Game Mechanics button
                CreateGameMechanicsButton(stationpedia);
                
                _homePageModified = true;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogError($"Error initializing home page layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Modify the Guide/Lore contents to use half-size buttons in two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void ModifyGuideLoreLayout(RectTransform loreGuideContents)
        {
            if (loreGuideContents == null) return;
            
            try
            {
                // Get or add GridLayoutGroup
                var gridLayout = loreGuideContents.GetComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                if (gridLayout == null)
                {
                    gridLayout = loreGuideContents.gameObject.AddComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                }
                
                // Get parent width to calculate cell size
                float parentWidth = loreGuideContents.rect.width;
                if (parentWidth <= 0) parentWidth = 400f; // fallback
                
                // Half the width minus spacing
                float cellWidth = (parentWidth - gridLayout.spacing.x - gridLayout.padding.left - gridLayout.padding.right) / 2f;
                cellWidth = Mathf.Max(cellWidth, 150f); // minimum width
                
                // Set to two columns
                gridLayout.constraint = GridLayoutGroup.Constraint.FixedColumnCount;
                gridLayout.constraintCount = 2;
                gridLayout.cellSize = new Vector2(cellWidth, 40f); // Half width, same height
                gridLayout.spacing = new Vector2(8f, 6f);
                gridLayout.childAlignment = TextAnchor.UpperLeft;
                gridLayout.startCorner = GridLayoutGroup.Corner.UpperLeft;
                gridLayout.startAxis = GridLayoutGroup.Axis.Horizontal;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning($"Error modifying guide layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Create the Survival Manual wide button at the top of home page
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateSurvivalManualButton(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            if (_survivalManualButton != null) return;
            
            var homePageContent = stationpedia.HomePageContent;
            if (homePageContent == null) return;
            
            // Find a reference button to copy styling from (Guide or Lore button)
            SPDAListItem referenceItem = null;
            try
            {
                referenceItem = stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab;
            }
            catch { }
            
            // Create button container
            _survivalManualButton = new GameObject("SurvivalManualButton");
            _survivalManualButton.transform.SetParent(homePageContent, false);
            _survivalManualButton.transform.SetAsFirstSibling(); // Put at top
            
            // Add RectTransform
            var rt = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rt.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rt.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            rt.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            rt.sizeDelta = new Vector2(-20, 50); // Full width with margin, taller button
            
            // Add LayoutElement for proper spacing
            var layoutElement = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            layoutElement.preferredHeight = 50;
            layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
            layoutElement.minHeight = 50;
            
            // Add background image
            var bgImage = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<Image>();
            var windowSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.GetWindowBackgroundSprite();
            if (windowSprite != null)
            {
                bgImage.sprite = windowSprite;
                bgImage.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            bgImage.color = OrangeAccent;
            
            // Add horizontal layout for icon + text
            var hlg = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.padding = new RectOffset(15, 15, 8, 8);
            hlg.spacing = 12;
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
            hlg.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            hlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            hlg.childControlWidth = true;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            
            // Add icon (book icon)
            var iconGO = new GameObject("Icon");
            iconGO.transform.SetParent(_survivalManualButton.transform, false);
            var iconImage = iconGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            var bookSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.LoadImageFromModFolder("Book-ClosedONE.png");
            if (bookSprite != null)
            {
                iconImage.sprite = bookSprite;
                iconImage.preserveAspect = true;
            }
            var iconLE = iconGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            iconLE.preferredWidth = 32;
            iconLE.preferredHeight = 32;
            
            // Add text
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(_survivalManualButton.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = "Stationeers Survival Manual";
            text.fontSize = 18;
            text.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            text.color = Color.white;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.MidlineLeft;
            text.enableWordWrapping = false;
            
            var textLE = textGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            textLE.flexibleWidth = 1;
            textLE.preferredHeight = 32;
            
            // Add Button component
            var button = _survivalManualButton.AddComponent<Button>();
            button.targetGraphic = bgImage;
            
            var colors = button.colors;
            colors.normalColor = OrangeAccent;
            colors.highlightedColor = OrangeAccentHover;
            colors.pressedColor = new Color(0.8f, 0.55f, 0.18f, 1f);
            colors.selectedColor = OrangeAccent;
            button.colors = colors;
            
            // Add click handler
            button.onClick.AddListener(() => {
                Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("SurvivalManual", true);
            });
            
            StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo("Survival Manual button created");
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Create the Game Mechanics button below Guides/Universe
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGameMechanicsButton(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            if (_gameMechanicsButton != null) return;
            
            var homePageContent = stationpedia.HomePageContent;
            if (homePageContent == null) return;
            
            // Create button container
            _gameMechanicsButton = new GameObject("GameMechanicsButton");
            _gameMechanicsButton.transform.SetParent(homePageContent, false);
            // Position after the category buttons (index 2 or 3)
            _gameMechanicsButton.transform.SetSiblingIndex(3);
            
            // Add RectTransform - centered, same size as Guide button
            var rt = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rt.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.25f, 1);
            rt.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.75f, 1);
            rt.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            rt.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 45);
            
            // Add LayoutElement
            var layoutElement = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            layoutElement.preferredHeight = 45;
            layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 0.5f;
            layoutElement.minHeight = 45;
            
            // Add background image
            var bgImage = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<Image>();
            var windowSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.GetWindowBackgroundSprite();
            if (windowSprite != null)
            {
                bgImage.sprite = windowSprite;
                bgImage.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            bgImage.color = GameMechanicsBlue;
            
            // Add horizontal layout for icon + text
            var hlg = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.padding = new RectOffset(12, 12, 6, 6);
            hlg.spacing = 10;
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
            hlg.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            hlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            hlg.childControlWidth = true;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            
            // Add phoenix icon
            var iconGO = new GameObject("PhoenixIcon");
            iconGO.transform.SetParent(_gameMechanicsButton.transform, false);
            var iconImage = iconGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            if (StationpediaAscendedMod._customIconSprite != null)
            {
                iconImage.sprite = StationpediaAscendedMod._customIconSprite;
                iconImage.preserveAspect = true;
            }
            var iconLE = iconGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            iconLE.preferredWidth = 28;
            iconLE.preferredHeight = 28;
            
            // Add text
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(_gameMechanicsButton.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = "Game Mechanics";
            text.fontSize = 16;
            text.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            text.color = Color.white;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.MidlineLeft;
            text.enableWordWrapping = false;
            
            var textLE = textGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            textLE.flexibleWidth = 1;
            textLE.preferredHeight = 28;
            
            // Add Button component
            var button = _gameMechanicsButton.AddComponent<Button>();
            button.targetGraphic = bgImage;
            
            var colors = button.colors;
            colors.normalColor = GameMechanicsBlue;
            colors.highlightedColor = GameMechanicsBlueHover;
            colors.pressedColor = new Color(0.02f, 0.18f, 0.25f, 1f);
            colors.selectedColor = GameMechanicsBlue;
            button.colors = colors;
            
            // Add click handler
            button.onClick.AddListener(() => {
                Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("GameMechanics", true);
            });
            
            StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo("Game Mechanics button created");
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Cleanup for hot-reload
        /// </summary>
        public static void Cleanup()
        {
            if (_survivalManualButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_survivalManualButton);
                _survivalManualButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_gameMechanicsButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_gameMechanicsButton);
                _gameMechanicsButton = null;
            }
            
            _homePageModified = false;
        }
    }
}

```
                TruncateLongPrefabName(__instance);
                
                // Add tooltips to Prefab Name and Prefab Hash for IC10 users
                AddPrefabTooltips(__instance);

                // Check for Survival Manual page - use special rendering (no Operational Details wrapper)
                if (pageKey == "SurvivalManual")
                {
                    RenderSurvivalManualPage(__instance, contentTransform);
                    return; // Don't continue to normal device processing
                }
                
                // Check if we have any custom data for this page in DeviceDatabase

        /// <summary>
        /// Render the Survival Manual page with Part 1/2/3 as major collapsible sections.
        /// Each Part has its own Table of Contents box, then nested sections.
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderSurvivalManualPage(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform)
        {
            // Clear TOC registry for new page
            TocLinkHandler.ClearRegistry();
            
            // Check for existing - destroy and recreate
            var existingManual = contentTransform.Find("SurvivalManualContent");
            if (existingManual != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingManual.gameObject);
            }

            var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
            if (stationpedia == null) return;
            
            var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
            if (categoryPrefab == null) return;
            
            var sourceText = page.PageDescription;
            if (sourceText == null) return;

            // Get the survival manual data
            var manualData = SurvivalManualLoader.GetSurvivalManualDescriptions();
            if (manualData?.operationalDetails == null || manualData.operationalDetails.Count == 0)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] No survival manual data found");
                return;
            }

            // Create a container for all manual content
            var containerGO = new GameObject("SurvivalManualContent");
            containerGO.transform.SetParent(contentTransform, false);
            containerGO.transform.SetSiblingIndex(20); // Position after standard content
            
            var containerRT = containerGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            containerRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            containerRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            containerRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            
            var containerLayout = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            containerLayout.spacing = 10;
            containerLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            containerLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            containerLayout.childControlWidth = true;
            containerLayout.childControlHeight = true;
            
            var containerFitter = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            containerFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
            containerFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;

            // Render each Part (Part 1, Part 2, Part 3) as a major collapsible section
            foreach (var partDetail in manualData.operationalDetails)
            {
                CreateSurvivalManualPart(containerRT, partDetail, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page);
            }
            
            // Force layout rebuild
            if (Stationpedia.Instance?.ContentRectTransform != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(Stationpedia.Instance.ContentRectTransform);
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a Part section (Part 1/2/3) with its own TOC box and nested sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateSurvivalManualPart(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail partDetail, 
            StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, UniversalPage page)
        {
            // Create the Part category (Part 1, Part 2, Part 3)
            var partCategory = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(categoryPrefab, parent);
            partCategory.gameObject.name = $"Part_{partDetail.tocId}";
            
            // Set Part title with color
            string titleColor = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode ? "#FFFFFF" : "#FF7A18";
            partCategory.Title.text = $"<color={titleColor}>{partDetail.title}</color>";
            
            // Apply custom icons
            ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(partCategory);
            
            // Configure the Part's contents layout
            ConfigureSurvivalManualPartLayout(partCategory);
            
            // Register for TOC navigation
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(partDetail.tocId))
            {
                TocLinkHandler.RegisterSection(partDetail.tocId, partCategory.GetComponent<RectTransform>(), partCategory, null);
            }

            // Create Table of Contents box FIRST within the Part
            if (partDetail.children != null && partDetail.children.Count > 0)
            {
                CreatePartTableOfContents(partCategory.Contents, partDetail, sourceText);
            }
            
            // Create nested sections within this Part
            if (partDetail.children != null)
            {
                foreach (var sectionDetail in partDetail.children)
                {
                    // Skip the first child if it's the TOC we already handled
                    if (sectionDetail.tocId?.EndsWith("_toc") == true) continue;
                    
                    CreateSurvivalManualSection(partCategory.Contents, sectionDetail, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page, partDetail.tocId);
                }
            }
            
            // Default to EXPANDED state for Parts (user requested they start open)
            partCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(true);
            if (partCategory.CollapseImage != null && partCategory.VisibleImage != null)
            {
                partCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = partCategory.VisibleImage;
            }
            
            var animator = partCategory.GetComponent<IconAnimator>();
            if (animator != null)
            {
                animator.Initialize(true); // Start expanded
            }
            
            page.CreatedCategories.Add(partCategory);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create the Table of Contents box for a Part
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreatePartTableOfContents(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail partDetail, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText)
        {
            // Create TOC container with background
            var tocContainerGO = new GameObject("TableOfContents");
            tocContainerGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            tocContainerGO.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();
            
            // Add background
            var tocBg = tocContainerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
            var windowSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.GetWindowBackgroundSprite();
            if (windowSprite != null)
            {
                tocBg.sprite = windowSprite;
                tocBg.type = UnityEngine.UI.Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            tocBg.color = new Color(0.3f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 0.15f);
            
            // Add layout
            var tocLayout = tocContainerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            tocLayout.padding = new RectOffset(16, 16, 12, 12);
            tocLayout.spacing = 8;
            tocLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            tocLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            tocLayout.childControlWidth = true;
            tocLayout.childControlHeight = true;
            
            var tocFitter = tocContainerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            tocFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
            tocFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            // Create centered title
            var titleGO = new GameObject("TOCTitle");
            titleGO.transform.SetParent(tocContainerGO.transform, false);
            var titleText = titleGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
            titleText.font = sourceText.font;
            titleText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
            titleText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize * 0.95f;
            titleText.color = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode ? Color.white : new Color(1f, 0.6f, 0.2f, 1f);
            titleText.text = "<b>Table Of Contents</b>";
            titleText.alignment = TMPro.TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
            titleText.enableWordWrapping = false;
            
            var titleFitter = titleGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            titleFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            // Create columns container
            var columnsGO = new GameObject("TOCColumns");
            columnsGO.transform.SetParent(tocContainerGO.transform, false);
            
            var columnsLayout = columnsGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            columnsLayout.spacing = 30;
            columnsLayout.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            columnsLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            columnsLayout.childControlWidth = true;
            columnsLayout.childControlHeight = true;
            columnsLayout.childAlignment = UnityEngine.TextAnchor.UpperCenter;
            
            var columnsFitter = columnsGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            columnsFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            columnsFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            // Add horizontal layout element to center it
            var columnsLE = columnsGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
            columnsLE.flexibleWidth = 1;

            // Collect TOC entries from children (sections within this Part)
            var tocEntries = new List<(string tocId, string title, int depth)>();
            if (partDetail.children != null)
            {
                foreach (var child in partDetail.children)
                {
                    // Skip TOC entries that we create
                    if (child.tocId?.EndsWith("_toc") == true) continue;
                    CollectTocEntriesFromSection(tocEntries, child, 0);
                }
            }

            // Calculate columns (max 8 items per column, up to 3 columns)
            const int MAX_ROWS = 8;
            int totalEntries = tocEntries.Count;
            int numColumns = Math.Min(3, (totalEntries + MAX_ROWS - 1) / MAX_ROWS);
            numColumns = Math.Max(1, numColumns);
            
            int entriesPerColumn = (totalEntries + numColumns - 1) / numColumns;
            
            // Create columns
            int entryIndex = 0;
            for (int col = 0; col < numColumns && entryIndex < totalEntries; col++)
            {
                var columnGO = new GameObject($"TOCColumn{col}");
                columnGO.transform.SetParent(columnsGO.transform, false);
                
                var columnText = columnGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                columnText.font = sourceText.font;
                columnText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
                columnText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize * 0.85f;
                columnText.color = sourceText.color;
                columnText.enableWordWrapping = false;
                columnText.richText = true;
                
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                int rowsInColumn = 0;
                
                while (entryIndex < totalEntries && rowsInColumn < entriesPerColumn)
                {
                    var entry = tocEntries[entryIndex];
                    string indent = entry.depth > 0 ? new string(' ', entry.depth * 2) : "";
                    string bullet = entry.depth > 0 ? "- " : "";
                    
                    // In vanilla mode: section titles are underlined and bolded
                    // In ascended mode: section titles get orange color
                    if (entry.depth == 0)
                    {
                        // Main section - underlined+bold in vanilla, orange in ascended
                        if (VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode)
                        {
                            sb.AppendLine($"<link=toc_{entry.tocId}><u><b><color=#FFFFFF>{entry.title}</color></b></u></link>");
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            sb.AppendLine($"<link=toc_{entry.tocId}><b><color=#FFA500>{entry.title}</color></b></link>");
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // Subsection
                        string bulletColor = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode ? "#888888" : "#CC6600";
                        sb.AppendLine($"{indent}<color={bulletColor}>{bullet}</color><link=toc_{entry.tocId}><color=#FFFFFF>{entry.title}</color></link>");
                    }
                    
                    entryIndex++;
                    rowsInColumn++;
                }
                
                columnText.text = sb.ToString().TrimEnd();
                
                var colFitter = columnGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                colFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                colFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Add click handler
                var linkHandler = columnGO.AddComponent<TocLinkHandler>();
                linkHandler.TextComponent = columnText;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Collect TOC entries from a section and its children
        /// </summary>
        private static void CollectTocEntriesFromSection(List<(string tocId, string title, int depth)> entries, 
            OperationalDetail detail, int depth)
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.tocId) && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.title))
            {
                entries.Add((detail.tocId, detail.title, depth));
            }
            
            if (detail.children != null)
            {
                foreach (var child in detail.children)
                {
                    CollectTocEntriesFromSection(entries, child, depth + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a nested section within a Part
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateSurvivalManualSection(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail sectionDetail,
            StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, UniversalPage page, string parentTocId)
        {
            if (!sectionDetail.collapsible || string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.title))
            {
                // Non-collapsible content - render as inline text
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.description))
                {
                    CreateTextElement(parent, sourceText, sectionDetail.description);
                }
                return;
            }
            
            // Create collapsible section
            var sectionCategory = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(categoryPrefab, parent);
            sectionCategory.gameObject.name = $"Section_{sectionDetail.tocId}";
            
            // Set title
            string titleColor = VanillaModeManager.GetTitleColor(1); // Depth 1 for sections
            sectionCategory.Title.text = $"<color={titleColor}>{sectionDetail.title}</color>";
            
            ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(sectionCategory);
            ConfigureNestedCategoryLayout(sectionCategory, sectionDetail, 0);
            
            // Register for TOC
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.tocId))
            {
                TocLinkHandler.RegisterSection(sectionDetail.tocId, sectionCategory.GetComponent<RectTransform>(), sectionCategory, parentTocId);
            }
            
            // Add description
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.description))
            {
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sectionDetail.description);
            }
            
            // Add bullet items
            if (sectionDetail.items != null && sectionDetail.items.Count > 0)
            {
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                foreach (var item in sectionDetail.items)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  • {item}");
                }
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
            }
            
            // Add steps
            if (sectionDetail.steps != null && sectionDetail.steps.Count > 0)
            {
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                int stepNum = 1;
                string stepColor = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode ? "#FFFFFF" : "#FFA500";
                foreach (var step in sectionDetail.steps)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  <color={stepColor}>{stepNum}.</color> {step}");
                    stepNum++;
                }
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
            }
            
            // Add children (subsections)
            if (sectionDetail.children != null)
            {
                foreach (var child in sectionDetail.children)
                {
                    CreateSurvivalManualSection(sectionCategory.Contents, child, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page, sectionDetail.tocId);
                }
            }
            
            // Default to collapsed
            sectionCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false);
            if (sectionCategory.CollapseImage != null && sectionCategory.NotVisibleImage != null)
            {
                sectionCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = sectionCategory.NotVisibleImage;
            }
            
            var animator = sectionCategory.GetComponent<IconAnimator>();
            if (animator != null)
            {
                animator.Initialize(false);
            }
            
            page.CreatedCategories.Add(sectionCategory);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Configure layout for Survival Manual Part sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void ConfigureSurvivalManualPartLayout(StationpediaCategory category)
        {
            // Remove GridLayoutGroup if present
            var existingGridLayout = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.GridLayoutGroup>();
            if (existingGridLayout != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingGridLayout);
            }
            
            // Add background
            var bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
            if (bgImage == null)
            {
                bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
            }
            
            if (VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode)
            {
                // Use cached native sprite if available
                if (_nativePanelSprite != null)
                {
                    bgImage.sprite = _nativePanelSprite;
                    bgImage.type = _nativePanelType;
                    bgImage.material = _nativePanelMaterial;
                }
                bgImage.color = Color.white;
            }
            else
            {
                var windowSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.GetWindowBackgroundSprite();
                if (windowSprite != null)
                {
                    bgImage.sprite = windowSprite;
                    bgImage.type = UnityEngine.UI.Image.Type.Sliced;
                    bgImage.material = null;
                }
                bgImage.color = StationeersBlue;
            }
            
            // Add VerticalLayoutGroup
            var layout = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            if (layout == null)
            {
                layout = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            }
            layout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            layout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            layout.childControlWidth = true;
            layout.childControlHeight = true;
            layout.spacing = 10;
            layout.padding = new RectOffset(12, 12, 12, 12);
            
            // Add ContentSizeFitter
            var fitter = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            if (fitter == null)
            {
                fitter = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            }
            fitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            fitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
        }

        private static void CreateOperationalDetailsCategory(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform, DeviceDescriptions deviceDesc)

using System;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;

namespace StationpediaAscended.UI
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Manages modifications to the Stationpedia home page layout.
    /// Creates Survival Manual and Game Mechanics buttons styled like the Guides/Universe buttons.
    /// </summary>
    public static class HomePageLayoutManager
    {
        // Track created elements for cleanup
        private static GameObject _customButtonContainer = null;
        private static GameObject _survivalManualButton = null;
        private static GameObject _gameMechanicsButton = null;
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Initialize home page modifications - call when Stationpedia is found
        /// </summary>
        public static void Initialize()
        {
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;
                
                // Find the _homeGuideButtonContainer through reflection (it's private)
                var guideContainerField = typeof(Stationpedia).GetField("_homeGuideButtonContainer", 
                    BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance);
                if (guideContainerField == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find _homeGuideButtonContainer field");
                    return;
                }
                
                var guideButtonContainer = guideContainerField.GetValue(stationpedia) as GameObject;
                if (guideButtonContainer == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("_homeGuideButtonContainer is null");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Get the parent of the guide button container
                var containerParent = guideButtonContainer.transform.parent;
                if (containerParent == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Guide button container has no parent");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Check if our custom container already exists - find and destroy duplicates
                CleanupExistingButtons(containerParent, stationpedia.HomePageContent);
                
                // Find the first button child in the guide container to use as template
                Button templateButton = null;
                TextMeshProUGUI templateText = null;
                
                foreach (Transform child in guideButtonContainer.transform)
                {
                    var btn = child.GetComponent<Button>();
                    if (btn != null)
                    {
                        templateButton = btn;
                        templateText = child.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                if (templateButton == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find template button in guide container");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Create our custom button container - clone the structure of guideButtonContainer
                _customButtonContainer = new GameObject("CustomButtonContainer_SPA");
                _customButtonContainer.transform.SetParent(containerParent, false);
                
                // Position it BEFORE the guide container
                int guideIndex = guideButtonContainer.transform.GetSiblingIndex();
                _customButtonContainer.transform.SetSiblingIndex(guideIndex);
                
                // Copy the RectTransform from guide container
                var templateRect = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
                var customRect = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                customRect.anchorMin = templateRect.anchorMin;
                customRect.anchorMax = templateRect.anchorMax;
                customRect.pivot = templateRect.pivot;
                customRect.sizeDelta = templateRect.sizeDelta;
                customRect.anchoredPosition = templateRect.anchoredPosition;
                
                // Copy the layout group from guide container
                var templateLayout = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                if (templateLayout != null)
                {
                    var customLayout = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                    customLayout.spacing = templateLayout.spacing;
                    customLayout.padding = templateLayout.padding;
                    customLayout.childAlignment = templateLayout.childAlignment;
                    customLayout.childControlWidth = templateLayout.childControlWidth;
                    customLayout.childControlHeight = templateLayout.childControlHeight;
                    customLayout.childForceExpandWidth = templateLayout.childForceExpandWidth;
                    customLayout.childForceExpandHeight = templateLayout.childForceExpandHeight;
                }
                else
                {
                    // Default to horizontal layout matching guide buttons
                    var defaultLayout = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                    defaultLayout.spacing = 10;
                    defaultLayout.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
                    defaultLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                    defaultLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                    defaultLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                    defaultLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                }
                
                // Add layout element to match guide container
                var templateLayoutElem = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
                if (templateLayoutElem != null)
                {
                    var customLayoutElem = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                    customLayoutElem.preferredHeight = templateLayoutElem.preferredHeight;
                    customLayoutElem.flexibleWidth = templateLayoutElem.flexibleWidth;
                }
                else
                {
                    var customLayoutElem = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                    customLayoutElem.preferredHeight = 50;
                    customLayoutElem.flexibleWidth = 1;
                }
                
                // Create Survival Manual button (clone from template)
                _survivalManualButton = CloneButton(templateButton.gameObject, "SurvivalManualButton_SPA", 
                    "Stationeers Survival Manual", OnSurvivalManualClick, templateText);
                _survivalManualButton.transform.SetParent(_customButtonContainer.transform, false);
                
                // Create Game Mechanics button (clone from template)
                _gameMechanicsButton = CloneButton(templateButton.gameObject, "GameMechanicsButton_SPA", 
                    "Game Mechanics", OnGameMechanicsClick, templateText);
                _gameMechanicsButton.transform.SetParent(_customButtonContainer.transform, false);
                
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo("Home page custom buttons created successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogError($"Error initializing home page layout: {ex.Message}\n{ex.StackTrace}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Cleanup any existing custom buttons to prevent duplicates
        /// </summary>
        private static void CleanupExistingButtons(Transform guideParent, Transform homePageContent)
        {
            // Find and destroy any existing custom containers in guide button area
            var toDestroy = new System.Collections.Generic.List<GameObject>();
            
            if (guideParent != null)
            {
                foreach (Transform child in guideParent)
                {
                    if (child.name.Contains("CustomButtonContainer"))
                    {
                        toDestroy.Add(child.gameObject);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Also clean up old-style buttons that were added to HomePageContent
            if (homePageContent != null)
            {
                foreach (Transform child in homePageContent)
                {
                    string name = child.name;
                    if (name == "SurvivalManualButton" || name == "GameMechanicsButton" ||
                        name.Contains("SurvivalManual") || name.Contains("GameMechanics"))
                    {
                        // Only remove if it's one of our custom buttons (not a vanilla category button)
                        var btn = child.GetComponent<Button>();
                        if (btn != null)
                        {
                            // Check if this has our custom text
                            var text = child.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
                            if (text != null && (text.text.Contains("Survival Manual") || text.text.Contains("Game Mechanics")))
                            {
                                toDestroy.Add(child.gameObject);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Destroy all found duplicates
            foreach (var go in toDestroy)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo($"Removing duplicate button: {go.name}");
                UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(go);
            }
            
            // Clear our references if they were destroyed
            _customButtonContainer = null;
            _survivalManualButton = null;
            _gameMechanicsButton = null;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Clone a button from template with custom text and click handler
        /// </summary>
        private static GameObject CloneButton(GameObject template, string name, string buttonText, 
            UnityEngine.Events.UnityAction onClick, TextMeshProUGUI textTemplate)
        {
            // Clone the entire button
            var clone = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(template);
            clone.name = name;
            
            // Update the text
            var text = clone.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            if (text != null)
            {
                text.text = buttonText;
                // Keep the same font, size, and style as the template
                if (textTemplate != null)
                {
                    text.font = textTemplate.font;
                    text.fontSize = textTemplate.fontSize;
                    text.fontStyle = textTemplate.fontStyle;
                }
            }
            
            // Replace the click handler
            var button = clone.GetComponent<Button>();
            if (button != null)
            {
                button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                button.onClick.AddListener(onClick);
            }
            
            return clone;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Click handler for Survival Manual button
        /// </summary>
        private static void OnSurvivalManualClick()
        {
            Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("SurvivalManual", true);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Click handler for Game Mechanics button
        /// </summary>
        private static void OnGameMechanicsClick()
        {
            Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("GameMechanics", true);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Modify the Guide/Lore contents layout
        /// NOTE: Disabled - vanilla layout works fine and modifications cause issues
        /// </summary>
        public static void ModifyGuideLoreLayout(RectTransform loreGuideContents)
        {
            // DISABLED: This was causing null reference exceptions because it modifies
            // the layout before all items are fully populated by vanilla code.
            // The vanilla horizontal layout works fine.
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Cleanup for hot-reload
        /// </summary>
        public static void Cleanup()
        {
            if (_survivalManualButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_survivalManualButton);
                _survivalManualButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_gameMechanicsButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_gameMechanicsButton);
                _gameMechanicsButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_customButtonContainer != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_customButtonContainer);
                _customButtonContainer = null;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

- oldString:

```
using System;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;

namespace StationpediaAscended.UI
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Manages modifications to the Stationpedia home page layout.
    /// Creates Survival Manual and Game Mechanics buttons styled like the Guides/Universe buttons.
    /// </summary>
    public static class HomePageLayoutManager
    {
        // Track created elements for cleanup
        private static GameObject _customButtonContainer = null;
        private static GameObject _survivalManualButton = null;
        private static GameObject _gameMechanicsButton = null;
        private static bool _homePageModified = false;
        
        // Color constants matching vanilla Stationpedia style
        private static readonly Color VanillaButtonColor = new Color(0.15f, 0.22f, 0.32f, 1f);  // Dark blue-grey
        private static readonly Color VanillaButtonHover = new Color(0.2f, 0.3f, 0.42f, 1f);
        private static readonly Color OrangeAccent = new Color(0.984f, 0.69f, 0.231f, 1f); // #FBB03B for text
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Initialize home page modifications - call when Stationpedia is found
        /// </summary>
        public static void Initialize()
        {
            if (_homePageModified) return;
            
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;
                
                // Find the _homeGuideButtonContainer through reflection (it's private)
                var guideContainerField = typeof(Stationpedia).GetField("_homeGuideButtonContainer", 
                    BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance);
                if (guideContainerField == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find _homeGuideButtonContainer field");
                    return;
                }
                
                var guideButtonContainer = guideContainerField.GetValue(stationpedia) as GameObject;
                if (guideButtonContainer == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("_homeGuideButtonContainer is null");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Get the parent of the guide button container
                var containerParent = guideButtonContainer.transform.parent;
                if (containerParent == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Guide button container has no parent");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Find the first button child in the guide container to use as template
                Button templateButton = null;
                TextMeshProUGUI templateText = null;
                
                foreach (Transform child in guideButtonContainer.transform)
                {
                    var btn = child.GetComponent<Button>();
                    if (btn != null)
                    {
                        templateButton = btn;
                        templateText = child.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                if (templateButton == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find template button in guide container");
                    return;
                }
                
                // Create our custom button container - clone the structure of guideButtonContainer
                _customButtonContainer = new GameObject("CustomButtonContainer");
                _customButtonContainer.transform.SetParent(containerParent, false);
                
                // Position it BEFORE the guide container
                int guideIndex = guideButtonContainer.transform.GetSiblingIndex();
                _customButtonContainer.transform.SetSiblingIndex(guideIndex);
                
                // Copy the RectTransform from guide container
                var templateRect = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
                var customRect = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                customRect.anchorMin = templateRect.anchorMin;
                customRect.anchorMax = templateRect.anchorMax;
                customRect.pivot = templateRect.pivot;
                customRect.sizeDelta = templateRect.sizeDelta;
                customRect.anchoredPosition = templateRect.anchoredPosition;
                
                // Copy the layout group from guide container
                var templateLayout = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                if (templateLayout != null)
                {
                    var customLayout = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                    customLayout.spacing = templateLayout.spacing;
                    customLayout.padding = templateLayout.padding;
                    customLayout.childAlignment = templateLayout.childAlignment;
                    customLayout.childControlWidth = templateLayout.childControlWidth;
                    customLayout.childControlHeight = templateLayout.childControlHeight;
                    customLayout.childForceExpandWidth = templateLayout.childForceExpandWidth;
                    customLayout.childForceExpandHeight = templateLayout.childForceExpandHeight;
                }
                else
                {
                    // If no horizontal layout, check for grid
                    var templateGrid = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                    if (templateGrid != null)
                    {
                        var customGrid = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
                        customGrid.cellSize = templateGrid.cellSize;
                        customGrid.spacing = templateGrid.spacing;
                        customGrid.constraint = templateGrid.constraint;
                        customGrid.constraintCount = templateGrid.constraintCount;
                        customGrid.startCorner = templateGrid.startCorner;
                        customGrid.startAxis = templateGrid.startAxis;
                        customGrid.childAlignment = templateGrid.childAlignment;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // Default to horizontal layout
                        var defaultLayout = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                        defaultLayout.spacing = 10;
                        defaultLayout.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
                        defaultLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                        defaultLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                        defaultLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                        defaultLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                    }
                }
                
                // Add layout element to match guide container
                var templateLayoutElem = guideButtonContainer.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
                if (templateLayoutElem != null)
                {
                    var customLayoutElem = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                    customLayoutElem.preferredHeight = templateLayoutElem.preferredHeight;
                    customLayoutElem.flexibleWidth = templateLayoutElem.flexibleWidth;
                }
                else
                {
                    var customLayoutElem = _customButtonContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                    customLayoutElem.preferredHeight = 50;
                    customLayoutElem.flexibleWidth = 1;
                }
                
                // Create Survival Manual button (clone from template)
                _survivalManualButton = CloneButton(templateButton.gameObject, "SurvivalManualButton", 
                    "Stationeers Survival Manual", OnSurvivalManualClick, templateText);
                _survivalManualButton.transform.SetParent(_customButtonContainer.transform, false);
                
                // Create Game Mechanics button (clone from template)
                _gameMechanicsButton = CloneButton(templateButton.gameObject, "GameMechanicsButton", 
                    "Game Mechanics", OnGameMechanicsClick, templateText);
                _gameMechanicsButton.transform.SetParent(_customButtonContainer.transform, false);
                
                _homePageModified = true;
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogInfo("Home page custom buttons created successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogError($"Error initializing home page layout: {ex.Message}\n{ex.StackTrace}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Clone a button from template with custom text and click handler
        /// </summary>
        private static GameObject CloneButton(GameObject template, string name, string buttonText, 
            UnityEngine.Events.UnityAction onClick, TextMeshProUGUI textTemplate)
        {
            // Clone the entire button
            var clone = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(template);
            clone.name = name;
            
            // Update the text
            var text = clone.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            if (text != null)
            {
                text.text = buttonText;
                // Keep the same font, size, and style as the template
                if (textTemplate != null)
                {
                    text.font = textTemplate.font;
                    text.fontSize = textTemplate.fontSize;
                    text.fontStyle = textTemplate.fontStyle;
                }
            }
            
            // Replace the click handler
            var button = clone.GetComponent<Button>();
            if (button != null)
            {
                button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                button.onClick.AddListener(onClick);
            }
            
            return clone;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Click handler for Survival Manual button
        /// </summary>
        private static void OnSurvivalManualClick()
        {
            Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("SurvivalManual", true);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Click handler for Game Mechanics button
        /// </summary>
        private static void OnGameMechanicsClick()
        {
            Stationpedia.Instance?.SetPage("GameMechanics", true);
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Modify the Guide/Lore contents layout
        /// NOTE: Disabled - vanilla layout works fine and modifications cause issues
        /// </summary>
        public static void ModifyGuideLoreLayout(RectTransform loreGuideContents)
        {
            // DISABLED: This was causing null reference exceptions because it modifies
            // the layout before all items are fully populated by vanilla code.
            // The vanilla horizontal layout works fine.
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Cleanup for hot-reload
        /// </summary>
        public static void Cleanup()
        {
            if (_survivalManualButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_survivalManualButton);
                _survivalManualButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_gameMechanicsButton != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_gameMechanicsButton);
                _gameMechanicsButton = null;
            }
            
            if (_customButtonContainer != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_customButtonContainer);
                _customButtonContainer = null;
            }
            
            _homePageModified = false;
        }
    }
}

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Render the Survival Manual page with Part 1/2/3 as major collapsible sections.
        /// Each Part has its own Table of Contents box, then nested sections.
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderSurvivalManualPage(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform)
        {
            // Clear TOC registry for new page
            TocLinkHandler.ClearRegistry();
            
            // Check for existing - destroy and recreate
            var existingManual = contentTransform.Find("SurvivalManualContent");
            if (existingManual != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingManual.gameObject);
            }

            var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
            if (stationpedia == null) return;
            
            var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
            if (categoryPrefab == null) return;
            
            var sourceText = page.PageDescription;
            if (sourceText == null) return;
            
            // Cache native panel sprite if not already cached (for vanilla mode backgrounds)
            if (_nativePanelSprite == null)
            {
                var sourceImage = page.LogicSlotContents?.Contents?.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
                if (sourceImage != null)
                {
                    _nativePanelSprite = sourceImage.sprite;
                    _nativePanelMaterial = sourceImage.material;
                    _nativePanelType = sourceImage.type;
                }
            }
```

- oldString:

            TocLinkHandler.ClearRegistry();
            
            // Check for existing - destroy and recreate

- newString:

```
            // Create columns
            int entryIndex = 0;
            for (int col = 0; col < numColumns && entryIndex < totalEntries; col++)
            {
                var columnGO = new GameObject($"TOCColumn{col}");
                columnGO.transform.SetParent(columnsGO.transform, false);
                
                var columnText = columnGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                columnText.font = sourceText.font;
                columnText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
                columnText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize * 0.8f;  // Slightly smaller for better fit
                columnText.color = sourceText.color;
                columnText.enableWordWrapping = true;  // Enable word wrapping to prevent overflow
                columnText.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;  // Truncate with ellipsis if needed
                columnText.richText = true;
                
                // Add LayoutElement for better column width control
                var columnLE = columnGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                columnLE.preferredWidth = 200;  // Fixed column width
                columnLE.flexibleWidth = 0;
                
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                int rowsInColumn = 0;
                
                while (entryIndex < totalEntries && rowsInColumn < entriesPerColumn)
                {
                    var entry = tocEntries[entryIndex];
                    string indent = entry.depth > 0 ? "  " : "";  // Smaller indent for better fit
                    string bullet = entry.depth > 0 ? "• " : "";
                    
                    // In vanilla mode: section titles are underlined and bolded
                    // In ascended mode: section titles get orange color
                    if (entry.depth == 0)
                    {
                        // Main section - underlined+bold in vanilla, orange in ascended
                        if (VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode)
                        {
                            sb.AppendLine($"<link=toc_{entry.tocId}><u><b><color=#FFFFFF>{entry.title}</color></b></u></link>");
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            sb.AppendLine($"<link=toc_{entry.tocId}><b><color=#FFA500>{entry.title}</color></b></link>");
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // Subsection
                        string bulletColor = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode ? "#888888" : "#CC6600";
                        sb.AppendLine($"{indent}<color={bulletColor}>{bullet}</color><link=toc_{entry.tocId}><color=#FFFFFF>{entry.title}</color></link>");
                    }
                    
                    entryIndex++;
                    rowsInColumn++;
                }
                
                columnText.text = sb.ToString().TrimEnd();
                
                var colFitter = columnGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                colFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;  // Use LayoutElement width
                colFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Add click handler
                var linkHandler = columnGO.AddComponent<TocLinkHandler>();
                linkHandler.TextComponent = columnText;
            }
```

                // Check if our custom container already exists - find and destroy duplicates
                CleanupExistingButtons(containerParent, stationpedia.HomePageContent);
                
                // Find the buttons in the guide container
                // There should be two buttons: Guides (orange) and Universe/Lore (blue)
                Button guideButton = null;      // Orange button - for Survival Manual
                Button universeButton = null;   // Blue button - for Game Mechanics
                TextMeshProUGUI guideText = null;
                TextMeshProUGUI universeText = null;
                
                foreach (Transform child in guideButtonContainer.transform)
                {
                    var btn = child.GetComponent<Button>();
                    if (btn != null)
                    {
                        var btnText = child.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
                        // First button found becomes guideButton (Guides - orange)
                        // Second button found becomes universeButton (Universe/Lore - blue)
                        if (guideButton == null)
                        {
                            guideButton = btn;
                            guideText = btnText;
                        }
                        else if (universeButton == null)
                        {
                            universeButton = btn;
                            universeText = btnText;
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                if (guideButton == null)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogWarning("Could not find Guide button in guide container");
                    return;
                }
                
                // If no second button found, use the first one for both
                if (universeButton == null)
                {
                    universeButton = guideButton;
                    universeText = guideText;
                }

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user has identified several issues:

1. **White backgrounds on Survival Manual sections** - The backgrounds are white instead of the dark Stationeers blue. This is likely because `_nativePanelSprite` is null when rendering the Survival Manual, so it's falling back to something that renders white.

2. **Buttons squished and both orange** - The cloned buttons are copying the orange Guide button style. We need to make Game Mechanics use the blue Universe style instead.

3. **Table of Contents text bleeding over** - The TOC columns need better text handling - either word wrap, smaller font, or text truncation.

Let me fix these issues:

1. For backgrounds - need to check how `ConfigureSurvivalManualPartLayout` and `ConfigureNestedCategoryLayout` are setting backgrounds. The issue is likely that `_nativePanelSprite` is not cached yet when Survival Manual renders.

2. For buttons - need to find both buttons in the guide container (Guides = orange, Universe = blue) and use the correct template for each.

3. For TOC - need to enable word wrapping or use text overflow handling.

Let me look at the code and fix these issues.

---

_**User (2026-01-10 06:48:34Z)**_

3. For some reason after I click the game mechanics button when I click any of the other buttons I get this error below and no matter what button I click up there I get sent to the game mechanics page. That is a bug for sure.

```
[map[explanation:Fix button cloning to enable text wrapping and set explicit height matching template filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\UI\HomePageLayoutManager.cs newString:        /// <summary>
        /// Clone a button from template with custom text and click handler
        /// </summary>
        private static GameObject CloneButton(GameObject template, string name, string buttonText, 
            UnityEngine.Events.UnityAction onClick, TextMeshProUGUI textTemplate)
        {
            // Clone the entire button
            var clone = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(template);
            clone.name = name;
            
            // Update the text
            var text = clone.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            if (text != null)
            {
                text.text = buttonText;
                // Enable word wrapping and center alignment for long text
                text.enableWordWrapping = true;
                text.alignment = TMPro.TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
                text.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Truncate;
                
                // Keep the same font, size, and style as the template
                if (textTemplate != null)
                {
                    text.font = textTemplate.font;
                    text.fontSize = textTemplate.fontSize;
                    text.fontStyle = textTemplate.fontStyle;
                }
            }
            
            // Replace the click handler - completely replace the Button component's onClick
            var button = clone.GetComponent<Button>();
            if (button != null)
            {
                // Clear ALL persistent and runtime listeners
                button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                button.onClick.AddListener(onClick);
                
                // Clear navigation to prevent button linking issues
                var nav = button.navigation;
                nav.mode = Navigation.Mode.None;
                button.navigation = nav;
            }
            
            // Ensure RectTransform matches template exactly
            var templateRect = template.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            var cloneRect = clone.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            if (templateRect != null && cloneRect != null)
            {
                // Copy all RectTransform properties
                cloneRect.anchorMin = templateRect.anchorMin;
                cloneRect.anchorMax = templateRect.anchorMax;
                cloneRect.pivot = templateRect.pivot;
                cloneRect.sizeDelta = templateRect.sizeDelta;
                cloneRect.anchoredPosition = templateRect.anchoredPosition;
            }
            
            // Copy the LayoutElement from template to ensure proper sizing
            var templateLE = template.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
            var cloneLE = clone.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
            if (templateLE != null)
            {
                if (cloneLE == null)
                {
                    cloneLE = clone.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                }
                cloneLE.minWidth = templateLE.minWidth;
                cloneLE.minHeight = templateLE.minHeight;
                cloneLE.preferredWidth = templateLE.preferredWidth;
                cloneLE.preferredHeight = templateLE.preferredHeight;
                cloneLE.flexibleWidth = templateLE.flexibleWidth;
                cloneLE.flexibleHeight = templateLE.flexibleHeight;
                cloneLE.layoutPriority = templateLE.layoutPriority;
            }
            else
            {
                // No LayoutElement on template - add one with sensible defaults
                if (cloneLE == null)
                {
                    cloneLE = clone.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                }
                cloneLE.flexibleWidth = 1;
                cloneLE.preferredHeight = 60; // Match typical button height
            }
            
            return clone;
        } oldString:        /// <summary>
        /// Clone a button from template with custom text and click handler
        /// </summary>
        private static GameObject CloneButton(GameObject template, string name, string buttonText, 
            UnityEngine.Events.UnityAction onClick, TextMeshProUGUI textTemplate)
        {
            // Clone the entire button
            var clone = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(template);
            clone.name = name;
            
            // Update the text
            var text = clone.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            if (text != null)
            {
                text.text = buttonText;
                // Keep the same font, size, and style as the template
                if (textTemplate != null)
                {
                    text.font = textTemplate.font;
                    text.fontSize = textTemplate.fontSize;
                    text.fontStyle = textTemplate.fontStyle;
                }
            }
            
            // Replace the click handler - completely replace the Button component's onClick
            var button = clone.GetComponent<Button>();
            if (button != null)
            {
                // Clear ALL persistent and runtime listeners
                button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                button.onClick.AddListener(onClick);
                
                // Clear navigation to prevent button linking issues
                var nav = button.navigation;
                nav.mode = Navigation.Mode.None;
                button.navigation = nav;
            }
            
            // Copy the LayoutElement from template to ensure proper sizing
            var templateLE = template.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
            var cloneLE = clone.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
            if (templateLE != null)
            {
                if (cloneLE == null)
                {
                    cloneLE = clone.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
                }
                cloneLE.minWidth = templateLE.minWidth;
                cloneLE.minHeight = templateLE.minHeight;
                cloneLE.preferredWidth = templateLE.preferredWidth;
                cloneLE.preferredHeight = templateLE.preferredHeight;
                cloneLE.flexibleWidth = templateLE.flexibleWidth;
                cloneLE.flexibleHeight = templateLE.flexibleHeight;
            }
            
            // Ensure RectTransform matches template
            var templateRect = template.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            var cloneRect = clone.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            if (templateRect != null && cloneRect != null)
            {
                cloneRect.sizeDelta = templateRect.sizeDelta;
            }
            
            return clone;
        }] map[explanation:Fix SetPageGameMechanics to properly add to page history filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\Harmony\Patches.cs newString:        /// <summary>
        /// Handle the Game Mechanics listing page
        /// </summary>
        private static void SetPageGameMechanics(Stationpedia stationpedia, bool newPage)
        {
            // Update history properly - mirror vanilla behavior
            if (newPage && Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey != "GameMechanics")
            {
                // Access private fields via reflection
                var historyField = typeof(Stationpedia).GetField("_pageHistory", 
                    System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Static);
                var indexField = typeof(Stationpedia).GetField("_currentHistoryIndex", 
                    System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                
                if (historyField != null && indexField != null)
                {
                    var history = historyField.GetValue(null) as System.Collections.Generic.List<string>;
                    int currentIndex = (int)indexField.GetValue(stationpedia);
                    
                    if (history != null)
                    {
                        // Remove any forward history
                        if (currentIndex < history.Count - 1)
                        {
                            int count = history.Count - 1 - currentIndex;
                            history.RemoveRange(currentIndex + 1, count);
                        }
                        // Add to history
                        history.Add("GameMechanics");
                        indexField.SetValue(stationpedia, history.Count - 1);
                    }
                }
                
                Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey = "GameMechanics";
            } oldString:        /// <summary>
        /// Handle the Game Mechanics listing page
        /// </summary>
        private static void SetPageGameMechanics(Stationpedia stationpedia, bool newPage)
        {
            // Update history if needed
            if (newPage && Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey != "GameMechanics")
            {
                // Add to history (simplified)
                Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey = "GameMechanics";
            }]]
