import React, { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import Fuse from 'fuse.js';
import type { LinkTarget } from '@types/stationpedia';

interface LinkPickerModalProps {
  targets: LinkTarget[];
  onSelect: (target: LinkTarget) => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export const LinkPickerModal: React.FC<LinkPickerModalProps> = ({
  targets,
  onSelect,
  onClose,
}) => {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');

  const fuse = useMemo(() => {
    return new Fuse(targets, {
      keys: ['key', 'displayName'],
      threshold: 0.3,
      ignoreLocation: true,
    });
  }, [targets]);

  const filteredTargets = useMemo(() => {
    if (!searchQuery.trim()) {
      return targets.slice(0, 50); // Show first 50 when no search
    }
    return fuse.search(searchQuery).map(result => result.item).slice(0, 50);
  }, [searchQuery, fuse, targets]);

  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      onClose();
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50"
      onClick={onClose}
      onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
    >
      <div
        className="bg-stationpedia-surface border border-stationpedia-border rounded-lg shadow-xl w-[500px] max-h-[600px] flex flex-col"
        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
      >
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-stationpedia-border">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-stationpedia-text mb-3">
            Insert Stationpedia Link
          </h2>
          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Search pages..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            autoFocus
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-stationpedia-bg border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-stationpedia-text placeholder-stationpedia-text-muted focus:outline-none focus:border-stationpedia-accent"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Results */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
          {filteredTargets.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="p-4 text-stationpedia-text-muted text-center">
              No pages found
            </div>
          ) : (
            <ul className="divide-y divide-stationpedia-border">
              {filteredTargets.map((target) => (
                <li key={target.key}>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => onSelect(target)}
                    className="w-full text-left px-4 py-3 hover:bg-stationpedia-border transition-colors"
                  >
                    <div className="font-medium text-stationpedia-text">
                      {target.displayName}
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-stationpedia-text-muted flex items-center gap-2">
                      <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-stationpedia-bg rounded text-stationpedia-accent">
                        {target.type}
                      </span>
                      <span>{target.key}</span>
                    </div>
                  </button>
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-stationpedia-border flex justify-end gap-2">
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            className="px-4 py-2 bg-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text rounded hover:bg-stationpedia-border/80 transition-colors"
          >
            Cancel
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```

```
import React, { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import type { DeviceDescription, ContentType } from '@types/stationpedia';
import { indexer } from '@services/indexer';
import { fileService } from '@services/fileService';
import { useStore } from '@store/index';

interface SidebarProps {
  devices: DeviceDescription[];
  selectedDevice: DeviceDescription | null;
  onSelectDevice: (device: DeviceDescription) => void;
}

type FilterType = 'all' | 'device' | 'guide' | 'mechanic' | 'has-errors' | 'unreviewed';

export const Sidebar: React.FC<SidebarProps> = ({
  devices,
  selectedDevice,
  onSelectDevice,
}) => {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState<FilterType>('all');
  const [isCollapsed, setIsCollapsed] = useState(false);
  const { 
    workspacePath, 
    setWorkspacePath, 
    setLoading, 
    setDevices, 
    setAllContent,
    setError,
    guides,
    mechanics,
    validationErrors,
  } = useStore();

  // Combine all content for searching
  const allItems = useMemo(() => {
    const items: Array<DeviceDescription & { _type: ContentType }> = [
      ...devices.map(d => ({ ...d, _type: 'device' as const })),
      ...guides.map(d => ({ ...d, _type: 'guide' as const })),
      ...mechanics.map(d => ({ ...d, _type: 'mechanic' as const })),
    ];
    return items;
  }, [devices, guides, mechanics]);

  // Filter items based on search and filter type
  const filteredItems = useMemo(() => {
    let items = allItems;

    // Apply type filter
    if (filterType !== 'all') {
      if (filterType === 'has-errors') {
        const errorKeys = new Set(validationErrors.map(e => e.deviceKey));
        items = items.filter(item => errorKeys.has(item.deviceKey));
      } else if (filterType === 'unreviewed') {
        items = items.filter(item => item.tag === 'unreviewed');
      } else {
        items = items.filter(item => item._type === filterType);
      }
    }

    // Apply search
    if (searchQuery.trim()) {
      items = indexer.search(searchQuery) as typeof items;
    }

    return items;
  }, [allItems, filterType, searchQuery, validationErrors]);

  // Handle workspace open
  const handleOpenWorkspace = useCallback(async () => {
    const folderPath = await fileService.openFolder();
    if (folderPath) {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      const result = await fileService.loadWorkspace(folderPath);
      if (result.success && result.data) {
        setWorkspacePath(folderPath);
        setDevices(result.data.descriptions);
        // Also set guides and mechanics
        useStore.getState().setGuides(result.data.guides);
        useStore.getState().setMechanics(result.data.mechanics);
        setAllContent([
          ...result.data.descriptions,
          ...result.data.guides,
          ...result.data.mechanics,
        ]);

        // Index all content
        indexer.indexDevices([
          ...result.data.descriptions,
          ...result.data.guides,
          ...result.data.mechanics,
        ]);

        // Save workspace path to settings
        await fileService.setSettings({ lastWorkspace: folderPath });
      } else {
        setError(result.error || 'Failed to load workspace');
      }
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [setWorkspacePath, setLoading, setDevices, setAllContent, setError]);

  if (isCollapsed) {
    return (
      <div className="w-12 bg-stationpedia-surface border-r border-stationpedia-border flex flex-col items-center py-4">
        <button
          onClick={() => setIsCollapsed(false)}
          className="p-2 hover:bg-stationpedia-border rounded"
          title="Expand sidebar"
        >
          ▶
        </button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="w-72 bg-stationpedia-surface border-r border-stationpedia-border flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-stationpedia-border">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
          <h1 className="text-lg font-bold text-stationpedia-text">Content</h1>
          <button
            onClick={() => setIsCollapsed(true)}
            className="p-1 hover:bg-stationpedia-border rounded text-stationpedia-text-muted"
            title="Collapse sidebar"
          >
            ◀
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Open Workspace Button */}
        <button
          onClick={handleOpenWorkspace}
          className="w-full mb-3 px-3 py-2 bg-stationpedia-accent text-stationpedia-bg rounded font-medium hover:bg-stationpedia-accent/80 transition-colors"
        >
          📁 Open Mod Folder
        </button>

        {workspacePath && (
          <div className="text-xs text-stationpedia-text-muted mb-3 truncate" title={workspacePath}>
            {workspacePath.split(/[/\\]/).pop()}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Search Input */}
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search content..."
          value={searchQuery}
          onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
          className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-stationpedia-bg border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-stationpedia-text placeholder-stationpedia-text-muted focus:outline-none focus:border-stationpedia-accent"
        />

        {/* Filter Tabs */}
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 mt-3">
          {([
            { key: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { key: 'device', label: 'Devices' },
            { key: 'guide', label: 'Guides' },
            { key: 'mechanic', label: 'Mechanics' },
          ] as { key: FilterType; label: string }[]).map(({ key, label }) => (
            <button
              key={key}
              onClick={() => setFilterType(key)}
              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded transition-colors ${
                filterType === key
                  ? 'bg-stationpedia-accent text-stationpedia-bg'
                  : 'bg-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text hover:bg-stationpedia-border/80'
              }`}
            >
              {label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content List */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
        {filteredItems.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="p-4 text-stationpedia-text-muted text-sm text-center">
            {searchQuery ? 'No content found' : workspacePath ? 'No content loaded' : 'Open a mod folder to begin'}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <ul className="divide-y divide-stationpedia-border">
            {filteredItems.map((item) => (
              <li key={`${item._type}-${item.deviceKey}`}>
                <button
                  onClick={() => onSelectDevice(item)}
                  className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-3 transition-colors ${
                    selectedDevice?.deviceKey === item.deviceKey
                      ? 'bg-stationpedia-accent text-stationpedia-bg'
                      : 'text-stationpedia-text hover:bg-stationpedia-border'
                  }`}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span className="text-xs">
                      {item._type === 'device' ? '📦' : item._type === 'guide' ? '📖' : '⚙️'}
                    </span>
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <div className="font-medium truncate">
                        {item.displayName || item.deviceKey}
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-xs opacity-70 truncate">
                        {item.deviceKey}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </button>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Footer */}
      <div className="p-4 border-t border-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text-muted text-xs">
        {filteredItems.length} item{filteredItems.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
        {filterType !== 'all' && ` (${filterType})`}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

- oldString:

```
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import type { DeviceDescription } from '@types/stationpedia';
import { indexer } from '@services/indexer';

interface SidebarProps {
  devices: DeviceDescription[];
  selectedDevice: DeviceDescription | null;
  onSelectDevice: (device: DeviceDescription) => void;
}

export const Sidebar: React.FC<SidebarProps> = ({
  devices,
  selectedDevice,
  onSelectDevice,
}) => {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');

  const filteredDevices = searchQuery.trim()
    ? indexer.search(searchQuery)
    : devices;

  return (
    <div className="w-64 bg-stationpedia-surface border-r border-stationpedia-border flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-stationpedia-border">
        <h1 className="text-lg font-bold text-stationpedia-text mb-3">
          Devices
        </h1>

        {/* Search Input */}
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search devices..."
          value={searchQuery}
          onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
          className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-stationpedia-bg border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-stationpedia-text placeholder-stationpedia-text-muted focus:outline-none focus:border-stationpedia-accent"
        />
      </div>

      {/* Device List */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
        {filteredDevices.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="p-4 text-stationpedia-text-muted text-sm">
            {searchQuery ? 'No devices found' : 'No devices loaded'}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <ul className="divide-y divide-stationpedia-border">
            {filteredDevices.map((device) => (
              <li key={device.deviceKey}>
                <button
                  onClick={() => onSelectDevice(device)}
                  className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-3 transition-colors ${
                    selectedDevice?.deviceKey === device.deviceKey
                      ? 'bg-stationpedia-accent text-stationpedia-bg font-semibold'
                      : 'text-stationpedia-text hover:bg-stationpedia-border'
                  }`}
                >
                  <div className="font-medium truncate">
                    {device.displayName || device.deviceKey}
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-opacity-70 truncate">
                    {device.deviceKey}
                  </div>
                </button>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Footer */}
      <div className="p-4 border-t border-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text-muted text-xs">
        {filteredDevices.length} device{filteredDevices.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

- newString:

```
import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import type { DeviceDescription, OperationalDetail } from '@types/stationpedia';

interface PreviewProps {
  device: DeviceDescription | null;
  content: string;
}

// Collapsible section component
const CollapsibleSection: React.FC<{
  title: string;
  children: React.ReactNode;
  defaultOpen?: boolean;
  depth?: number;
}> = ({ title, children, defaultOpen = true, depth = 0 }) => {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);

  const bgColor = depth === 0 
    ? 'bg-stationpedia-surface/80' 
    : depth === 1 
    ? 'bg-stationpedia-bg/50' 
    : 'bg-transparent';

  return (
    <div className={`rounded overflow-hidden ${depth === 0 ? 'mb-2' : 'mb-1'}`}>
      <button
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 ${bgColor} hover:bg-stationpedia-border/50 transition-colors`}
      >
        <span className={`transform transition-transform ${isOpen ? 'rotate-90' : ''}`}>
          ▶
        </span>
        <span className={`font-medium ${depth === 0 ? 'text-stationpedia-accent' : 'text-stationpedia-text'}`}>
          {title}
        </span>
      </button>
      {isOpen && (
        <div className={`px-4 py-2 ${depth > 0 ? 'ml-4 border-l border-stationpedia-border' : ''}`}>
          {children}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

// Render operational detail recursively
const RenderOperationalDetail: React.FC<{
  detail: OperationalDetail;
  depth?: number;
}> = ({ detail, depth = 0 }) => {
  if (detail.collapsible === false) {
    return (
      <div className="mb-2">
        {detail.title && (
          <h4 className="font-semibold text-stationpedia-accent mb-1">{detail.title}</h4>
        )}
        {detail.description && (
          <div 
            className="text-sm text-stationpedia-text"
            dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: detail.description }}
          />
        )}
        {detail.items && (
          <ul className="list-disc list-inside text-sm text-stationpedia-text ml-2">
            {detail.items.map((item, i) => (
              <li key={i}>{item}</li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        )}
        {detail.steps && (
          <ol className="list-decimal list-inside text-sm text-stationpedia-text ml-2">
            {detail.steps.map((step, i) => (
              <li key={i}>{step}</li>
            ))}
          </ol>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <CollapsibleSection title={detail.title} depth={depth} defaultOpen={depth < 2}>
      {detail.description && (
        <div 
          className="text-sm text-stationpedia-text mb-2"
          dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: detail.description }}
        />
      )}
      {detail.items && (
        <ul className="list-disc list-inside text-sm text-stationpedia-text ml-2 mb-2">
          {detail.items.map((item, i) => (
            <li key={i}>{item}</li>
          ))}
        </ul>
      )}
      {detail.steps && (
        <ol className="list-decimal list-inside text-sm text-stationpedia-text ml-2 mb-2">
          {detail.steps.map((step, i) => (
            <li key={i}>{step}</li>
          ))}
        </ol>
      )}
      {detail.children?.map((child, i) => (
        <RenderOperationalDetail key={i} detail={child} depth={depth + 1} />
      ))}
    </CollapsibleSection>
  );
};

export const Preview: React.FC<PreviewProps> = ({ device, content }) => {
  // Convert TextMeshPro-like tags to HTML for preview
  const processedContent = useMemo(() => {
    if (!content) return '';
    
    let processed = content;
    
    // Convert {THING:Key} links to styled spans
    processed = processed.replace(
      /\{THING:([^}]+)\}/g,
      '<span class="text-stationpedia-accent underline cursor-pointer">$1</span>'
    );
    
    // Convert {LINK:Page;Text} to styled spans
    processed = processed.replace(
      /\{LINK:([^;]+);([^}]+)\}/g,
      '<span class="text-stationpedia-accent underline cursor-pointer">$2</span>'
    );
    
    return processed;
  }, [content]);

  return (
    <div className="w-96 flex flex-col bg-stationpedia-bg border-l border-stationpedia-border">
      {/* Preview Header */}
      <div className="bg-stationpedia-surface border-b border-stationpedia-border p-4">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-stationpedia-text">
          Preview
        </h2>
        <p className="text-xs text-stationpedia-text-muted mt-1">
          Approximate in-game appearance
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Preview Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {device ? (
          <div className="p-4">
            {/* Device Header - Stationpedia style */}
            <div className="mb-4 pb-4 border-b border-stationpedia-border">
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-stationpedia-accent mb-1">
                {device.displayName || device.deviceKey}
              </h1>
              <code className="text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-stationpedia-text-muted">
                {device.deviceKey}
              </code>
            </div>

            {/* Page Description */}
            {processedContent && (
              <CollapsibleSection title="Description" defaultOpen={true}>
                <div
                  className="prose prose-sm prose-invert max-w-none"
                  dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: processedContent }}
                />
              </CollapsibleSection>
            )}

            {/* Operational Details */}
            {device.operationalDetails && device.operationalDetails.length > 0 && (
              <CollapsibleSection title="Operational Details" defaultOpen={true}>
                {device.operationalDetails.map((detail, i) => (
                  <RenderOperationalDetail key={i} detail={detail} depth={1} />
                ))}
              </CollapsibleSection>
            )}

            {/* Logic Types Table */}
            {device.logicDescriptions && Object.keys(device.logicDescriptions).length > 0 && (
              <CollapsibleSection title="Logic Types" defaultOpen={true}>
                <table className="w-full text-sm border-collapse">
                  <thead>
                    <tr className="border-b border-stationpedia-border">
                      <th className="text-left py-2 px-2 text-stationpedia-accent">Name</th>
                      <th className="text-left py-2 px-2 text-stationpedia-accent">Type</th>
                      <th className="text-left py-2 px-2 text-stationpedia-accent">Range</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {Object.entries(device.logicDescriptions).map(([key, logic]) => (
                      <tr key={key} className="border-b border-stationpedia-border/50">
                        <td className="py-2 px-2 font-medium text-stationpedia-text">{key}</td>
                        <td className="py-2 px-2 text-stationpedia-text-muted">{logic.dataType}</td>
                        <td className="py-2 px-2 text-stationpedia-text-muted">{logic.range}</td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </CollapsibleSection>
            )}

            {/* Slots */}
            {device.slots && device.slots.length > 0 && (
              <CollapsibleSection title="Slots" defaultOpen={true}>
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {device.slots.map((slot) => (
                    <div
                      key={slot.slotNumber}
                      className="p-2 bg-stationpedia-surface/50 rounded text-sm flex justify-between"
                    >
                      <span className="text-stationpedia-accent">
                        Slot {slot.slotNumber}
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-stationpedia-text-muted">
                        {slot.slotType}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </CollapsibleSection>
            )}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-stationpedia-text-muted">
            Select an item to preview
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

```
import React, { useMemo } from 'react';
import type { DeviceDescription } from '@types/stationpedia';

interface PreviewProps {
  device: DeviceDescription | null;
  content: string;
}

export const Preview: React.FC<PreviewProps> = ({ device, content }) => {
  const htmlContent = useMemo(() => {
    return content || '<p class="text-gray-400">No content to preview</p>';
  }, [content]);

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col bg-stationpedia-surface border-r border-stationpedia-border">
      {/* Preview Header */}
      <div className="bg-stationpedia-bg border-b border-stationpedia-border p-4">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-stationpedia-text">
          Preview
        </h2>
        {device && (
          <p className="text-sm text-stationpedia-text-muted mt-1">
            {device.displayName || device.deviceKey}
          </p>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Preview Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-6">
        {device ? (
          <div className="max-w-2xl">
            {/* Device Header */}
            <div className="mb-6 pb-6 border-b border-stationpedia-border">
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-stationpedia-text mb-2">
                {device.displayName || device.deviceKey}
              </h1>
              <code className="text-sm bg-stationpedia-bg px-2 py-1 rounded text-stationpedia-text-muted">
                {device.deviceKey}
              </code>
            </div>

            {/* Content Preview */}
            <div
              className="prose prose-invert max-w-none text-stationpedia-text"
              dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: htmlContent }}
            />

            {/* Metadata */}
            {(device.logicDescriptions || device.slots) && (
              <div className="mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-stationpedia-border">
                {device.slots && device.slots.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="mb-6">
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-stationpedia-text mb-2">
                      Slots
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {device.slots.map((slot) => (
                        <div
                          key={slot.slotNumber}
                          className="p-2 bg-stationpedia-bg rounded text-sm"
                        >
                          <span className="font-semibold text-stationpedia-accent">
                            Slot {slot.slotNumber}
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-stationpedia-text-muted ml-2">
                            {slot.slotType}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {device.logicDescriptions &&
                  Object.keys(device.logicDescriptions).length > 0 && (
                    <div>
                      <h3 className="font-bold text-stationpedia-text mb-2">
                        Logic Descriptions
                      </h3>
                      <div className="space-y-2">
                        {Object.entries(device.logicDescriptions).map(
                          ([key, logic]) => (
                            <div
                              key={key}
                              className="p-2 bg-stationpedia-bg rounded text-sm"
                            >
                              <span className="font-semibold text-stationpedia-accent">
                                {key}
                              </span>
                              <div className="text-stationpedia-text-muted text-xs mt-1">
                                Type: {logic.dataType} | Range: {logic.range}
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          )
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-stationpedia-text-muted">
            Select a device to preview
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import type { ValidationError } from '@types/stationpedia';

interface ValidationPanelProps {
  errors: ValidationError[];
}

export const ValidationPanel: React.FC<ValidationPanelProps> = ({ errors }) => {
  const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(false);
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState<'all' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'>('all');

  const errorCount = errors.filter((e) => e.type === 'error').length;
  const warningCount = errors.filter((e) => e.type === 'warning').length;
  const infoCount = errors.filter((e) => e.type === 'info').length;

  const filteredErrors = filter === 'all' 
    ? errors 
    : errors.filter(e => e.type === filter);

  const getIcon = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'error': return '❌';
      case 'warning': return '⚠️';
      case 'info': return 'ℹ️';
      default: return '•';
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className={`bg-stationpedia-surface border-t border-stationpedia-border flex flex-col transition-all ${isExpanded ? 'h-64' : 'h-10'}`}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div 
        className="bg-stationpedia-bg border-b border-stationpedia-border px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer"
        onClick={() => setIsExpanded(!isExpanded)}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <span className={`transform transition-transform ${isExpanded ? 'rotate-90' : ''}`}>▶</span>
          <h3 className="font-bold text-stationpedia-text">Problems</h3>
          <div className="flex gap-3 text-xs">
            {errorCount > 0 && (
              <span className="text-red-400 flex items-center gap-1">
                <span className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] flex items-center justify-center font-bold">
                  {errorCount}
                </span>
                Errors
              </span>
            )}
            {warningCount > 0 && (
              <span className="text-yellow-400 flex items-center gap-1">
                <span className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-yellow-500 text-black text-[10px] flex items-center justify-center font-bold">
                  {warningCount}
                </span>
                Warnings
              </span>
            )}
            {errors.length === 0 && (
              <span className="text-green-400">✓ No issues</span>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {isExpanded && (
          <div className="flex gap-1" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            {(['all', 'error', 'warning', 'info'] as const).map(type => (
              <button
                key={type}
                onClick={() => setFilter(type)}
                className={`px-2 py-0.5 text-xs rounded ${
                  filter === type
                    ? 'bg-stationpedia-accent text-stationpedia-bg'
                    : 'bg-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text hover:bg-stationpedia-border/80'
                }`}
              >
                {type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + type.slice(1)}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Error List */}
      {isExpanded && (
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3">
          {filteredErrors.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-stationpedia-text-muted text-sm text-center py-4">
              {errors.length === 0 ? 'No validation issues found' : 'No issues match the current filter'}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-1">
              {filteredErrors.map((error, index) => (
                <div
                  key={index}
                  className={`p-2 rounded text-sm flex items-start gap-2 hover:bg-stationpedia-border/30 cursor-pointer ${
                    error.type === 'error'
                      ? 'text-red-200'
                      : error.type === 'warning'
                      ? 'text-yellow-200'
                      : 'text-blue-200'
                  }`}
                >
                  <span>{getIcon(error.type)}</span>
                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <span className="font-medium">{error.message}</span>
                    {error.field && (
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs opacity-70">
                        [{error.field}]
                      </span>
                    )}
                    {error.deviceKey && (
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-stationpedia-accent">
                        {error.deviceKey}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  {error.line && (
                    <span className="text-xs opacity-70">Ln {error.line}</span>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};
```

```
import React from 'react';
import type { ValidationError } from '@types/stationpedia';

interface ValidationPanelProps {
  errors: ValidationError[];
}

export const ValidationPanel: React.FC<ValidationPanelProps> = ({ errors }) => {
  const errorCount = errors.filter((e) => e.type === 'error').length;
  const warningCount = errors.filter((e) => e.type === 'warning').length;
  const infoCount = errors.filter((e) => e.type === 'info').length;

  return (
    <div className="h-32 bg-stationpedia-surface border-t border-stationpedia-border flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-stationpedia-bg border-b border-stationpedia-border px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between">
        <h3 className="font-bold text-stationpedia-text">Validation</h3>
        <div className="flex gap-4 text-xs">
          {errorCount > 0 && (
            <span className="text-red-400">
              {errorCount} error{errorCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
            </span>
          )}
          {warningCount > 0 && (
            <span className="text-yellow-400">
              {warningCount} warning{warningCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
            </span>
          )}
          {infoCount > 0 && (
            <span className="text-blue-400">
              {infoCount} info
            </span>
          )}
          {errors.length === 0 && (
            <span className="text-green-400">No issues</span>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Error List */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3">
        {errors.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-stationpedia-text-muted text-sm">
            No validation errors found
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {errors.map((error, index) => (
              <div
                key={index}
                className={`p-2 rounded text-sm border-l-4 ${
                  error.type === 'error'
                    ? 'bg-red-900/20 border-red-500 text-red-200'
                    : error.type === 'warning'
                    ? 'bg-yellow-900/20 border-yellow-500 text-yellow-200'
                    : 'bg-blue-900/20 border-blue-500 text-blue-200'
                }`}
              >
                <div className="font-semibold">
                  {error.field && `[${error.field}] `}
                  {error.message}
                </div>
                {error.line && (
                  <div className="text-xs opacity-70">Line {error.line}</div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

- newString:

```
import React, { useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Sidebar } from '@components/Sidebar';
import { Editor } from '@components/Editor';
import { Preview } from '@components/Preview';
import { ValidationPanel } from '@components/ValidationPanel';
import { OperationalDetailsEditor } from '@components/OperationalDetailsEditor';
import { indexer } from '@services/indexer';
import { validator } from '@services/validator';
import { fileService } from '@services/fileService';
import { useStore } from '@store/index';
import type { DeviceDescription } from '@types/stationpedia';

export function App() {
  const {
    devices,
    guides,
    mechanics,
    allContent,
    selectedItem,
    editorContent,
    validationErrors,
    isDirty,
    workspacePath,
    isLoading,
    lastError,
    selectItem,
    setEditorContent,
    setValidationErrors,
    setDevices,
    setGuides,
    setMechanics,
    setAllContent,
    setWorkspacePath,
    setLoading,
    updateSelectedItem,
  } = useStore();

  // Load last workspace on startup
  useEffect(() => {
    async function loadLastWorkspace() {
      const settings = await fileService.getSettings();
      if (settings.lastWorkspace) {
        const exists = await fileService.exists(settings.lastWorkspace);
        if (exists) {
          setLoading(true);
          const result = await fileService.loadWorkspace(settings.lastWorkspace);
          if (result.success && result.data) {
            setWorkspacePath(settings.lastWorkspace);
            setDevices(result.data.descriptions);
            setGuides(result.data.guides);
            setMechanics(result.data.mechanics);
            const all = [
              ...result.data.descriptions,
              ...result.data.guides,
              ...result.data.mechanics,
            ];
            setAllContent(all);
            indexer.indexDevices(all);
          }
          setLoading(false);
        }
      }
    }
    loadLastWorkspace();
  }, []);

  // Validate on content change
  useEffect(() => {
    if (selectedItem) {
      const errors = validator.validate(selectedItem);
      setValidationErrors(errors);
    }
  }, [selectedItem, editorContent]);

  // Handle device selection
  const handleSelectDevice = useCallback((device: DeviceDescription) => {
    selectItem(device);
  }, [selectItem]);

  // Handle content change from editor
  const handleContentChange = useCallback((content: string) => {
    setEditorContent(content);
    if (selectedItem) {
      updateSelectedItem({ pageDescription: content });
    }
  }, [setEditorContent, selectedItem, updateSelectedItem]);

  // Handle save
  const handleSave = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!workspacePath || !isDirty) return;

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      // Save descriptions
      const result = await fileService.saveDescriptions(workspacePath, devices);
      if (!result.success) {
        console.error('Failed to save:', result.error);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Save error:', error);
    }
    setLoading(false);
  }, [workspacePath, devices, isDirty]);

  // Keyboard shortcuts
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 's') {
        e.preventDefault();
        handleSave();
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, [handleSave]);

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-screen bg-stationpedia-bg text-stationpedia-text">
      {/* Title Bar */}
      <div className="bg-stationpedia-surface border-b border-stationpedia-border px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <h1 className="font-bold text-stationpedia-accent">Stationpedia Editor</h1>
          {workspacePath && (
            <span className="text-sm text-stationpedia-text-muted">
              {workspacePath.split(/[/\\]/).pop()}
            </span>
          )}
          {isDirty && (
            <span className="text-xs text-yellow-400">● Unsaved</span>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {isLoading && (
            <span className="text-sm text-stationpedia-accent animate-pulse">Loading...</span>
          )}
          <button
            onClick={handleSave}
            disabled={!isDirty || !workspacePath}
            className={`px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
              isDirty && workspacePath
                ? 'bg-stationpedia-accent text-stationpedia-bg hover:bg-stationpedia-accent/80'
                : 'bg-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text-muted cursor-not-allowed'
            }`}
          >
            💾 Save
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Error Banner */}
      {lastError && (
        <div className="bg-red-900/50 border-b border-red-500 px-4 py-2 text-red-200 text-sm">
          {lastError}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Main Content Area */}
      <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">
        {/* Sidebar */}
        <Sidebar
          devices={devices}
          selectedDevice={selectedItem}
          onSelectDevice={handleSelectDevice}
        />

        {/* Center Panes */}
        <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden min-w-0">
          {/* Editor + Operational Details */}
          <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0">
            {/* Main Editor */}
            <Editor 
              device={selectedItem} 
              onContentChange={handleContentChange} 
            />
            
            {/* Operational Details Editor */}
            {selectedItem?.operationalDetails && (
              <OperationalDetailsEditor />
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Preview */}
          <Preview device={selectedItem} content={editorContent} />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Validation Panel */}
      <ValidationPanel errors={validationErrors} />
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
```

- oldString:

```
import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Sidebar } from '@components/Sidebar';
import { Editor } from '@components/Editor';
import { Preview } from '@components/Preview';
import { ValidationPanel } from '@components/ValidationPanel';
import { indexer } from '@services/indexer';
import { validator } from '@services/validator';
import type { DeviceDescription } from '@types/stationpedia';

const mockDevices: DeviceDescription[] = [
  {
    deviceKey: 'SmallBattery',
    displayName: 'Small Battery',
    pageDescription: '<h2>Overview</h2><p>A small rechargeable battery unit.</p>',
    operationalDetails: [
      {
        title: 'Charging',
        description: 'Connect to a power source to charge.',
      },
      {
        title: 'Discharging',
        description: 'Use with caution to avoid deep discharge.',
      },
    ],
    logicDescriptions: {
      Charge: {
        dataType: 'float',
        range: '0-100',
        description: 'Battery charge level in percentage',
      },
      PowerOutput: {
        dataType: 'float',
        range: '0-500',
        description: 'Current power output in watts',
      },
    },
  },
  {
    deviceKey: 'LargeBattery',
    displayName: 'Large Battery',
    pageDescription: '<h2>Overview</h2><p>A large capacity battery for extended operations.</p>',
    operationalDetails: [
      {
        title: 'Installation',
        description: 'Requires mounting frame.',
      },
    ],
    logicDescriptions: {
      Charge: {
        dataType: 'float',
        range: '0-100',
        description: 'Battery charge level',
      },
    },
  },
];

export function App() {
  const [devices, setDevices] = useState<DeviceDescription[]>(mockDevices);
  const [selectedDevice, setSelectedDevice] = useState<DeviceDescription | null>(
    mockDevices[0] || null
  );
  const [editorContent, setEditorContent] = useState(
    selectedDevice?.pageDescription || ''
  );
  const [validationErrors, setValidationErrors] = useState<any[]>([]);

  // Initialize indexer
  useEffect(() => {
    indexer.indexDevices(devices);
  }, [devices]);

  // Update validation errors when device or content changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (selectedDevice) {
      const errors = validator.validate(selectedDevice);
      setValidationErrors(errors);
    }
  }, [selectedDevice]);

  const handleSelectDevice = useCallback((device: DeviceDescription) => {
    setSelectedDevice(device);
    setEditorContent(device.pageDescription || '');
  }, []);

  const handleContentChange = useCallback((content: string) => {
    setEditorContent(content);
    if (selectedDevice) {
      const updated = { ...selectedDevice, pageDescription: content };
      setSelectedDevice(updated);
      const errors = validator.validate(updated);
      setValidationErrors(errors);
    }
  }, [selectedDevice]);

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-screen bg-stationpedia-bg text-stationpedia-text">
      {/* Title Bar */}
      <div className="bg-stationpedia-accent text-stationpedia-bg px-6 py-3 font-bold">
        Stationpedia Editor
      </div>

      {/* Main Content Area */}
      <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">
        {/* Sidebar */}
        <Sidebar
          devices={devices}
          selectedDevice={selectedDevice}
          onSelectDevice={handleSelectDevice}
        />

        {/* Center Panes */}
        <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">
          {/* Editor */}
          <Editor device={selectedDevice} onContentChange={handleContentChange} />

          {/* Preview */}
          <Preview device={selectedDevice} content={editorContent} />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Validation Panel */}
      <ValidationPanel errors={validationErrors} />
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
```

- content:

```
import React, { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useStore } from '@store/index';
import type { OperationalDetail } from '@types/stationpedia';

interface DetailItemProps {
  detail: OperationalDetail;
  index: number;
  depth?: number;
  onUpdate: (index: number, detail: OperationalDetail) => void;
  onRemove: (index: number) => void;
  onAddChild: (index: number) => void;
}

const DetailItem: React.FC<DetailItemProps> = ({
  detail,
  index,
  depth = 0,
  onUpdate,
  onRemove,
  onAddChild,
}) => {
  const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(true);
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
  const [editTitle, setEditTitle] = useState(detail.title);
  const [editDescription, setEditDescription] = useState(detail.description || '');

  const handleSave = () => {
    onUpdate(index, {
      ...detail,
      title: editTitle,
      description: editDescription,
    });
    setIsEditing(false);
  };

  const handleCancel = () => {
    setEditTitle(detail.title);
    setEditDescription(detail.description || '');
    setIsEditing(false);
  };

  return (
    <div 
      className={`border border-stationpedia-border rounded mb-2 ${depth > 0 ? 'ml-4' : ''}`}
      style={{ marginLeft: depth * 16 }}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-stationpedia-surface">
        {detail.children && detail.children.length > 0 && (
          <button
            onClick={() => setIsExpanded(!isExpanded)}
            className="text-stationpedia-text-muted hover:text-stationpedia-text"
          >
            {isExpanded ? '▼' : '▶'}
          </button>
        )}
        
        <span className="text-stationpedia-text-muted cursor-move">⋮⋮</span>
        
        {isEditing ? (
          <input
            type="text"
            value={editTitle}
            onChange={(e) => setEditTitle(e.target.value)}
            className="flex-1 px-2 py-1 bg-stationpedia-bg border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-stationpedia-text text-sm"
            autoFocus
          />
        ) : (
          <span 
            className="flex-1 font-medium text-stationpedia-text cursor-pointer hover:text-stationpedia-accent"
            onClick={() => setIsEditing(true)}
          >
            {detail.title || 'Untitled'}
          </span>
        )}

        <div className="flex gap-1">
          {isEditing ? (
            <>
              <button
                onClick={handleSave}
                className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-green-600 text-white rounded hover:bg-green-500"
              >
                Save
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={handleCancel}
                className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text rounded hover:bg-stationpedia-border/80"
              >
                Cancel
              </button>
            </>
          ) : (
            <>
              <button
                onClick={() => setIsEditing(true)}
                className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text rounded hover:bg-stationpedia-border/80"
                title="Edit"
              >
                ✏️
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => onAddChild(index)}
                className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-border text-stationpedia-text rounded hover:bg-stationpedia-border/80"
                title="Add child"
              >
                ➕
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => onRemove(index)}
                className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-red-600/50 text-red-200 rounded hover:bg-red-600"
                title="Remove"
              >
                🗑️
              </button>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Description Editor */}
      {isEditing && (
        <div className="p-2 border-t border-stationpedia-border">
          <textarea
            value={editDescription}
            onChange={(e) => setEditDescription(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Description (supports HTML)"
            className="w-full h-24 px-2 py-1 bg-stationpedia-bg border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-stationpedia-text text-sm resize-none"
          />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Preview */}
      {!isEditing && detail.description && (
        <div 
          className="p-2 text-sm text-stationpedia-text-muted border-t border-stationpedia-border"
          dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: detail.description }}
        />
      )}

      {/* Children */}
      {isExpanded && detail.children && detail.children.length > 0 && (
        <div className="p-2 border-t border-stationpedia-border">
          {detail.children.map((child, childIndex) => (
            <DetailItem
              key={childIndex}
              detail={child}
              index={childIndex}
              depth={depth + 1}
              onUpdate={(idx, updated) => {
                const newChildren = [...(detail.children || [])];
                newChildren[idx] = updated;
                onUpdate(index, { ...detail, children: newChildren });
              }}
              onRemove={(idx) => {
                const newChildren = [...(detail.children || [])];
                newChildren.splice(idx, 1);
                onUpdate(index, { ...detail, children: newChildren });
              }}
              onAddChild={(idx) => {
                const newChildren = [...(detail.children || [])];
                const targetChild = newChildren[idx];
                newChildren[idx] = {
                  ...targetChild,
                  children: [
                    ...(targetChild.children || []),
                    { title: 'New Section', collapsible: true },
                  ],
                };
                onUpdate(index, { ...detail, children: newChildren });
              }}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export const OperationalDetailsEditor: React.FC = () => {
  const { selectedItem, updateOperationalDetail, addOperationalDetail, removeOperationalDetail } = useStore();
  const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(true);

  const handleUpdate = useCallback((index: number, detail: OperationalDetail) => {
    updateOperationalDetail(index, detail);
  }, [updateOperationalDetail]);

  const handleRemove = useCallback((index: number) => {
    removeOperationalDetail(index);
  }, [removeOperationalDetail]);

  const handleAddChild = useCallback((index: number) => {
    if (!selectedItem?.operationalDetails) return;
    
    const details = [...selectedItem.operationalDetails];
    const targetDetail = details[index];
    details[index] = {
      ...targetDetail,
      children: [
        ...(targetDetail.children || []),
        { title: 'New Section', collapsible: true },
      ],
    };
    updateOperationalDetail(index, details[index]);
  }, [selectedItem, updateOperationalDetail]);

  const handleAddNew = useCallback(() => {
    addOperationalDetail({
      title: 'New Section',
      collapsible: true,
      description: '',
    });
  }, [addOperationalDetail]);

  if (!selectedItem?.operationalDetails) {
    return null;
  }

  return (
    <div className="border-t border-stationpedia-border bg-stationpedia-surface">
      {/* Header */}
      <div 
        className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 bg-stationpedia-bg border-b border-stationpedia-border cursor-pointer"
        onClick={() => setIsExpanded(!isExpanded)}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className={`transform transition-transform ${isExpanded ? 'rotate-90' : ''}`}>▶</span>
          <h3 className="font-bold text-stationpedia-text">Operational Details</h3>
          <span className="text-xs text-stationpedia-text-muted">
            ({selectedItem.operationalDetails.length} sections)
          </span>
        </div>
        <button
          onClick={(e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            handleAddNew();
          }}
          className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-accent text-stationpedia-bg rounded hover:bg-stationpedia-accent/80"
        >
          + Add Section
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      {isExpanded && (
        <div className="p-4 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
          {selectedItem.operationalDetails.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-center text-stationpedia-text-muted py-4">
              No operational details. Click "Add Section" to create one.
            </div>
          ) : (
            selectedItem.operationalDetails.map((detail, index) => (
              <DetailItem
                key={index}
                detail={detail}
                index={index}
                onUpdate={handleUpdate}
                onRemove={handleRemove}
                onAddChild={handleAddChild}
              />
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

```

**Input:**

- filePath: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor\src\renderer\services\validator.ts`
- newString:

```
/**
 * Validation service for device descriptions
 */

import type { DeviceDescription, ValidationError, OperationalDetail } from '@types/stationpedia';

export class ValidatorService {
  private allDeviceKeys: Set<string> = new Set();

  /**
   * Set all known device keys for link validation
   */
  setKnownDevices(devices: DeviceDescription[]): void {
    this.allDeviceKeys = new Set(devices.map(d => d.deviceKey));
  }

  /**
   * Validate a device description
   */
  validate(device: DeviceDescription): ValidationError[] {
    const errors: ValidationError[] = [];

    // Check required fields
    if (!device.deviceKey || device.deviceKey.trim() === '') {
      errors.push({
        type: 'error',
        message: 'Device key is required',
        field: 'deviceKey',
        deviceKey: device.deviceKey,
      });
    }

    if (!device.displayName || device.displayName.trim() === '') {
      errors.push({
        type: 'warning',
        message: 'Display name should be provided',
        field: 'displayName',
        deviceKey: device.deviceKey,
      });
    }

    // Check for empty page description
    if (!device.pageDescription || device.pageDescription.trim() === '' || 
        device.pageDescription === '<p></p>') {
      errors.push({
        type: 'warning',
        message: 'Page description is empty',
        field: 'pageDescription',
        deviceKey: device.deviceKey,
      });
    }

    // Validate internal links in page description
    if (device.pageDescription) {
      const linkErrors = this.validateLinks(device.pageDescription, device.deviceKey);
      errors.push(...linkErrors);
    }

    // Validate operational details
    if (device.operationalDetails) {
      device.operationalDetails.forEach((detail, index) => {
        const detailErrors = this.validateOperationalDetail(detail, index, device.deviceKey);
        errors.push(...detailErrors);
      });
    }

    // Validate logic descriptions
    if (device.logicDescriptions) {
      Object.entries(device.logicDescriptions).forEach(([key, logic]) => {
        if (!logic.dataType || logic.dataType.trim() === '') {
          errors.push({
            type: 'warning',
            message: `Logic "${key}" is missing data type`,
            field: 'logicDescriptions',
            deviceKey: device.deviceKey,
          });
        }
        if (!logic.description || logic.description.trim() === '') {
          errors.push({
            type: 'info',
            message: `Logic "${key}" has no description`,
            field: 'logicDescriptions',
            deviceKey: device.deviceKey,
          });
        }
      });
    }

    // Validate slots
    if (device.slots) {
      const slotNumbers = new Set<number>();
      device.slots.forEach((slot) => {
        if (slotNumbers.has(slot.slotNumber)) {
          errors.push({
            type: 'error',
            message: `Duplicate slot number: ${slot.slotNumber}`,
            field: 'slots',
            deviceKey: device.deviceKey,
          });
        }
        slotNumbers.add(slot.slotNumber);

        if (!slot.slotType || slot.slotType.trim() === '') {
          errors.push({
            type: 'warning',
            message: `Slot ${slot.slotNumber} is missing type`,
            field: 'slots',
            deviceKey: device.deviceKey,
          });
        }
      });
    }

    return errors;
  }

  /**
   * Validate an operational detail recursively
   */
  private validateOperationalDetail(
    detail: OperationalDetail,
    index: number,
    deviceKey: string,
    path = ''
  ): ValidationError[] {
    const errors: ValidationError[] = [];
    const currentPath = path ? `${path}.${index}` : `${index}`;

    if (!detail.title || detail.title.trim() === '') {
      errors.push({
        type: 'warning',
        message: `Operational detail at [${currentPath}] is missing title`,
        field: 'operationalDetails',
        deviceKey,
      });
    }

    // Check for empty content
    const hasContent = detail.description || 
                       (detail.items && detail.items.length > 0) ||
                       (detail.steps && detail.steps.length > 0) ||
                       (detail.children && detail.children.length > 0);
    
    if (!hasContent) {
      errors.push({
        type: 'info',
        message: `"${detail.title || 'Untitled'}" has no content`,
        field: 'operationalDetails',
        deviceKey,
      });
    }

    // Validate links in description
    if (detail.description) {
      const linkErrors = this.validateLinks(detail.description, deviceKey);
      errors.push(...linkErrors);
    }

    // Validate children recursively
    if (detail.children) {
      detail.children.forEach((child, childIndex) => {
        const childErrors = this.validateOperationalDetail(
          child,
          childIndex,
          deviceKey,
          currentPath
        );
        errors.push(...childErrors);
      });
    }

    return errors;
  }

  /**
   * Validate internal links in content
   */
  private validateLinks(content: string, deviceKey: string): ValidationError[] {
    const errors: ValidationError[] = [];

    // Check {THING:Key} format links
    const thingLinkRegex = /\{THING:([^}]+)\}/g;
    let match;
    while ((match = thingLinkRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
      const linkedKey = match[1];
      if (this.allDeviceKeys.size > 0 && !this.allDeviceKeys.has(linkedKey)) {
        errors.push({
          type: 'warning',
          message: `Broken link: "${linkedKey}" not found`,
          field: 'pageDescription',
          deviceKey,
        });
      }
    }

    // Check stationpedia:// links
    const stationpediaLinkRegex = /href="stationpedia:\/\/([^"]+)"/g;
    while ((match = stationpediaLinkRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
      const linkedKey = match[1];
      if (this.allDeviceKeys.size > 0 && !this.allDeviceKeys.has(linkedKey)) {
        errors.push({
          type: 'warning',
          message: `Broken link: "${linkedKey}" not found`,
          field: 'pageDescription',
          deviceKey,
        });
      }
    }

    return errors;
  }

  /**
   * Validate all devices
   */
  validateAll(devices: DeviceDescription[]): ValidationError[] {
    this.setKnownDevices(devices);
    const errors: ValidationError[] = [];
    
    for (const device of devices) {
      const deviceErrors = this.validate(device);
      errors.push(...deviceErrors);
    }

    // Check for duplicate device keys
    const keyCount = new Map<string, number>();
    for (const device of devices) {
      const count = keyCount.get(device.deviceKey) || 0;
      keyCount.set(device.deviceKey, count + 1);
    }
    
    for (const [key, count] of keyCount) {
      if (count > 1) {
        errors.push({
          type: 'error',
          message: `Duplicate device key: "${key}" appears ${count} times`,
          field: 'deviceKey',
          deviceKey: key,
        });
      }
    }

    return errors;
  }
}

export const validator = new ValidatorService();
```

- oldString:

```
/**
 * Validation service for device descriptions
 */

import type { DeviceDescription, ValidationError } from '@types/stationpedia';

export class ValidatorService {
  /**
   * Validate a device description
   */
  validate(device: DeviceDescription): ValidationError[] {
    const errors: ValidationError[] = [];

    // Check required fields
    if (!device.deviceKey || device.deviceKey.trim() === '') {
      errors.push({
        type: 'error',
        message: 'Device key is required',
        field: 'deviceKey',
      });
    }

    if (!device.displayName || device.displayName.trim() === '') {
      errors.push({
        type: 'warning',
        message: 'Display name should be provided',
        field: 'displayName',
      });
    }

    // Validate operational details
    if (device.operationalDetails) {
      device.operationalDetails.forEach((detail, index) => {
        if (!detail.title || detail.title.trim() === '') {
          errors.push({
            type: 'warning',
            message: `Operational detail ${index + 1} is missing title`,
            field: 'operationalDetails',
          });
        }
      });
    }

    // Validate logic descriptions
    if (device.logicDescriptions) {
      Object.entries(device.logicDescriptions).forEach(([key, logic]) => {
        if (!logic.dataType || logic.dataType.trim() === '') {
          errors.push({
            type: 'warning',
            message: `Logic description "${key}" is missing data type`,
            field: 'logicDescriptions',
          });
        }
      });
    }

    return errors;
  }
}

export const validator = new ValidatorService();

import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'
import electron from 'vite-plugin-electron'
import renderer from 'vite-plugin-electron-renderer'
import path from 'path'

const projectRoot = __dirname

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    react(),
    electron([
      {
        entry: path.resolve(projectRoot, 'src/main/index.ts'),
        vite: {
          build: {
            outDir: path.resolve(projectRoot, 'dist-electron/main'),
            rollupOptions: {
              external: ['electron'],
            },
          },

import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'
import electron from 'vite-plugin-electron'
import renderer from 'vite-plugin-electron-renderer'
import path from 'path'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    react(),
    electron([
      {
        entry: 'src/main/index.ts',
        vite: {
          build: {
            outDir: 'dist-electron/main',
            rollupOptions: {
              external: ['electron'],
            },
          },
        },
      },
      {
        entry: 'src/preload/index.ts',
        vite: {
          build: {
            outDir: 'dist-electron/preload',
            rollupOptions: {
              external: ['electron'],
            },
          },
        },
        onstart(options) {
          options.reload()
        },
      },
    ]),
    renderer(),
  ],
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      '@': path.resolve(__dirname, './src'),
      '@components': path.resolve(__dirname, './src/renderer/components'),
      '@services': path.resolve(__dirname, './src/renderer/services'),
      '@models': path.resolve(__dirname, './src/renderer/models'),
      '@styles': path.resolve(__dirname, './src/renderer/styles'),
      '@store': path.resolve(__dirname, './src/renderer/store'),
    },
  },
  root: path.resolve(__dirname, './src/renderer'),
  base: './',
  server: {
    port: 5173,
  },
  build: {
    outDir: path.resolve(__dirname, './dist'),
    emptyOutDir: true,
    rollupOptions: {
      input: path.resolve(__dirname, './src/renderer/index.html'),
    },
  },
})
```

```
# Stationpedia Editor

A rich desktop editor for creating and editing Stationpedia content for the Stationeers game mod "Stationpedia Ascended".

![Electron](https://img.shields.io/badge/Electron-28.1-blue)
![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-18.2-blue)
![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-5.3-blue)

## Features

- 📝 **Rich Text Editing** - Word processor-style editing with TipTap
- 🔗 **Link Picker** - Easily insert cross-references to other Stationpedia pages
- 👁️ **Live Preview** - See how content will appear in-game
- 🔍 **Fast Search** - Fuzzy search across all content with Fuse.js
- ✅ **Validation** - Real-time error checking for broken links and syntax
- 💾 **Auto-backup** - Automatic backup creation when saving
- 📊 **Operational Details Editor** - Drag-and-drop editing of device operation info

## Installation

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+ 
- npm or yarn

### Setup

1. Clone the repository:
   ```bash
   cd StationpediaEditor
   ```

2. Install dependencies:
   ```bash
   npm install
   ```

3. Run in development mode:
   ```bash
   # Terminal 1: Start Vite dev server
   npm run dev
   
   # Terminal 2: Start Electron (set env variable first)
   # Windows PowerShell:
   $env:VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL = "http://localhost:5173/"
   npx electron .
   
   # Windows CMD:
   set VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173/ && npx electron .
   
   # Linux/Mac:
   VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173/ npx electron .
   ```

4. Build for production:
   ```bash
   npm run build
   ```

## Usage

### Opening a Mod Folder

1. Click **📁 Open Mod Folder** in the sidebar
2. Navigate to your Stationpedia Ascended mod folder
3. The editor will load all content:
   - `descriptions.json` - Device descriptions
   - `guides/` folder - Game guides
   - `game-mechanics/` folder - Mechanics pages

### Editing Content

#### Text Formatting

Use the toolbar or keyboard shortcuts:
- **Bold**: Ctrl+B
- **Italic**: Ctrl+I
- **Underline**: Ctrl+U
- **Headings**: H1, H2, H3 buttons
- **Lists**: Bullet and numbered lists
- **Code**: Inline code blocks

#### Inserting Links

1. Click the **🔗 Link** button in the toolbar
2. Search for the target page by name or key
3. Click to insert a `{THING:DeviceKey}` reference

#### Source View

Toggle between visual editing and raw HTML/TMP source:
- Click **</> Source** to view/edit raw markup
- Click **📝 Visual** to return to rich editing

### Saving

- Press **Ctrl+S** or click the **💾 Save** button
- Backups are automatically created in a `.backups` folder

### Preview

The right panel shows an approximate preview of how content will appear in-game:
- Collapsible sections
- Logic types table
- Operational details hierarchy
- Slot information

## Folder Structure

Expected mod folder structure:

```
your-mod-folder/
├── descriptions.json      # Main device descriptions
├── guides/                 # Game guide JSON files
│   ├── guide-1.json
│   └── guide-2.json
├── game-mechanics/         # Mechanics JSON files
│   ├── mechanic-1.json
│   └── mechanic-2.json
└── assets/                 # Optional image assets
    └── image.png
```

### descriptions.json Format

```json
[
  {
    "deviceKey": "ItemWrench",
    "displayName": "Wrench",
    "pageDescription": "<p>The wrench is used to...</p>",
    "operationalDetails": [
      {
        "title": "Usage",
        "description": "How to use the wrench..."
      }
    ],
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Setting": {
        "description": "Current setting value",
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "0-100"
      }
    }
  }
]
```

## Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| Ctrl+S | Save all changes |
| Ctrl+B | Bold text |
| Ctrl+I | Italic text |
| Ctrl+U | Underline text |
| Ctrl+Z | Undo |
| Ctrl+Y | Redo |

## Development

### Tech Stack

- **Electron 28** - Desktop framework
- **React 18** - UI components
- **TypeScript 5.3** - Type safety
- **Vite 5** - Build tool
- **TipTap 2** - Rich text editor
- **Zustand 4** - State management
- **Fuse.js 7** - Fuzzy search
- **TailwindCSS 3** - Styling

### Project Structure

```
src/
├── main/           # Electron main process
│   └── index.ts    # Window creation, IPC handlers
├── preload/        # Electron preload scripts
│   └── index.ts    # Safe IPC exposure
└── renderer/       # React application
    ├── components/ # UI components
    ├── services/   # File IO, indexing, validation
    ├── store/      # Zustand state management
    ├── models/     # TypeScript interfaces
    └── styles/     # TailwindCSS styles
```

### Scripts

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `npm run dev` | Start Vite dev server |
| `npm run build` | Build for production |
| `npm run type-check` | Run TypeScript checks |
| `npm run preview` | Preview production build |

# Stationpedia Editor

A rich desktop editor for creating and editing Stationpedia content for the Stationeers game mod "Stationpedia Ascended".

![Electron](https://img.shields.io/badge/Electron-28.1-blue)
![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-18.2-blue)
![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-5.3-blue)

## Features

- 📝 **Rich Text Editing** - Word processor-style editing with TipTap
- 🔗 **Link Picker** - Easily insert cross-references to other Stationpedia pages
- 👁️ **Live Preview** - See how content will appear in-game
- 🔍 **Fast Search** - Fuzzy search across all content with Fuse.js
- ✅ **Validation** - Real-time error checking for broken links and syntax
- 💾 **Auto-backup** - Automatic backup creation when saving
- 📊 **Operational Details Editor** - Drag-and-drop editing of device operation info

## Installation

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+ 
- npm or yarn

### Setup

1. Navigate to the StationpediaEditor directory:
   ```bash
   cd StationpediaEditor
   ```

2. Install dependencies:
   ```bash
   npm install
   ```

3. Run in development mode:
   ```bash
   # Terminal 1: Start Vite dev server
   npm run dev
   
   # Terminal 2: Start Electron (set env variable first)
   # Windows PowerShell:
   $env:VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL = "http://localhost:5173/"
   npx electron .
   
   # Windows CMD:
   set VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173/ && npx electron .
   
   # Linux/Mac:
   VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173/ npx electron .
   ```

4. Build for production:
   ```bash
   npm run build
   ```

## Usage

### Opening a Mod Folder

1. Click **📁 Open Mod Folder** in the sidebar
2. Navigate to your Stationpedia Ascended mod folder
3. The editor will load all content:
   - `descriptions.json` - Device descriptions
   - `guides/` folder - Game guides
   - `game-mechanics/` folder - Mechanics pages

### Editing Content

#### Text Formatting

Use the toolbar or keyboard shortcuts:
- **Bold**: Ctrl+B
- **Italic**: Ctrl+I
- **Underline**: Ctrl+U
- **Headings**: H1, H2, H3 buttons
- **Lists**: Bullet and numbered lists
- **Code**: Inline code blocks

#### Inserting Links

1. Click the **🔗 Link** button in the toolbar
2. Search for the target page by name or key
3. Click to insert a `{THING:DeviceKey}` reference

#### Source View

Toggle between visual editing and raw HTML/TMP source:
- Click **</> Source** to view/edit raw markup
- Click **📝 Visual** to return to rich editing

### Saving

- Press **Ctrl+S** or click the **💾 Save** button
- Backups are automatically created in a `.backups` folder

### Preview

The right panel shows an approximate preview of how content will appear in-game:
- Collapsible sections
- Logic types table
- Operational details hierarchy
- Slot information

## Folder Structure

Expected mod folder structure:

```
your-mod-folder/
├── descriptions.json      # Main device descriptions
├── guides/                 # Game guide JSON files
│   ├── guide-1.json
│   └── guide-2.json
├── game-mechanics/         # Mechanics JSON files
│   ├── mechanic-1.json
│   └── mechanic-2.json
└── assets/                 # Optional image assets
    └── image.png
```

### descriptions.json Format

```json
[
  {
    "deviceKey": "ItemWrench",
    "displayName": "Wrench",
    "pageDescription": "<p>The wrench is used to...</p>",
    "operationalDetails": [
      {
        "title": "Usage",
        "description": "How to use the wrench..."
      }
    ],
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Setting": {
        "description": "Current setting value",
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "0-100"
      }
    }
  }
]
```

## Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| Ctrl+S | Save all changes |
| Ctrl+B | Bold text |
| Ctrl+I | Italic text |
| Ctrl+U | Underline text |
| Ctrl+Z | Undo |
| Ctrl+Y | Redo |

## Development

### Tech Stack

- **Electron 28** - Desktop framework
- **React 18** - UI components
- **TypeScript 5.3** - Type safety
- **Vite 5** - Build tool
- **TipTap 2** - Rich text editor
- **Zustand 4** - State management
- **Fuse.js 7** - Fuzzy search
- **TailwindCSS 3** - Styling

### Project Structure

```
src/
├── main/           # Electron main process
│   └── index.ts    # Window creation, IPC handlers
├── preload/        # Electron preload scripts
│   └── index.ts    # Safe IPC exposure
└── renderer/       # React application
    ├── components/ # UI components
    ├── services/   # File IO, indexing, validation
    ├── store/      # Zustand state management
    ├── models/     # TypeScript interfaces
    └── styles/     # TailwindCSS styles
```

### Scripts

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `npm run dev` | Start Vite dev server |
| `npm run build` | Build for production |
| `npm run type-check` | Run TypeScript checks |
| `npm run preview` | Preview production build |

## License

MIT - Created for the Stationeers modding community.

2. Create a feature branch
3. Make your changes
4. Submit a pull request

- [Electron](https://www.electronjs.org/) - Desktop app framework

# Stationpedia Editor

A modern GUI application for editing Stationeers `descriptions.json` files.

## Features

- 🎨 **Stationeers-themed UI** - Orange, blue, and white color scheme
- 📂 **Category Navigation** - Devices organized by type and subcategory
- 🔍 **Search & Filter** - Quick device lookup
- ✏️ **Visual Editor** - Edit device properties with forms
- 💾 **Auto-backup** - Creates backups before saving
- ⚙️ **Operational Details** - Easy add/edit/remove interface
- 🎰 **Slot Management** - Manage device slots visually

## Building the Application

### Prerequisites
- .NET 8 SDK or later
- Windows 10/11

### Build Steps

1. Open terminal in the `StationpediaEditor` directory
2. Run: `dotnet restore`
3. Run: `dotnet build -c Release`
4. The executable will be in `bin/Release/net8.0-windows/`

### Creating a Single EXE

To create a single-file executable:

```powershell
dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true
```

The self-contained EXE will be in `bin/Release/net8.0-windows/win-x64/publish/`

## Usage

1. Launch `StationpediaEditor.exe`
2. Click **"📁 Open File"** and select your `descriptions.json`
3. Browse categories or search for devices
4. Select a device to edit its properties
5. Click **"💾 Save"** when done

## Technology Stack

- **Framework**: .NET 8 WPF
- **UI Library**: ModernWPF
- **MVVM**: CommunityToolkit.Mvvm
- **JSON**: Newtonsoft.Json

## Screenshots

The app features:
- Dark theme with Stationeers orange/blue accents
- Three-panel layout (Categories | Devices | Editor)
- Real-time search and filtering
- Visual tags showing device categories
- Form-based editing with validation

## License

Created for the Stationeers modding community.

import React from 'react';

interface LoadingSpinnerProps {
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';
  className?: string;
}

export const LoadingSpinner: React.FC<LoadingSpinnerProps> = ({
  size = 'md',
  className = '',
}) => {
  const sizeClasses = {
    sm: 'w-4 h-4 border-2',
    md: 'w-6 h-6 border-2',
    lg: 'w-10 h-10 border-3',
  };

  return (
    <div
      className={`
        ${sizeClasses[size]}
        border-stationpedia-accent
        border-t-transparent
        rounded-full
        animate-spin
        ${className}
      `}
      role="status"
      aria-label="Loading"
    />
  );
};

// Full page loading overlay
export const LoadingOverlay: React.FC<{ message?: string }> = ({ message }) => {
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-stationpedia-bg/80 flex flex-col items-center justify-center z-50">
      <LoadingSpinner size="lg" />
      {message && (
        <p className="mt-4 text-stationpedia-text-muted text-sm animate-pulse">
          {message}
        </p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

// Skeleton loading placeholder
export const Skeleton: React.FC<{
  className?: string;
  variant?: 'text' | 'circular' | 'rectangular';
}> = ({ className = '', variant = 'text' }) => {
  const variantClasses = {
    text: 'h-4 rounded',
    circular: 'rounded-full',
    rectangular: 'rounded',
  };

  return (
    <div
      className={`
        animate-pulse
        bg-stationpedia-border
        ${variantClasses[variant]}
        ${className}
      `}
    />
  );
};

// Card skeleton for sidebar items
export const SidebarItemSkeleton: React.FC = () => {
  return (
    <div className="px-4 py-3 animate-pulse">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <div className="w-5 h-5 rounded bg-stationpedia-border" />
        <div className="flex-1">
          <div className="h-4 bg-stationpedia-border rounded w-3/4 mb-2" />
          <div className="h-3 bg-stationpedia-border/50 rounded w-1/2" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

// Editor skeleton
export const EditorSkeleton: React.FC = () => {
  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col bg-stationpedia-surface border-r border-stationpedia-border">
      {/* Toolbar skeleton */}
      <div className="bg-stationpedia-bg border-b border-stationpedia-border p-2 flex gap-2">
        {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].map((i) => (
          <div
            key={i}
            className="w-8 h-8 rounded bg-stationpedia-border animate-pulse"
          />
        ))}
      </div>
      
      {/* Content skeleton */}
      <div className="flex-1 p-4 space-y-4">
        <div className="h-6 bg-stationpedia-border rounded w-1/3 animate-pulse" />
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <div className="h-4 bg-stationpedia-border/70 rounded w-full animate-pulse" />
          <div className="h-4 bg-stationpedia-border/70 rounded w-5/6 animate-pulse" />
          <div className="h-4 bg-stationpedia-border/70 rounded w-4/5 animate-pulse" />
        </div>
        <div className="h-4 bg-stationpedia-border/50 rounded w-2/3 animate-pulse" />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

