    );
  }

  // Handle markdown guides/mechanics - show a simple text editor
  const isMarkdownContent = (device as any)._isMarkdown === true;
  
  if (isMarkdownContent) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-stationpedia-bg p-4">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
          <span className="text-lg font-bold text-stationpedia-accent">
            📖 {device.displayName || device.deviceKey}
          </span>
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Markdown Guide</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <label className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Content (Markdown)</label>
          <textarea
            className="flex-1 bg-stationpedia-panel border border-stationpedia-border rounded p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm resize-none"
            value={device.pageDescription || ''}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateDevice({ pageDescription: e.target.value })}
            placeholder="Enter markdown content..."
          />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }
```

- oldString:

```

    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-500">
        Select a device to edit
      </div>
    );
  }
```

```
namespace StationpediaAscended.Data
{
    [Serializable]
    public class DescriptionsRoot
    {
        public string version;
        public List<DeviceDescriptions> devices;
        public List<GuideDescription> guides;  // Custom guides that appear under the Guides button
        public GenericDescriptionsData genericDescriptions;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// A custom guide page that appears under the "Guides" button in Stationpedia.
    /// Uses the same OperationalDetails format as devices for consistent editing.
    /// </summary>
    [Serializable]
    public class GuideDescription
    {
        /// <summary>Unique key for this guide (e.g., "DaylightSensorGuide")</summary>
        public string guideKey;
        
        /// <summary>Display name shown on the guide button (e.g., "Daylight Sensor Guide")</summary>
        public string displayName;
        
        /// <summary>Main description text at the top of the guide page</summary>
        public string pageDescription;
        
        /// <summary>Operational details sections for the guide content</summary>
        [JsonProperty("operationalDetails")]
        public List<OperationalDetail> operationalDetails;
        
        [JsonProperty("OperationalDetails")]
        public List<OperationalDetail> OperationalDetailsAlt { set { operationalDetails = value; } }
        
        /// <summary>Optional: hex color for section titles</summary>
        public string operationalDetailsTitleColor;
        
        /// <summary>If true, generates a Table of Contents</summary>
        public bool generateToc { get; set; } = false;
        
        /// <summary>Custom title for the TOC panel</summary>
        public string tocTitle { get; set; }
        
        /// <summary>Custom background color for sections</summary>
        public string operationalDetailsBackgroundColor { get; set; }
        
        /// <summary>Button color: "blue" (default, like Universe), "orange" (like Guides), or hex color</summary>
        public string buttonColor { get; set; } = "blue";
        
        /// <summary>Sort order - lower numbers appear first</summary>
        public int sortOrder { get; set; } = 100;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class DeviceDescriptions
```

```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Assets.Scripts;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using UnityEngine;

namespace StationpediaAscended.Data
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Loads and manages custom guides from descriptions.json.
    /// These guides appear under the "Guides" button in Stationpedia.
    /// </summary>
    public static class JsonGuideLoader
    {
        private static Dictionary<string, GuideDescription> _loadedGuides = new Dictionary<string, GuideDescription>();
        private static bool _guidesRegistered = false;

        /// <summary>
        /// Load guides from the parsed DescriptionsRoot data
        /// </summary>
        public static void LoadGuides(DescriptionsRoot data)
        {
            _loadedGuides.Clear();

            if (data?.guides == null || data.guides.Count == 0)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] No custom guides found in descriptions.json");
                return;
            }

            foreach (var guide in data.guides)
            {
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(guide.guideKey))
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Skipping guide with no guideKey");
                    continue;
                }

                _loadedGuides[guide.guideKey] = guide;
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Loaded guide: {guide.displayName ?? guide.guideKey}");
            }

            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Loaded {_loadedGuides.Count} custom guides from JSON");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Register all loaded guides as Stationpedia pages
        /// </summary>
        public static void RegisterGuidePages()
        {
            if (_guidesRegistered) return;

            foreach (var kvp in _loadedGuides)
            {
                try
                {
                    var guide = kvp.Value;
                    
                    // Create a StationpediaPage for this guide
                    var page = new StationpediaPage
                    {
                        Key = guide.guideKey,
                        Title = guide.displayName ?? guide.guideKey
                    };

                    // Set introductory text from pageDescription
                    page.Text = guide.pageDescription ?? "";

                    // Register the page
                    Stationpedia.Register(page, false);

                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Registered guide page: {guide.guideKey}");
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Log?.LogError($"Error registering guide {kvp.Key}: {ex.Message}");
                }
            }

            _guidesRegistered = true;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Get all loaded guides sorted by sortOrder
        /// </summary>
        public static List<GuideDescription> GetAllGuides()
        {
            return _loadedGuides.Values
                .OrderBy(g => g.sortOrder)
                .ThenBy(g => g.displayName ?? g.guideKey)
                .ToList();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Get a specific guide by key
        /// </summary>
        public static GuideDescription GetGuide(string guideKey)
        {
            if (_loadedGuides.TryGetValue(guideKey, out var guide))
            {
                return guide;
            }
            return null;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Check if a guide exists
        /// </summary>
        public static bool HasGuide(string guideKey)
        {
            return _loadedGuides.ContainsKey(guideKey);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Convert a GuideDescription to DeviceDescriptions for rendering
        /// (Reuses existing operational details rendering logic)
        /// </summary>
        public static DeviceDescriptions ToDeviceDescriptions(GuideDescription guide)
        {
            if (guide == null) return null;

            return new DeviceDescriptions
            {
                deviceKey = guide.guideKey,
                displayName = guide.displayName,
                pageDescription = guide.pageDescription,
                operationalDetails = guide.operationalDetails,
                operationalDetailsTitleColor = guide.operationalDetailsTitleColor,
                generateToc = guide.generateToc,
                tocTitle = guide.tocTitle,
                operationalDetailsBackgroundColor = guide.operationalDetailsBackgroundColor
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Clear all loaded guides (for hot-reload)
        /// </summary>
        public static void Clear()
        {
            _loadedGuides.Clear();
            _guidesRegistered = false;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Parse button color from guide settings
        /// </summary>
        public static Color GetButtonColor(GuideDescription guide)
        {
            if (guide == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(guide.buttonColor))
            {
                // Default to blue (like Universe buttons)
                return new Color(0f, 0.54f, 0.90f, 1f); // #008AE6
            }

            var colorStr = guide.buttonColor.ToLower();
            
            if (colorStr == "blue")
            {
                return new Color(0f, 0.54f, 0.90f, 1f); // #008AE6
            }
            else if (colorStr == "orange")
            {
                return new Color(1f, 0.42f, 0.09f, 1f); // #FF6A18
            }
            else if (colorStr == "green")
            {
                return new Color(0.27f, 0.68f, 0.51f, 1f); // #44AD83
            }
            else if (colorStr.StartsWith("#"))
            {
                // Try to parse hex color
                if (ColorUtility.TryParseHtmlString(colorStr, out var parsedColor))
                {
                    return parsedColor;
                }
            }

            // Default to blue
            return new Color(0f, 0.54f, 0.90f, 1f);
        }
    }
}

```

                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    // Load custom guides from JSON
                    if (data?.guides != null && data.guides.Count > 0)
                    {
                        Data.JsonGuideLoader.LoadGuides(data);
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    Log?.LogWarning($"descriptions.json not found");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Log?.LogError($"Error loading descriptions: {ex}");
            }
        }

        // Static version of ApplyHarmonyPatches for ScriptEngine path
```

```
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageGuides - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageGuides_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create buttons for all JSON-defined guides
                CreateJsonGuideButtons(__instance);
                
                // Add custom guide button for Daylight Sensor Guide (markdown-based, kept for compatibility)
                CreateCustomGuideButton(__instance);
                
                // Wrap vanilla guides in a collapsible category
                WrapVanillaGuidesInCategory(__instance);
                
                // Modify layout to two columns
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying guide layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create buttons for all guides defined in descriptions.json
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateJsonGuideButtons(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                var guides = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetAllGuides();
                if (guides == null || guides.Count == 0)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Register guide pages first
                Data.JsonGuideLoader.RegisterGuidePages();

                foreach (var guide in guides)
                {
                    CreateGuideButton(stationpedia, guide);
                }

                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Created {guides.Count} JSON guide buttons");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating JSON guide buttons: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a single guide button from a GuideDescription
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideButton(Stationpedia stationpedia, Data.GuideDescription guide)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia?.ListSearchPrefab == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                    return;

                var button = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<SPDAListItem>(
                    stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab,
                    stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);

                if (button == null) return;

                // Set button text
                button.Apply(guide.displayName ?? guide.guideKey);

                // Set up click handler
                var guideKey = guide.guideKey; // Capture for closure
                if (button.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.AddListener(() =>
                    {
                        stationpedia.SetPage(guideKey, true);
                    });
                }

                // Apply button color
                var buttonImage = button.gameObject.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
                if (buttonImage != null)
                {
                    buttonImage.color = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetButtonColor(guide);
                }

                button.SetSpecial();

                // Position at top
                button.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating guide button for {guide?.guideKey}: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a custom guide button for the Daylight Sensor Guide
        /// Positioned at the TOP of the guide list (before vanilla guides)
        /// Styled with blue color (like Universe buttons)
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateCustomGuideButton(Stationpedia stationpedia)
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Render a JSON-defined guide page using operational details
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderJsonGuidePage(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform, string guideKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;

                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                // Get the guide data
                var guide = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetGuide(guideKey);
                if (guide == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Guide not found: {guideKey}");
                    return;
                }

                // Convert to DeviceDescriptions for rendering
                var guideData = Data.JsonGuideLoader.ToDeviceDescriptions(guide);
                if (guideData?.operationalDetails == null || guideData.operationalDetails.Count == 0)
                {
                    // If no operational details, just show the page description
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Guide {guideKey} has no operational details");
                    return;
                }

                // Use the standard CreateOperationalDetailsCategory to render the guide
                CreateOperationalDetailsCategory(page, contentTransform, guideData);
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Rendered JSON guide: {guideKey}");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error rendering JSON guide {guideKey}: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Render the Daylight Sensor Guide page using operational details
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderDaylightSensorGuidePage(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform)
```

```
/**
 * Guide document for custom guides in descriptions.json
 * These appear under the "Guides" button in Stationpedia
 */
export interface GuideDocument {
  // Core identification (guides use guideKey, but we add deviceKey for compatibility)
  guideKey: string;
  deviceKey?: string; // Optional alias for guideKey for compatibility
  displayName?: string | null;

  // Description field
  pageDescription?: string;

  // Operational details section (same format as devices)
  operationalDetails?: OperationalDetail[];
  OperationalDetails?: OperationalDetail[]; // Handle old format
  operationalDetailsTitleColor?: string;
  operationalDetailsBackgroundColor?: string;
  generateToc?: boolean;
  tocTitle?: string;

  // Guide-specific fields
  buttonColor?: string; // "blue", "orange", "green", or hex color
  sortOrder?: number; // Lower numbers appear first

  // Preserve unknown fields for round-trip compatibility
  [key: string]: unknown;
}
```

- oldString:

  // Get items based on active category
  const categoryItems = useMemo(() => {
    if (!workspace) return [];
    switch (activeCategory) {
      case 'devices':
        return workspace.devices || [];
      case 'guides':
        return (workspace.guides || []) as any[]; // Cast to any[] to avoid type issues with union
      case 'mechanics':
        return (workspace.mechanics || []) as any[];
      default:
        return [];
    }
  }, [workspace, activeCategory]);

- newString:

```
/**
 * Serialize a single device, guide, or mechanic to JSON
 */
function serializeItem(item: DeviceDocument | GuideDocument): any {
  const json = { ...item };

  // Denormalize field names (operationalDetails → OperationalDetails)
  if (json.operationalDetails) {
    (json as any).OperationalDetails = serializeOperationalDetails(json.operationalDetails);
    delete json.operationalDetails;
  }

  return json;
}

/**
 * Serialize a single device to JSON (legacy name, delegates to serializeItem)
 */
function serializeDevice(device: DeviceDocument): any {
  return serializeItem(device);
}
```

- oldString:

```
/**
 * Serialize a single device to JSON
 */
function serializeDevice(device: DeviceDocument): any {
  const json = { ...device };

  // Denormalize field names (operationalDetails → OperationalDetails)
  if (json.operationalDetails) {
    (json as any).OperationalDetails = serializeOperationalDetails(json.operationalDetails);
    delete json.operationalDetails;
  }

  return json;
}
```


</details></tool-use>

- newString:

```
  const isMarkdownContent = (device as any)._isMarkdown === true;
  
  // Get the key - either deviceKey or guideKey
  const itemKey = (device as any).deviceKey || (device as any).guideKey || 'Unknown';
  
  if (isMarkdownContent) {
    return (
      <div className="stationpedia-renderer p-6" data-testid="stationpedia-renderer">
        <DeviceHeader
          displayName={device.displayName}
          deviceKey={itemKey}
          titleColor="#ff6a00"
        />
        <div className="bg-stationpedia-panel border border-stationpedia-border rounded p-4 mt-4">
          <pre className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-white font-sans text-sm leading-relaxed">
            {device.pageDescription || '(No content)'}
          </pre>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Combine page description parts
  const fullPageDescription = useMemo(() => {
    const parts: string[] = [];

    if (device.pageDescriptionPrepend && typeof device.pageDescriptionPrepend === 'string') {
      parts.push(device.pageDescriptionPrepend);
    }

    if (device.pageDescription) {
      parts.push(device.pageDescription);
    }

    if (device.pageDescriptionAppend && typeof device.pageDescriptionAppend === 'string') {
      parts.push(device.pageDescriptionAppend);
    }

    return parts.join('\n\n');
  }, [device?.pageDescription, device?.pageDescriptionPrepend, device?.pageDescriptionAppend]);

  return (
    <div className="stationpedia-renderer p-6" data-testid="stationpedia-renderer">
      {/* Device Header */}
      <DeviceHeader
        displayName={device.displayName}
        deviceKey={itemKey}
        titleColor={device.operationalDetailsTitleColor}
      />
```

- oldString:

  return (

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor\src\renderer\editor\DeviceSectionsEditor.tsx`
- newString:

```
  // Add operational detail
  const addOperationalDetail = (parentPath?: number[]) => {
    if (!device) return;
    
    const newDetails = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(device.operationalDetails || []));
    const newDetail: OperationalDetail = { title: 'New Section', description: '' };
    
    if (parentPath && parentPath.length > 0) {
      let parent = newDetails[parentPath[0]];
      for (let i = 1; i < parentPath.length; i++) {
        parent = parent.children[parentPath[i]];
      }
      parent.children = [...(parent.children || []), newDetail];
    } else {
      newDetails.push(newDetail);
    }
    
    onUpdateDevice({ operationalDetails: newDetails });
  };

  // Update a property of an operational detail
  const updateDetailProperty = (path: number[], property: string, value: any) => {
    if (!device) return;
    
    const newDetails = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(device.operationalDetails || []));
    let detail = newDetails[path[0]];
    for (let i = 1; i < path.length; i++) {
      detail = detail.children[path[i]];
    }
    detail[property] = value;
    onUpdateDevice({ operationalDetails: newDetails });
  };

  // Get detail at path
  const getDetailAtPath = (details: OperationalDetail[], path: number[]): OperationalDetail | null => {
    if (!details || path.length === 0) return null;
    let detail = details[path[0]];
    if (!detail) return null;
    for (let i = 1; i < path.length; i++) {
      if (!detail.children || !detail.children[path[i]]) return null;
      detail = detail.children[path[i]];
    }
    return detail;
  };
```

- oldString:

        parent = parent.children[parentPath[i]];
      }
      parent.children = [...(parent.children || []), newDetail];
    } else {
      newDetails.push(newDetail);
    }
    
    onUpdateDevice({ operationalDetails: newDetails });
  };

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor\src\renderer\editor\editorStore.ts`
- newString:

```
  clearDirty: () => {
    set({ isDirty: false });
  },

  addGuide: () => {
    let newGuideKey = '';
    set((state) => {
      if (!state.workspace) return state;

      // Generate unique guide key
      const baseKey = 'NewGuide';
      let counter = 1;
      let candidateKey = baseKey;
      
      while (state.workspace.guides?.some(g => g.guideKey === candidateKey)) {
        candidateKey = `${baseKey}${counter}`;
        counter++;
      }
      
      newGuideKey = candidateKey;
      
      // Create new guide
      const newGuide: GuideDocument = {
        guideKey: newGuideKey,
        displayName: 'New Guide',
        pageDescription: 'Guide description goes here...',
        operationalDetails: [],
        deviceKey: newGuideKey, // For compatibility
      };
      
      const newWorkspace = {
        ...state.workspace,
        guides: [...(state.workspace.guides || []), newGuide],
      };
      
      return {
        workspace: newWorkspace,
        isDirty: true,
      };
    });
    return newGuideKey;
  },

  reset: () => {
```

- oldString:

```

    set({ isDirty: false });
  },

  reset: () => {
```

The user has three main requests:

1. Add ability to create "inline" sections in operational details (non-nested sections). Looking at the solid fuel generator example, there must be operational details that don't nest and appear inline.

2. Add ability to add entire new top-level sections (not just operational details, but additional sections like multiple "operational details" sections)

3. Fix the guide system:
   - The example guide created in descriptions.json isn't showing up in the mod
   - The Stationeers Survival Manual (currently loaded from markdown) should be converted to JSON format
   - Convert ALL current guides from markdown to JSON format
   - Add ability to create new guides in the editor's content tree menu

Let me break down what needs to be done:

**Request 1: Inline sections**
- Need to understand what "inline" means in this context
- Looking at the solid fuel generator, I need to check what makes a section "inline"
- Likely means non-collapsible or non-nested operational details
- Need to add UI controls in DeviceSectionsEditor to toggle this

**Request 2: Add new top-level sections**
- Currently the editor only shows operational details
- Need to add ability to add multiple sections like "Logic Descriptions", "Mode Descriptions", etc.
- This is a bigger UI change

**Request 3: Guide system hookup**
- The example guide in descriptions.json isn't appearing in-game
- Need to check how the mod is loading guides
- The markdown guides need to be converted to JSON
- Need to find all markdown guide files and convert them
- Add "Add New Guide" button in ContentTree

Let me start by checking the current state of things:

1. First, let me look at the solid fuel generator example to understand "inline" sections
2. Then check how guides are currently being loaded in the mod
3. Find the markdown guide files
4. Implement the changes

Let me create a todo list for this:
- [ ] Add inline/non-nested section toggle in editor


- [ ] Support creating multiple top-level sections beyond just operational details
- [ ] Verify JSON guides are properly loaded and displayed in-game
- [ ] Locate all markdown guide files and convert them to JSON

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

</details></think>

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

The user is showing me that the new properties panel I added is overlapping with content in the editor. Looking at the screenshot, I can see there's a "Section Properties" panel with checkboxes and inputs for TOC ID, Image, and YouTube that appears to be overlapping with the content below it.

The issue is likely that I added the properties panel inside the editor area which has a fixed height calculation, and the panel is taking up space but the textarea isn't accounting for it properly.

Looking at the code I added:
```tsx
<textarea
  ...
  style={{ height: 'calc(100% - 100px)' }}
/>

{/* Properties Panel - shown when operational detail is selected */}
{selection?.type === 'operationalDetail' && ...}

{/* Rich Text Formatting Toolbar */}
```

The problem is that the textarea has a fixed height calculation of `calc(100% - 100px)` which doesn't account for the properties panel. When the properties panel appears, it pushes the toolbar down but doesn't reduce the textarea height, causing overlap.

I need to either:
1. Make the textarea height dynamic based on whether the properties panel is shown
2. Place the properties panel in a different location
3. Adjust the height calculation

The best solution is to adjust the textarea height to account for the properties panel when it's visible. I'll need to calculate the additional height needed for the properties panel (approximately 120-150px when visible).

Let me fix this by making the textarea height conditional based on whether we're showing the properties panel.

3. Please change all the scrolling handles to white from blue
4. In game when i click the guides button I see the daylight sensor guide and then teh vanilla guides button. The first time I uncollapsed the dropdown I saw the other vanilla guides but then I also saw our example guide in there and that is wrong. It should be up with the daylight sensor guide. But the daylight sensor guide shouldnt be there anyway since it is all wrong and in markdown format. 
5. What I want right now is for the guides in the "guides" folder to all be converted into our new format in the description. I want you to take a look at this  help file. This xml is where the game loads the guides from-the game devs made it xml to make it easy for people to add new guides. We aren't going to just make xmls becuase we want to add ropdowns and stuff but I think we can fuse their xml method with our dropdowns and stuff and be able to make really great guides that aren't forced into using the operational details/nesting for everything. The guides and game mechanics pages that we are making should be formatted like the xml guides just iwth the option of also adding the nested stuff. So can you please take a look at that xml and then implement the ability to edit guides in that way and insert them into the game through our stationpedia ascended mod?

---

[map[explanation:Fix the insertLink function to not use prompt() - use a simple default instead filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor\src\renderer\editor\DeviceSectionsEditor.tsx newString:  const insertLink = useCallback(() => {
    const range = getSelectionRange();
    if (!range) return;
    
    // Use selected text as the page name, or a placeholder
    const pageName = range.selectedText || 'PageName';
    if (range.selectedText) {
      // Wrap selected text as link (selected text becomes link target)
      insertAtCursor(`<link=${pageName}>`, '</link>');
    } else {
      // Insert placeholder link that user can edit
      insertAtCursor(`<link=${pageName}>${pageName}</link>`, '');
    }
  }, [getSelectionRange, insertAtCursor]); oldString:  const insertLink = useCallback(() => {
    const range = getSelectionRange();
    if (!range) return;
    
    const pageName = prompt('Enter page name to link to:', range.selectedText || '');
    if (pageName) {
      if (range.selectedText) {
        // Wrap selected text as link
        insertAtCursor(`<link=${pageName}>`, '</link>');
      } else {
        // Insert new link with page name as both link and display text
        insertAtCursor(`<link=${pageName}>${pageName}</link>`, '');
      }
    }
  }, [getSelectionRange, insertAtCursor]);] map[explanation:Fix Section Properties panel styling - use dark blue background with white text filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor\src\renderer\editor\DeviceSectionsEditor.tsx newString:            <div className="mt-2 p-2 bg-stationpedia-surface border border-stationpedia-border rounded">
              <div className="text-xs font-medium text-stationpedia-accent mb-2">📋 Section Properties</div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                {/* Collapsible checkbox */}
                <label className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-white">
                  <input
                    type="checkbox"
                    checked={detail.collapsible || false}
                    onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'collapsible', e.target.checked)}
                    className="rounded bg-stationpedia-surface border-stationpedia-border"
                  />
                  📁 Collapsible
                </label>
                
                {/* TOC ID input */}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <span className="text-xs text-white">🔗 TOC ID:</span>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={detail.tocId || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'tocId', e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="optional"
                    className="flex-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-white placeholder-gray-500"
                  />
                </div>
                
                {/* Image file input */}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1 col-span-2">
                  <span className="text-xs text-white">🖼️ Image:</span>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={detail.imageFile || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'imageFile', e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="image-filename.png"
                    className="flex-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-white placeholder-gray-500"
                  />
                </div>
                
                {/* YouTube URL input */}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1 col-span-2">
                  <span className="text-xs text-white">📺 YouTube:</span>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={detail.youtubeUrl || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'youtubeUrl', e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Video ID"
                    className="flex-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-white placeholder-gray-500"
                  />
                </div>
                
                {/* YouTube Label input */}
                {detail.youtubeUrl && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 col-span-2">
                    <span className="text-xs text-white">Label:</span>
                    <input

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Create a single guide button from a GuideDescription
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideButton(Stationpedia stationpedia, Data.GuideDescription guide)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia?.ListSearchPrefab == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                    return;

                var button = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<SPDAListItem>(
                    stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab,
                    stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);

                if (button == null) return;

                // Mark this button as a custom guide (not vanilla) so it won't be wrapped
                button.gameObject.name = $"CustomGuide_{guide.guideKey}";

                // Set button text
                button.Apply(guide.displayName ?? guide.guideKey);

                // Set up click handler
                var guideKey = guide.guideKey; // Capture for closure
                if (button.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.AddListener(() =>
                    {
                        stationpedia.SetPage(guideKey, true);
                    });
                }

                // Apply button color
                var buttonImage = button.gameObject.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
                if (buttonImage != null)
                {
                    buttonImage.color = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetButtonColor(guide);
                }

                button.SetSpecial();

                // Position at top
                button.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating guide button for {guide?.guideKey}: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

        /// <summary>
        /// Wrap all vanilla guide buttons in a collapsible "Vanilla Guides" category
        /// Positioned after the custom guide button, starts in COLLAPSED state
        /// </summary>
        private static void WrapVanillaGuidesInCategory(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Cannot wrap vanilla guides: missing components");
                    return;
                }

                var loreContainer = stationpedia.LoreGuideContents;
                
                // Collect all vanilla guide buttons (skip buttons that start with "CustomGuide_")
                var vanillaButtons = new List<SPDAListItem>();
                int childCount = loreContainer.childCount;
                
                for (int i = 0; i < childCount; i++)
                {
                    var child = loreContainer.GetChild(i);
                    
                    // Skip if this is a custom guide button (marked by name)
                    if (child.gameObject.name.StartsWith("CustomGuide_"))
                        continue;
                    
                    var listItem = child.GetComponent<SPDAListItem>();
                    if (listItem != null)
                    {
                        vanillaButtons.Add(listItem);
                    }
                }
```

        /// <summary>
        /// Wrap all vanilla guide buttons in a collapsible "Vanilla Guides" category
        /// Positioned after the custom guide button, starts in COLLAPSED state
        /// </summary>
        private static void WrapVanillaGuidesInCategory(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Cannot wrap vanilla guides: missing components");
                    return;
                }

                var loreContainer = stationpedia.LoreGuideContents;
                
                // Collect all vanilla guide buttons (skip the custom button which is at index 0)
                var vanillaButtons = new List<SPDAListItem>();
                int childCount = loreContainer.childCount;
                
                for (int i = 1; i < childCount; i++) // Start from index 1 (skip custom button at 0)
                {
                    var child = loreContainer.GetChild(i);
                    var listItem = child.GetComponent<SPDAListItem>();
                    if (listItem != null)
                    {
                        vanillaButtons.Add(listItem);
                    }
                }

        // Track if guides page has been initialized to prevent duplicates
        private static bool _guidesPageInitialized = false;
        private static HashSet<string> _createdGuideButtons = new HashSet<string>();

        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageGuides - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageGuides_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                // Check if we need to reinitialize (page was cleared)
                bool needsInit = !_guidesPageInitialized || _createdGuideButtons.Count == 0;
                
                // Also check if our custom buttons still exist in the hierarchy
                if (!needsInit && __instance.LoreGuideContents != null)
                {
                    bool foundCustomButton = false;
                    foreach (Transform child in __instance.LoreGuideContents)
                    {
                        if (child.gameObject.name.StartsWith("CustomGuide_") || 
                            child.gameObject.name == "VanillaGuidesHeader")
                        {
                            foundCustomButton = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (!foundCustomButton)
                    {
                        needsInit = true;
                        _createdGuideButtons.Clear();
                    }
                }
                
                if (!needsInit)
                {
                    // Already initialized, just refresh layout
                    HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
                    return;
                }
                
                // Create buttons for all JSON-defined guides
                CreateJsonGuideButtons(__instance);
                
                // Add the "Vanilla Guides" text header and arrange vanilla guides below it
                AddVanillaGuidesHeader(__instance);
                
                // Modify layout to two columns
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
                
                _guidesPageInitialized = true;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying guide layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create buttons for all guides defined in descriptions.json
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateJsonGuideButtons(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                var guides = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetAllGuides();
                if (guides == null || guides.Count == 0)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Register guide pages first
                Data.JsonGuideLoader.RegisterGuidePages();

                int createdCount = 0;
                foreach (var guide in guides)
                {
                    // Skip if already created
                    if (_createdGuideButtons.Contains(guide.guideKey))
                        continue;
                        
                    CreateGuideButton(stationpedia, guide);
                    _createdGuideButtons.Add(guide.guideKey);
                    createdCount++;
                }

                if (createdCount > 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Created {createdCount} JSON guide buttons");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating JSON guide buttons: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a single guide button from a GuideDescription
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideButton(Stationpedia stationpedia, Data.GuideDescription guide)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia?.ListSearchPrefab == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                    return;

                var button = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<SPDAListItem>(
                    stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab,
                    stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);

                if (button == null) return;

                // Mark this button as a custom guide (not vanilla) so it won't be wrapped
                button.gameObject.name = $"CustomGuide_{guide.guideKey}";

                // Set button text
                button.Apply(guide.displayName ?? guide.guideKey);

                // Set up click handler
                var guideKey = guide.guideKey; // Capture for closure
                if (button.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.AddListener(() =>
                    {
                        stationpedia.SetPage(guideKey, true);
                    });
                }

                // Apply button color

        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageGuides - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageGuides_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create buttons for all JSON-defined guides
                CreateJsonGuideButtons(__instance);
                
                // Add custom guide button for Daylight Sensor Guide (markdown-based, kept for compatibility)
                CreateCustomGuideButton(__instance);
                
                // Wrap vanilla guides in a collapsible category
                WrapVanillaGuidesInCategory(__instance);
                
                // Modify layout to two columns
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying guide layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create buttons for all guides defined in descriptions.json
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateJsonGuideButtons(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                var guides = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetAllGuides();
                if (guides == null || guides.Count == 0)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Register guide pages first
                Data.JsonGuideLoader.RegisterGuidePages();

                foreach (var guide in guides)
                {
                    CreateGuideButton(stationpedia, guide);
                }

                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Created {guides.Count} JSON guide buttons");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating JSON guide buttons: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a single guide button from a GuideDescription
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideButton(Stationpedia stationpedia, Data.GuideDescription guide)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia?.ListSearchPrefab == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                    return;

                var button = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<SPDAListItem>(
                    stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab,
                    stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);

                if (button == null) return;

                // Mark this button as a custom guide (not vanilla) so it won't be wrapped
                button.gameObject.name = $"CustomGuide_{guide.guideKey}";

                // Set button text
                button.Apply(guide.displayName ?? guide.guideKey);

                // Set up click handler
                var guideKey = guide.guideKey; // Capture for closure
                if (button.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.AddListener(() =>
                    {
                        stationpedia.SetPage(guideKey, true);
                    });
                }

                // Apply button color
                var buttonImage = button.gameObject.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
                if (buttonImage != null)
                {
                    buttonImage.color = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetButtonColor(guide);
                }

                button.SetSpecial();

                // Position at top
                button.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)

        /// <summary>
        /// Add a "Vanilla Guides" text header above the vanilla guides
        /// Instead of wrapping in a dropdown, just add a visual separator
        /// </summary>
        private static void AddVanillaGuidesHeader(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                var loreContainer = stationpedia.LoreGuideContents;
                
                // Check if header already exists
                foreach (Transform child in loreContainer)
                {
                    if (child.gameObject.name == "VanillaGuidesHeader")
                    {
                        return; // Already has header
                    }
                }
                
                // Count custom guide buttons to know where to place the header
                int customGuideCount = 0;
                for (int i = 0; i < loreContainer.childCount; i++)
                {
                    var child = loreContainer.GetChild(i);
                    if (child.gameObject.name.StartsWith("CustomGuide_"))
                    {
                        customGuideCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                // If there are vanilla guides (not just our custom ones), add a header
                int vanillaCount = loreContainer.childCount - customGuideCount;
                if (vanillaCount > 0)
                {
                    // Create header using a new GameObject with TextMeshProUGUI
                    var headerObj = new GameObject("VanillaGuidesHeader");
                    headerObj.transform.SetParent(loreContainer, false);
                    
                    // Add RectTransform for layout
                    var rectTransform = headerObj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                    rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 40);
                    
                    // Add LayoutElement to control sizing
                    var layoutElement = headerObj.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                    layoutElement.preferredHeight = 40;
                    layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
                    
                    // Add TextMeshPro text component
                    var textComponent = headerObj.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                    textComponent.text = "<color=#FF7A18>━━━━━ VANILLA GUIDES ━━━━━</color>";
                    textComponent.fontSize = 16;
                    textComponent.alignment = TMPro.TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
                    textComponent.color = new Color(1f, 0.478f, 0.094f, 1f); // #FF7A18 orange
                    textComponent.fontStyle = TMPro.FontStyles.Bold;
                    
                    // Position the header after custom guides
                    headerObj.transform.SetSiblingIndex(customGuideCount);
                    
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Added Vanilla Guides header (Custom: {customGuideCount}, Vanilla: {vanillaCount})");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error adding vanilla guides header: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageLore - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageLore_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying lore layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        #endregion
    }
}
```

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a custom guide button for the Daylight Sensor Guide
        /// Positioned at the TOP of the guide list (before vanilla guides)
        /// Styled with blue color (like Universe buttons)
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateCustomGuideButton(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Cannot create guide button: missing stationpedia components");
                    return;
                }

                // Clone the ListSearchPrefab to create our custom button
                var customButton = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<SPDAListItem>(
                    stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab, 
                    stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);

                if (customButton == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Failed to instantiate custom guide button");
                    return;
                }

                // Mark this button as a custom guide (not vanilla) so it won't be wrapped
                customButton.gameObject.name = "CustomGuide_DaylightSensorGuide";

                // Set button text
                customButton.Apply("Daylight Sensor Guide");

                // Set up the click handler to navigate to DaylightSensorGuide page
                if (customButton.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    customButton.InsertsButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                    customButton.InsertsButton.onClick.AddListener(() =>
                    {
                        stationpedia.SetPage("DaylightSensorGuide", true);
                    });
                }

                // Apply blue color styling (like Universe/Lore buttons)
                // Use the same styling as Lore guide buttons
                ApplyGuideButtonBlueStyle(customButton);

                // Position as FIRST SIBLING so it appears at the top
                customButton.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();

                ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Custom Daylight Sensor Guide button created successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating custom guide button: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Apply blue styling to a guide button (like the Universe/Lore guide buttons)
        /// </summary>
        private static void ApplyGuideButtonBlueStyle(SPDAListItem button)
        {
            try
            {
                if (button == null) return;

                // Get the button's Image component for background color
                var buttonImage = button.gameObject.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
                if (buttonImage != null)
                {
                    // Use a blue color similar to Universe buttons (#008AE6)
                    // This is a medium-light blue that matches the Universe/Lore button styling
                    buttonImage.color = new Color(0f, 0.54f, 0.90f, 1f); // #008AE6 equivalent
                }

                // Apply special indicator (like important guide buttons)
                button.SetSpecial(); // This applies the special styling

                // Set a guide icon (info/question mark icon)
                if (button.InsertImage != null)
                {
                    // Use a generic icon sprite if available
                    // The ImportantSearchImage is used for Guides, so we can reuse that pattern
                    // For now, we'll hide the icon or use the default
                    button.InsertImage.gameObject.SetActive(false); // Hide icon for cleaner look
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error applying guide button style: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Wrap all vanilla guide buttons in a collapsible "Vanilla Guides" category
        /// Positioned after the custom guide button, starts in COLLAPSED state
        /// </summary>
        private static void WrapVanillaGuidesInCategory(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Cannot wrap vanilla guides: missing components");
                    return;
                }

                var loreContainer = stationpedia.LoreGuideContents;
                
                // Collect all vanilla guide buttons (skip buttons that start with "CustomGuide_")
                var vanillaButtons = new List<SPDAListItem>();
                int childCount = loreContainer.childCount;
                
                for (int i = 0; i < childCount; i++)
                {
                    var child = loreContainer.GetChild(i);
                    
                    // Skip if this is a custom guide button (marked by name)
                    if (child.gameObject.name.StartsWith("CustomGuide_"))
                        continue;
                    
                    var listItem = child.GetComponent<SPDAListItem>();
                    if (listItem != null)
                    {
                        vanillaButtons.Add(listItem);
                    }
                }

                // If no vanilla guides, nothing to wrap
                if (vanillaButtons.Count == 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] No vanilla guides found to wrap");
                    return;
                }

                // Get the category prefab from Stationpedia
                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Cannot wrap vanilla guides: CategoryPrefab not found");
                    return;
                }

                // Create a new StationpediaCategory instance
                var vanillaCategory = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(categoryPrefab, loreContainer);
                if (vanillaCategory == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] Failed to instantiate Vanilla Guides category");
                    return;
                }

                // Set the category title to "Vanilla Guides"
                if (vanillaCategory.Title != null)
                {
                    vanillaCategory.Title.text = "Vanilla Guides";
                }

                // Move all vanilla guide buttons into the category's Contents
                foreach (var button in vanillaButtons)
                {
                    button.transform.SetParent(vanillaCategory.Contents, false);
                }

                // Position the category as the second child (after custom button at index 0)
                vanillaCategory.transform.SetSiblingIndex(1);

                // Set the category to COLLAPSED state by default
                if (vanillaCategory.Contents != null)
                {
                    vanillaCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false); // Hide contents = collapsed
                }

                // Update the collapse icon to show "not visible" state
                if (vanillaCategory.CollapseImage != null && vanillaCategory.NotVisibleImage != null)
                {
                    vanillaCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = vanillaCategory.NotVisibleImage;
                }

                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Wrapped {vanillaButtons.Count} vanilla guides in collapsible category");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error wrapping vanilla guides: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageLore - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageLore_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying lore layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        #endregion
    }
}
```

<summary>Tool use: **runSubagent**</summary>

**Input:**

- description: `Convert markdown guides to JSON`
- prompt:

```
Convert the following markdown guides to JSON format for Stationeers mod. You need to update the descriptions.json file at:
c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\descriptions.json

The JSON format for guides is (example from file):
```json
{
  "guideKey": "ExampleGuide",
  "displayName": "Example Custom Guide",
  "pageDescription": "This is an example of a custom guide created in descriptions.json.\n\nExpand the sections below to see more.",
  "generateToc": true,
  "tocTitle": "Contents",
  "buttonColor": "blue",
  "sortOrder": 10,
  "operationalDetails": [
    {
      "title": "Introduction",
      "tocId": "intro",
      "collapsible": true,
      "description": "Welcome to this example guide!"
    },
    {
      "title": "Nested Section",
      "tocId": "nested",
      "collapsible": true,
      "description": "This has children",
      "children": [
        {
          "title": "Child Section",
          "tocId": "child",
          "collapsible": true,
          "description": "Child content"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

IMPORTANT RULES for the conversion:
1. The markdown files are in c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\Guides\
2. Convert ONLY these files to guides (read them first):
   - Welcome To Stationeers.md -> guideKey "WelcomeGuide", sortOrder 1
   - beginners-guide-part1.md -> guideKey "BeginnersPart1", sortOrder 2
   - beginners-guide-part2.md -> guideKey "BeginnersPart2", sortOrder 3
   - beginners-guide-part3.md -> guideKey "BeginnersPart3", sortOrder 4
   - daylight-sensor-guide.md -> guideKey "DaylightSensorGuide", sortOrder 10
   - power-systems-guide.md -> guideKey "PowerSystemsGuide", sortOrder 20
   - airlock-guide.md -> guideKey "AirlockGuide", sortOrder 30
   - air-conditioning-guide.md -> guideKey "AirConditioningGuide", sortOrder 40

3. Keep the ExampleGuide in the guides array

4. Convert markdown sections (##, ###) into operationalDetails with:
   - H2 (##) sections become top-level operationalDetails
   - H3 (###) sections become children of their parent H2
   - Make them collapsible: true
   - Generate tocId from the title (lowercase, hyphenated)
   - Convert markdown formatting to TMP tags:
     - **bold** -> <b>bold</b>
     - *italic* -> <i>italic</i>
     - `code` -> <color=#FFAA00>code</color>
     - [link](url) -> <color=#008AE6>link</color>

5. For markdown lists (- item), convert to "items" array

6. For numbered lists (1. 2. 3.), convert to "steps" array

7. IMPORTANT: Keep descriptions reasonable length - truncate very long content with "..." if needed. The game has display limits.

8. Use buttonColor: "blue" for beginner guides, "orange" for intermediate/advanced

Read the descriptions.json file first to see the current structure. The "guides" array is near the beginning of the file (after genericDescriptions). Add the new guides to this array.

Do NOT include markdown code blocks in the description text - convert them to plain text or items arrays.
```

              : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200 hover:bg-stationpedia-surface'

  addGuide: (): string => {
    const state = get();
    if (!state.workspace) return '';

    // Generate unique guide key
    let counter = 1;
    let candidateKey = `NewGuide${counter}`;
    
    // Keep incrementing until we find a unique key
    while (state.workspace.guides?.some(g => g.guideKey === candidateKey)) {
      counter++;
      candidateKey = `NewGuide${counter}`;
    }
    
    const newGuide: any = {
      guideKey: candidateKey,
      displayName: `New Guide ${counter}`,
      pageDescription: 'New guide description',
      operationalDetails: [],
      deviceKey: candidateKey, // For compatibility
    };
    
    set({
      workspace: {
        ...state.workspace,
        guides: [...(state.workspace.guides || []), newGuide],
      },
    });
    
    return candidateKey;
  },

  // Add a new mechanic

    const state = get();

    // Generate unique mechanic key
    let counter = 1;
    let candidateKey = `NewMechanic${counter}`;
    
    // Keep incrementing until we find a unique key
    while (state.workspace.mechanics?.some((m: any) => m.guideKey === candidateKey || m.deviceKey === candidateKey)) {
      counter++;
      candidateKey = `NewMechanic${counter}`;
    }

      guideKey: candidateKey,
      displayName: `New Mechanic ${counter}`,
      pageDescription: 'New game mechanic description',
      operationalDetails: [],
      deviceKey: candidateKey, // For compatibility
    };
    
    set({
      workspace: {
        ...state.workspace,
        mechanics: [...(state.workspace.mechanics || []), newMechanic],
      },
    });
    
    return candidateKey;
  }, oldString:  // Add a new guide

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

- filePath: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor\src\renderer\editor\editorStore.ts`
- newString:

```
  deleteGuide: (guideKey) => {
    set((state) => {
      if (!state.workspace || !state.workspace.guides) return state;

      const newWorkspace = {
        ...state.workspace,
        guides: state.workspace.guides.filter(g => g.guideKey !== guideKey),
      };

      // If the deleted guide was selected, clear selection
      const updates: Partial<EditorState> = {
        workspace: newWorkspace,
        isDirty: true,
      };

      if (state.selectedDeviceKey === guideKey) {
        updates.selectedDeviceKey = null;
        updates.selectedItemType = null;
        updates.selectedDevice = null;
      }

      return updates;
    });
  },

  addMechanic: () => {
    let newMechanicKey = '';
    set((state) => {
      if (!state.workspace) return state;

      // Generate unique mechanic key
      const baseKey = 'NewMechanic';
      let counter = 1;
      let candidateKey = baseKey;
      
      while (state.workspace.mechanics?.some((m: any) => 
        m.guideKey === candidateKey || m.deviceKey === candidateKey
      )) {
        candidateKey = `${baseKey}${counter}`;
        counter++;
      }
      
      newMechanicKey = candidateKey;
      
      // Create new mechanic
      const newMechanic: any = {
        guideKey: newMechanicKey,
        displayName: 'New Game Mechanic',
        pageDescription: 'Game mechanic description goes here...',
        operationalDetails: [],
        deviceKey: newMechanicKey, // For compatibility
      };
      
      const newWorkspace = {
        ...state.workspace,
        mechanics: [...(state.workspace.mechanics || []), newMechanic],
      };
      
      return {
        workspace: newWorkspace,
        isDirty: true,
      };
    });
    return newMechanicKey;
  },

  deleteMechanic: (mechanicKey) => {
    set((state) => {
      if (!state.workspace || !state.workspace.mechanics) return state;

      const newWorkspace = {
        ...state.workspace,
        mechanics: state.workspace.mechanics.filter((m: any) => 
          m.guideKey !== mechanicKey && m.deviceKey !== mechanicKey
        ),
      };

      // If the deleted mechanic was selected, clear selection
      const updates: Partial<EditorState> = {
        workspace: newWorkspace,
        isDirty: true,
      };

      if (state.selectedDeviceKey === mechanicKey) {
        updates.selectedDeviceKey = null;
        updates.selectedItemType = null;
        updates.selectedDevice = null;
      }

      return updates;
    });
  },
```

## ✅ Completed Fixes:

## ⚠️ Remaining Issues (Need More Work):

### Issue 3: Edit Section Titles
The PropertyInspector already has a 'title' field editor for operational details. This should work but may need to be tested.

### Issue 4: Edit Guide/Mechanic DisplayName  
The PropertyInspector has displayName field for devices. It should work for guides/mechanics too since they use the same structure.

### Issue 5: Links Don't Render
The links use `{LINK:PageKey;Text}` format but the RichTextEditor stores HTML. We need to either:

### Issue 6: Show Game Defaults
Would require fetching actual game XML data and displaying it. Complex feature.

Need a "+ Add Section" button in the DeviceSectionsEditor.

### Issue 8: {HEADER:Text} Rendering in Mod
The mod needs to parse `{HEADER:Text}` tags when rendering guides.

                }] map[explanation:Fix Vanilla Guides header to use LoreGuideTitle style instead of SPDAListItem filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\Harmony\Patches.cs newString:        /// <summary>
        /// Add a "Vanilla Guides" text header above the vanilla guides
        /// Use the same style as the page title "Guides"
        /// </summary>
        private static void AddVanillaGuidesHeader(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideTitle == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Clone the LoreGuideTitle to create a matching header
                var headerObj = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(stationpedia.LoreGuideTitle.gameObject, stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);
                if (headerObj == null) return;

                headerObj.name = "VanillaGuidesHeader";
                var headerText = headerObj.GetComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                if (headerText != null)
                {
                    headerText.SetText("Vanilla Guides", true);
                    // Keep the same font, size, and style as "Guides" title
                }

                // Position it in the list
                headerObj.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error adding vanilla guides header: {ex.Message}");
            }
        } oldString:        /// <summary>
        /// Add a "Vanilla Guides" text header above the vanilla guides
        /// Instead of wrapping in a dropdown, just add a visual separator
        /// </summary>
        private static void AddVanillaGuidesHeader(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Create a text header using SPDAListItem but disable interaction
                var headerItem = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<SPDAListItem>(
                    stationpedia.ListSearchPrefab,
                    stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);

                if (headerItem == null) return;

                headerItem.gameObject.name = "VanillaGuidesHeader";
                headerItem.Apply("Vanilla Guides");

                // Style the text to look like a header (orange color)
                if (headerItem.InsertTitle != null)
                {
                    headerItem.InsertTitle.color = new Color(1f, 0.48f, 0.09f, 1f); // Orange #FF7A18
                    headerItem.InsertTitle.fontStyle = TMPro.FontStyles.Bold;
                }

                // Disable the button so it's not clickable
                if (headerItem.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    headerItem.InsertsButton.interactable = false;
                }

                // Hide the icon
                if (headerItem.InsertImage != null)
                {
                    headerItem.InsertImage.gameObject.SetActive(false);
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error adding vanilla guides header: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }]]
```

- newString:

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Create a text element inside a parent container
        /// Processes game format tags like {HEADER:Text} and {LINK:Page;Text}
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateTextElement(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, string text)
        {
            // Process {HEADER:Text} tags - convert to styled headers
            text = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(text, @"\{HEADER:([^}]+)\}", match =>
            {
                string headerText = match.Groups[1].Value;
                // Use orange color and bold for headers, matching vanilla style
                return $"<b><color=#FF7A18>{headerText}</color></b>";
            });
            
            var textGO = new GameObject("DetailText");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            var textComponent = textGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComponent.font = sourceText.font;
            textComponent.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
            textComponent.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize;
            textComponent.color = sourceText.color;
            textComponent.enableWordWrapping = true;
            textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            textComponent.richText = true;
            textComponent.lineSpacing = sourceText.lineSpacing;
            textComponent.margin = new Vector4(5, 5, 5, 5);
            textComponent.text = text;
            
            var rectTransform = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            
            var fitter = textGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            fitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
            fitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
        }
```

- oldString:

```
        /// <summary>

        private static void CreateTextElement(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, string text)
        {
            var textGO = new GameObject("DetailText");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            var textComponent = textGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComponent.font = sourceText.font;
            textComponent.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
            textComponent.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize;

            textComponent.text = text;

            rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);

```
/**
 * DeviceSectionsEditor - Unified editor for ALL device sections
 * Shows all editable parts of a device: description, operational details, logic, modes, etc.
 * Top: Rich text editor for currently selected field (resizable)
 * Bottom: Tree view of all sections with click-to-select (resizable)
 */
import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import {
  DndContext,
  closestCenter,
  KeyboardSensor,
  PointerSensor,
  useSensor,
  useSensors,
} from '@dnd-kit/core';
import {
  SortableContext,
  sortableKeyboardCoordinates,
  verticalListSortingStrategy,
  useSortable,
} from '@dnd-kit/sortable';
import { CSS } from '@dnd-kit/utilities';
import type { DeviceDocument, OperationalDetail, WorkspaceModel } from '@models/contentModel';
import { LinkModal } from './LinkModal';
import { useEditorStore } from './editorStore';
```

```
export const DeviceSectionsEditor: React.FC<DeviceSectionsEditorProps> = ({
  device,
  onUpdateDevice,
}) => {
  const { workspace } = useEditorStore();
  const [selection, setSelection] = useState<SelectionType>(null);
  const [isLinkModalOpen, setIsLinkModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({
    description: true,
    operationalDetails: true,
    logic: false,
    modes: false,
    slots: false,
    connections: false,
  });
  const [editorHeight, setEditorHeight] = useState(200); // Resizable editor height
  const editorRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null);
```

- oldString:

```
export const DeviceSectionsEditor: React.FC<DeviceSectionsEditorProps> = ({
  device,
  onUpdateDevice,
}) => {
  const [selection, setSelection] = useState<SelectionType>(null);

    description: true,
    operationalDetails: true,
    logic: false,
    modes: false,
    slots: false,
    connections: false,
  });

  const insertLink = useCallback(() => {
    setIsLinkModalOpen(true);
  }, []);

  const handleInsertLink = useCallback((linkText: string, displayText: string) => {
    // LinkText comes in format {LINK:PageKey;DisplayText}
    // Insert it at current cursor position
    insertAtCursor(linkText, '');
    setIsLinkModalOpen(false);
  }, [insertAtCursor]);

  const insertHeader = useCallback(() => {
    const headerText = prompt('Enter header text:');
    if (headerText) {
      insertAtCursor(`{HEADER:${headerText}}`, '');
    }
  }, [insertAtCursor]);
```

- oldString:

```
  const insertLink = useCallback(() => {
    const range = getSelectionRange();
    if (!range) return;
    
    // Use selected text as the page name, or a placeholder
    const pageName = range.selectedText || 'PageName';
    if (range.selectedText) {
      // Wrap selected text as link (selected text becomes link target)
      insertAtCursor(`<link=${pageName}>`, '</link>');
    } else {
      // Insert placeholder link that user can edit
      insertAtCursor(`<link=${pageName}>${pageName}</link>`, '');
    }
  }, [getSelectionRange, insertAtCursor]);
```


</details></tool-use>

Let me start with these high-priority items:

### Issue 5: Links Don't Render
The problem is that RichTextEditor stores HTML but the game needs `{LINK:PageKey;Text}` format. I need to:
- Store the raw game format directly in descriptions
- The editor should preserve these tags
- Maybe use a custom TipTap extension to handle game format tags

Actually, looking at it more carefully, the descriptions are stored as plain text with game format tags like `{LINK:}` and `{HEADER:}`. The RichTextEditor is converting these to HTML which breaks them. I need to either:
1. Don't use RichTextEditor for guide descriptions - use plain textarea
2. Make RichTextEditor preserve game format tags
3. Convert between HTML and game format

Option 3 seems best. Let me create a converter.

The mod needs to parse and render `{HEADER:Text}` tags when displaying guide content.
